dynasty.zh: 复兴党（文艺复兴党）执政期

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，总统掌握外交与国防主导权，总理领导内阁负责内政。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic where the president holds primacy over foreign affairs and defense, while the prime minister leads the cabinet on domestic policy.

socialStructure.zh: 以中产阶级为社会基础，精英官僚阶层影响力大，"大学校"体系培养政商精英，黄背心运动反映社会不满。
socialStructure.en: A middle-class-based society with a powerful bureaucratic elite, the Grandes Écoles system producing political and business leaders, and the Yellow Vest movement reflecting social discontent.

rulingClass.zh: 总统与内阁、国民议会多数联盟、高级文官体系（ENA毕业生网络）及企业精英。
rulingClass.en: The president and cabinet, National Assembly majority coalition, senior civil service networks (ENA graduates), and corporate elites.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期五年，可连任一次。
succession.en: The president is elected by direct universal suffrage for a five-year term, renewable once.

structure.zh: 半总统制，总统与总理分享行政权。国民议会（577席）与参议院（348席）构成两院制议会。宪法委员会行使合宪性审查权。
structure.en: Semi-presidential system with executive power shared between president and prime minister. The National Assembly (577 seats) and Senate (348 seats) form a bicameral parliament. The Constitutional Council exercises constitutional review.

function.zh: 管理国家经济政策、财政预算、税收征管与产业发展。
function.en: Manages national economic policy, fiscal budget, tax collection, and industrial development.

function.zh: 指挥法国军事力量、国防战略与军事技术研发。
function.en: Commands French military forces, defense strategy, and military technology R&D.

name.zh: 数字经济与人工智能部
name.en: Ministry of Digital Economy and AI

function.zh: 推进法国数字化转型与AI战略落地，协调"法国2030"科技投资计划。
function.en: Advances France's digital transformation and AI strategy implementation, coordinating the France 2030 technology investment plan.

name.en: Ministry of Europe and Foreign Affairs

function.zh: 主导外交政策、欧盟事务协调与全球多边合作。
function.en: Leads foreign policy, EU affairs coordination, and global multilateral cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 法国分为13个大区、96个省及35000余公社，地方分权改革赋予大区更多经济与规划权限。
localAdmin.en: France is divided into 13 regions, 96 departments, and over 35,000 communes, with decentralization reforms granting regions more economic and planning authority.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系（民法法系），以《民法典》（拿破仑法典继承者）为基础，宪法委员会行使合宪审查。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the Civil Code (successor to the Napoleonic Code), with the Constitutional Council exercising constitutional review.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（20%标准税率）、个人所得税（累进制最高45%）、公司税（25%）为主，社会保障缴费占比高。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on VAT (20% standard rate), progressive income tax (up to 45%), corporate tax (25%), with high social security contributions.

religion.zh: 天主教传统为主（约60%文化认同），世俗主义（laïcité）为宪法原则，穆斯林社群为第二大群体
religion.en: Catholic tradition predominant (~60% cultural identification), secularism (laïcité) as constitutional principle, Muslim community as second largest group

philosophy.zh: 启蒙运动遗产深厚，存在主义、后现代主义与解构主义思想影响全球，当代技术主权理念兴起。
philosophy.en: Deep Enlightenment heritage, existentialism, postmodernism, and deconstructionism have influenced the world, with contemporary technological sovereignty ideals rising.

culturalAchievements.zh: 卢浮宫、戛纳电影节、时尚之都、米其林美食体系、法国文学传统、LVMH奢侈品帝国。AI时代Mistral AI代表法国科技雄心。
culturalAchievements.en: The Louvre, Cannes Film Festival, fashion capital, Michelin gastronomy system, French literary tradition, LVMH luxury empire. Mistral AI represents French tech ambition in the AI era.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（法语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (French as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 欧盟第二大经济体，高端制造业、奢侈品、航空航天与核能产业发达。Mistral AI等初创企业推动法国成为欧洲AI重镇。
gdpDescription.en: The EU's second-largest economy with advanced high-end manufacturing, luxury goods, aerospace, and nuclear energy industries. Startups like Mistral AI are driving France to become a major European AI hub.

mainIndustries.zh: 航空航天（空客）、奢侈品（LVMH/开云）、核能、汽车、人工智能、制药、旅游业、农业
mainIndustries.en: Aerospace (Airbus), luxury goods (LVMH/Kering), nuclear energy, automotive, artificial intelligence, pharmaceuticals, tourism, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 飞机、奢侈品、葡萄酒、化妆品、核技术设备、药品、农产品、AI模型服务
tradeGoods.en: Aircraft, luxury goods, wine, cosmetics, nuclear technology equipment, pharmaceuticals, agricultural products, AI model services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约13万欧元，社会福利体系较完善但税负沉重，退休金改革引发持续抗议。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately €130,000, with a comprehensive social welfare system but heavy tax burden; pension reform has triggered ongoing protests.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟单一市场为核心贸易网络，跨大西洋与地中海贸易路线，对非洲法语国家经济影响力显著。
tradeRoutes.en: The EU single market as the core trade network, with trans-Atlantic and Mediterranean trade routes, and significant economic influence in Francophone Africa.

economicSystem.zh: 国家资本主义色彩浓厚的社会市场经济，政府通过产业政策、国有企业（EDF、SNCF）与"法国2030"计划积极干预经济。
economicSystem.en: A social market economy with strong state capitalism characteristics, with the government actively intervening through industrial policy, state-owned enterprises (EDF, SNCF), and the France 2030 plan.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的112%，政府承诺控制赤字但退休金改革与绿色转型投资需求巨大。
treasuryDescription.en: Public debt at approximately 112% of GDP; the government pledges deficit control but faces massive spending needs for pension reform and green transition investment.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的112%，约3.1万亿欧元。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 112% of GDP, around €3.1 trillion.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性财政立场，"法国2030"计划投资540亿欧元于半导体、AI、清洁能源等战略产业。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal stance, with the France 2030 plan investing €54 billion in strategic industries including semiconductors, AI, and clean energy.

description.zh: 欧洲最具实战经验的陆军之一，在萨赫勒地区保持持续军事部署。
description.en: One of Europe's most combat-experienced armies, maintaining sustained military deployment in the Sahel.

description.zh: 拥有核动力航母"戴高乐"号，具备全球投射能力。
description.en: Possesses the nuclear-powered carrier Charles de Gaulle, with global power projection capability.

description.zh: 配备阵风战斗机，空间监控能力日益增强。
description.en: Equipped with Rafale fighters, with growing space surveillance capabilities.

technology.zh: 独立核威慑力量（约290枚核弹头），阵风战斗机、FREMM护卫舰、凯撒自行榴弹炮，AI军事应用研发中。
technology.en: Independent nuclear deterrent (~290 warheads), Rafale fighters, FREMM frigates, CAESAR self-propelled howitzers, with AI military applications under development.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯对欧洲安全威胁、萨赫勒恐怖主义与地缘政治不稳定、网络战威胁。
threats.en: Russian threat to European security, Sahel terrorism and geopolitical instability, cyber warfare threats.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年从萨赫勒地区（马里、布基纳法索）撤军，继续在尼日尔保持军事存在（后因政变撤出）。
recentBattles.en: Withdrawal from the Sahel (Mali, Burkina Faso) in 2023, continued military presence in Niger (later withdrawn after coup).

populationDescription.zh: 欧盟人口第二大国，出生率在欧洲相对较高但仍在下降，移民问题为社会政治热点。
populationDescription.en: The EU's second most populous country with a relatively higher but declining birth rate in Europe; immigration is a major socio-political issue.

ethnicGroups.zh: 法国法律不统计族裔数据；以法兰西裔为主，北非、撒哈拉以南非洲及欧洲移民后裔为显著少数群体
ethnicGroups.en: French law does not collect ethnic data; predominantly of French descent, with significant minorities of North African, sub-Saharan African, and European immigrant origin

socialClasses.zh: 政商精英（"大学校"体系）、城市中产、郊区移民社区、农村与小城镇居民阶层分化明显。
socialClasses.en: A clear stratification of political-business elites (Grandes Écoles system), urban middle class, suburban immigrant communities, and rural/small-town residents.

allies.zh: 欧盟核心成员（德法轴心）、北约盟国、英国、美国，与非洲法语国家保持特殊关系。
allies.en: Core EU member (Franco-German axis), NATO allies, UK, US, maintaining special relationships with Francophone African nations.

enemies.zh: 与俄罗斯关系因乌克兰战争恶化，萨赫勒多国政变政权驱逐法军。
enemies.en: Relations with Russia deteriorated over the Ukraine war; coup governments in multiple Sahel nations expelled French forces.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、亚琛条约（法德深化合作）、AUKUS后与澳美关系修复中。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Treaty of Aachen (deepened Franco-German cooperation), relations with Australia and US mending post-AUKUS.

foreignPolicy.zh: 推动欧洲战略自主，倡导欧洲AI主权与技术独立，维护多边主义与法国全球影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Promoting European strategic autonomy, advocating European AI sovereignty and technological independence, upholding multilateralism and French global influence.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年马克龙推动欧盟AI法案协商，主办巴黎AI安全峰会筹备，应对萨赫勒外交危机。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: In 2023, Macron pushed EU AI Act negotiations, prepared the Paris AI Safety Summit, and managed the Sahel diplomatic crisis.

keyInnovations.zh: Mistral AI大语言模型、空客航空技术、核聚变研究（ITER总部）、阿丽亚娜火箭、粒子物理（CERN参与方）。
keyInnovations.en: Mistral AI large language models, Airbus aviation technology, nuclear fusion research (ITER headquarters), Ariane rockets, particle physics (CERN participant).

infrastructure.zh: 高铁TGV网络全球领先、核电占电力70%以上、5G网络扩展中、数据中心建设加速。
infrastructure.en: World-leading TGV high-speed rail network, nuclear power providing over 70% of electricity, expanding 5G networks, accelerating data center construction.

policy.zh: "法国2030"计划中22亿欧元专项用于AI发展，马克龙亲自推动法国成为"AI国家"，政府通过BPI France为AI初创提供融资支持。
policy.en: The France 2030 plan dedicates €2.2 billion specifically to AI development; Macron personally promotes France as an 'AI nation'; BPI France provides financing for AI startups.

regulatoryStance.zh: 支持欧盟AI法案但主张为初创企业保留创新空间，反对过度监管阻碍Mistral AI等欧洲冠军企业发展。
regulatoryStance.en: Supports the EU AI Act but advocates preserving innovation space for startups, opposing excessive regulation that would hinder European champions like Mistral AI.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年法国AI领域投资约30亿欧元，"法国2030"计划总投资540亿欧元中AI占重要份额。
investmentScale.en: French AI sector investment approximately €3 billion in 2023; AI holds a significant share of the €54 billion France 2030 total investment plan.

capabilities.zh: 开源大语言模型，在7B参数规模上性能超越Llama 2 13B，代表欧洲AI自主能力突破。
capabilities.en: Open-source LLM that outperforms Llama 2 13B at the 7B parameter scale, representing a breakthrough in European autonomous AI capability.

capabilities.zh: 基于混合专家架构的稀疏大模型，性能接近GPT-3.5，推理效率极高。
capabilities.en: A sparse MoE (Mixture of Experts) model with performance approaching GPT-3.5 and extremely efficient inference.

keyProducts.zh: Mistral 7B、Mixtral 8x7B开源大模型
keyProducts.en: Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B open-source LLMs

keyProducts.zh: Transformers库、模型托管平台Hub
keyProducts.en: Transformers library, model hosting platform Hub

keyProducts.zh: 3DEXPERIENCE平台、工业AI仿真
keyProducts.en: 3DEXPERIENCE platform, industrial AI simulation

contribution.zh: 前DeepMind研究员，创办Mistral AI打造欧洲本土大语言模型，融资速度打破欧洲纪录。
contribution.en: Former DeepMind researcher who founded Mistral AI to build Europe's homegrown LLMs, breaking European fundraising speed records.

contribution.zh: CNN之父、图灵奖得主，法国人工智能研究的象征性人物，虽在美国工作但与法国AI界联系紧密。
contribution.en: Father of CNNs and Turing Award winner, a symbolic figure of French AI research; though based in the US, he maintains close ties with France's AI community.

researchFocus.zh: 开源大语言模型、自然语言处理（法语及多语种）、工业AI、数学与AI交叉研究、机器人学。
researchFocus.en: Open-source LLMs, NLP (French and multilingual), industrial AI, mathematics-AI intersection research, robotics.

computeInfrastructure.zh: Jean Zay超级计算机（CNRS/GENCI运营）是法国AI训练主力算力，政府计划投资建设更多AI专用数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: The Jean Zay supercomputer (operated by CNRS/GENCI) serves as France's primary AI training compute; the government plans to invest in more AI-dedicated data centers.

talentPool.zh: 巴黎综合理工学院、巴黎高等师范学院、INRIA等培养世界级AI人才，但人才外流至美国科技巨头问题突出。
talentPool.en: École Polytechnique, ENS Paris, INRIA, and others produce world-class AI talent, but brain drain to US tech giants remains a prominent issue.

globalRanking.zh: 欧洲AI第一梯队，全球约第5-6位
globalRanking.en: European AI first tier, approximately 5th-6th globally

outlook.zh: Mistral AI的成功提振法国信心，但能否与美国和中国科技巨头持续竞争取决于算力投资和人才留存。
outlook.en: Mistral AI's success boosts French confidence, but competing sustainably with US and Chinese tech giants depends on compute investment and talent retention.

strengths.zh: 核威慑独立性、航空航天领先地位、Mistral AI等本土AI企业崛起、"法国2030"战略投资、高等教育质量。
strengths.en: Independent nuclear deterrent, aerospace leadership, rise of homegrown AI firms like Mistral AI, France 2030 strategic investment, high-quality higher education.

weaknesses.zh: 社会改革阻力大（退休金抗议）、AI人才外流、公共债务高企、劳动市场僵化、萨赫勒影响力衰退。
weaknesses.en: Strong resistance to social reform (pension protests), AI talent drain, high public debt, rigid labor market, declining Sahel influence.

outlook.zh: 作为欧洲AI领军者之一，法国在Mistral AI带动下有望构建欧洲AI自主生态，但需解决人才流失与算力差距。
outlook.en: As one of Europe's AI leaders, France may build an autonomous European AI ecosystem driven by Mistral AI, but must address talent drain and compute gaps.

description.zh: 法国在AI时代以Mistral AI为旗帜推动欧洲技术主权，"法国2030"计划投入巨资发展AI产业。马克龙政府在推进国内改革（退休金改革引发大规模抗议）的同时积极塑造全球AI治理规则。作为联合国安理会常任理事国和核大国，法国在地缘政治上维持独立声音，但萨赫勒影响力受挫。
description.en: France champions European technological sovereignty in the AI era with Mistral AI as its flagship, investing heavily in AI through the France 2030 plan. The Macron government pushes domestic reform (pension reform sparking mass protests) while actively shaping global AI governance rules. As a permanent UN Security Council member and nuclear power, France maintains an independent geopolitical voice, though its Sahel influence has suffered setbacks.

dynasty.zh: 社民党-绿党-自民党"交通灯"联合政府

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制共和国，总理由联邦议院选举产生，联邦总统为虚位国家元首，16个州享有广泛自治权。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary republic where the chancellor is elected by the Bundestag, the federal president serves as ceremonial head of state, and 16 states enjoy extensive autonomy.

socialStructure.zh: 强大的中产阶级为社会基石，"社会市场经济"模式保障社会流动性，但东西德差距与移民融合仍为挑战。
socialStructure.en: A strong middle class as the social foundation, the 'social market economy' model ensuring social mobility, but the East-West divide and immigrant integration remain challenges.

rulingClass.zh: 联邦总理与内阁、联邦议院多数联盟、各州州长、工商业协会（BDI）与工会。
rulingClass.en: Federal chancellor and cabinet, Bundestag majority coalition, state minister-presidents, industry associations (BDI), and trade unions.

succession.zh: 总理由联邦议院多数选举产生，无任期限制。联邦总统由联邦大会选举，任期五年。
succession.en: The chancellor is elected by a Bundestag majority with no term limit. The federal president is elected by the Federal Convention for a five-year term.

structure.zh: 联邦议会制，联邦议院（736席）为立法核心，联邦参议院代表16州利益。联邦宪法法院拥有违宪审查权。
structure.en: Federal parliamentary system, with the Bundestag (736 seats) as the legislative core, the Bundesrat representing the interests of 16 states, and the Federal Constitutional Court exercising judicial review.

name.zh: 联邦经济与气候保护部
name.en: Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action

function.zh: 负责经济政策、能源转型、产业数字化与AI战略实施。
function.en: Responsible for economic policy, energy transition, industrial digitalization, and AI strategy implementation.

name.en: Federal Ministry of Education and Research

function.zh: 管理科研资助、AI研究中心网络与高等教育。
function.en: Manages research funding, AI research center networks, and higher education.

function.zh: 领导联邦国防军，推进"转折时代"下的军队现代化。
function.en: Leads the Bundeswehr and advances military modernization under the Zeitenwende.

localAdmin.zh: 联邦制下16个州拥有广泛自治权，各州设州议会与州政府，教育和文化事务主要由州管辖。
localAdmin.en: Under federalism, 16 states enjoy extensive autonomy with their own parliaments and governments; education and cultural affairs are primarily state-managed.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以《基本法》（宪法）为最高法律，联邦宪法法院具有至高的违宪审查权。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system, with the Basic Law (constitution) as supreme law and the Federal Constitutional Court holding supreme judicial review power.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高45%）、增值税（19%）、公司税（约30%含地方营业税）为主，社会保障缴费约占工资40%。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to 45%), VAT (19%), corporate tax (~30% including local trade tax), with social security contributions at approximately 40% of wages.

religion.zh: 基督教（天主教与新教各约25%）为主，无宗教信仰者比例持续上升（约40%），穆斯林社群约5%
religion.en: Christianity (Catholic and Protestant each ~25%) predominant, rising non-religious population (~40%), Muslim community approximately 5%

philosophy.zh: 康德、黑格尔、马克思等哲学传统深厚，法兰克福学派批判理论影响深远，当代注重环保主义与社会民主价值。
philosophy.en: Deep philosophical traditions of Kant, Hegel, Marx; the Frankfurt School's critical theory has had far-reaching influence; contemporary focus on environmentalism and social democratic values.

culturalAchievements.zh: 古典音乐传统（巴赫、贝多芬）、汽车工业文化（奔驰、宝马、大众）、包豪斯设计、啤酒文化、世界领先的工程教育。
culturalAchievements.en: Classical music tradition (Bach, Beethoven), automotive industry culture (Mercedes, BMW, VW), Bauhaus design, beer culture, world-leading engineering education.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（德语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (German as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 欧洲最大经济体，全球第三大经济体。出口导向型制造业强国面临能源转型与中国竞争双重挑战，2023年GDP微幅萎缩。
gdpDescription.en: Europe's largest and the world's third-largest economy. The export-oriented manufacturing powerhouse faces dual challenges of energy transition and Chinese competition; GDP contracted slightly in 2023.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车（大众/宝马/奔驰）、机械工程、化工（巴斯夫）、企业软件（SAP）、制药（拜耳）、AI与工业4.0
mainIndustries.en: Automotive (VW/BMW/Mercedes), mechanical engineering, chemicals (BASF), enterprise software (SAP), pharmaceuticals (Bayer), AI and Industry 4.0

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车与零部件、机械设备、化工产品、SAP企业软件、医药产品、精密仪器
tradeGoods.en: Vehicles and parts, machinery, chemical products, SAP enterprise software, pharmaceuticals, precision instruments

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约25万欧元（含房产），但住房自有率在欧洲偏低（约50%），房租上涨为社会热点。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately €250,000 (including property), but homeownership rate is low for Europe (~50%); rising rents are a social hot-button issue.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟单一市场为核心，对中美贸易依存度高，"去风险"战略下寻求供应链多元化。
tradeRoutes.en: The EU single market as the core, with high trade dependence on China and the US, pursuing supply chain diversification under the 'de-risking' strategy.

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济模式，国家提供完善社会保障与基础设施，同时尊重市场竞争机制。"债务刹车"宪法条款限制政府举债。
economicSystem.en: Social market economy model where the state provides comprehensive social security and infrastructure while respecting market competition. The constitutional 'debt brake' limits government borrowing.

treasuryDescription.zh: 德国长期奉行财政纪律，"债务刹车"宪法条款限制结构性赤字，但2023年宪法法院裁定600亿欧元气候基金违宪引发财政危机。
treasuryDescription.en: Germany has long practiced fiscal discipline with the constitutional 'debt brake' limiting structural deficits, but the 2023 Constitutional Court ruling that €60 billion in climate funds was unconstitutional triggered a fiscal crisis.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的65%，低于多数发达国家。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 65% of GDP, below most developed nations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 紧缩性财政立场，"债务刹车"宪法条款限制财政空间，2023年底预算危机迫使大规模支出削减。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity-oriented fiscal stance, with the constitutional 'debt brake' limiting fiscal space; the late 2023 budget crisis forced massive spending cuts.

description.zh: 正经历"转折时代"重建，豹2坦克为北约核心装甲力量。
description.en: Undergoing Zeitenwende rebuilding; Leopard 2 tanks form a core NATO armored capability.

description.zh: 以护卫舰和潜艇为主力，波罗的海和北海防御。
description.en: Frigates and submarines as main assets, defending the Baltic and North seas.

description.zh: 配备台风战斗机，正采购F-35以承担北约核共享任务。
description.en: Equipped with Eurofighter Typhoons, procuring F-35s for NATO nuclear sharing mission.

commanderInChief.zh: 国防部长鲍里斯·皮斯托里乌斯

technology.zh: 豹2主战坦克、台风战斗机、IRIS-T防空系统、212A型潜艇，正投资AI军事应用与无人系统。
technology.en: Leopard 2 MBTs, Eurofighter Typhoons, IRIS-T air defense, Type 212A submarines, investing in AI military applications and unmanned systems.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯对欧洲的军事威胁是"转折时代"军事重建的核心驱动力，网络战与混合战威胁。
threats.en: Russia's military threat to Europe is the core driver of the Zeitenwende military rebuild; cyber and hybrid warfare threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，向乌克兰提供大规模军事援助（豹2坦克、IRIS-T防空系统、弹药）。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; provides large-scale military aid to Ukraine (Leopard 2 tanks, IRIS-T air defense, ammunition).

populationDescription.zh: 欧盟人口第一大国，老龄化与劳动力短缺为核心挑战，移民是人口增长主要来源。
populationDescription.en: The EU's most populous country, with aging and labor shortages as core challenges; immigration is the primary source of population growth.

ethnicGroups.zh: 德意志裔为主（约75%），土耳其裔（约3.5%）、叙利亚难民及其他欧洲与中东移民群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly of German descent (~75%), Turkish-origin (~3.5%), Syrian refugees, and other European and Middle Eastern immigrant groups

socialClasses.zh: "中产阶级社会"为基础，技术工人地位较高（双元制职业教育体系），但住房可负担性恶化加剧社会焦虑。
socialClasses.en: A 'middle-class society' as the foundation, skilled workers enjoy high status (dual vocational education system), but worsening housing affordability intensifies social anxiety.

allies.zh: 法德轴心为欧盟核心，北约盟国，与美国保持跨大西洋伙伴关系。
allies.en: Franco-German axis as the EU core, NATO allies, maintaining transatlantic partnership with the US.

enemies.zh: 与俄罗斯因乌克兰战争关系破裂，能源依赖脱钩（北溪管道爆炸）。
enemies.en: Relations with Russia ruptured over the Ukraine war, energy dependence decoupled (Nord Stream pipeline sabotage).

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、亚琛条约（法德合作深化）、对华"去风险"战略。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Treaty of Aachen (deepened Franco-German cooperation), 'de-risking' strategy toward China.

foreignPolicy.zh: "转折时代"后加大对乌援助与国防投入，推进对华"去风险"、维护欧盟团结与多边秩序。
foreignPolicy.en: Post-Zeitenwende increase in Ukraine aid and defense spending, pursuing 'de-risking' from China, maintaining EU unity and multilateral order.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年持续大规模援乌，朔尔茨访华讨论经济关系，推动欧盟扩大与乌克兰入盟进程。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Continued large-scale Ukraine aid in 2023, Scholz visited China for economic discussions, promoted EU enlargement and Ukraine's accession process.

keyInnovations.zh: 工业4.0与智能制造、SAP企业AI、汽车自动驾驶技术、量子计算研究、绿色氢能技术。
keyInnovations.en: Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing, SAP enterprise AI, automotive autonomous driving, quantum computing research, green hydrogen technology.

infrastructure.zh: 欧洲最大的制造业基础设施、高速公路网络（Autobahn）、正加速5G部署与数据中心建设。
infrastructure.en: Europe's largest manufacturing infrastructure, Autobahn highway network, accelerating 5G deployment and data center construction.

policy.zh: 联邦政府"AI战略2025+"追加投资至30亿欧元，设立4个AI能力中心，推动工业AI应用与"AI德国制造"品牌。
policy.en: The federal government's 'AI Strategy 2025+' increases investment to €3 billion, establishes 4 AI competence centers, and promotes industrial AI applications and the 'AI Made in Germany' brand.

regulatoryStance.zh: 支持欧盟AI法案风险分级监管框架，主张为中小企业和工业AI应用保留灵活空间。
regulatoryStance.en: Supports the EU AI Act's risk-based regulatory framework, advocating flexibility for SMEs and industrial AI applications.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年德国AI投资约20亿欧元，远低于美国和中国，但在工业AI领域投入集中。
investmentScale.en: German AI investment approximately €2 billion in 2023, far below the US and China, but concentrated in industrial AI.

capabilities.zh: 欧洲主权AI大模型，专注企业级应用与数据主权合规，多语种支持。
capabilities.en: European sovereign AI LLM focused on enterprise applications and data sovereignty compliance, with multilingual support.

keyProducts.zh: Luminous大模型、企业AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: Luminous LLM, enterprise AI solutions

keyProducts.zh: SAP S/4HANA内置AI、Joule AI助手
keyProducts.en: SAP S/4HANA built-in AI, Joule AI copilot

keyProducts.zh: DeepL翻译与DeepL Write AI写作工具
keyProducts.en: DeepL Translator and DeepL Write AI writing tool

contribution.zh: 前苹果AI研究员，创办Aleph Alpha打造欧洲主权AI大模型，获德国政府与博世等企业支持。
contribution.en: Former Apple AI researcher who founded Aleph Alpha to build European sovereign AI LLMs, backed by the German government and companies like Bosch.

researchFocus.zh: 工业AI与智能制造、自动驾驶、企业级AI应用、AI翻译与自然语言处理、机器人学。
researchFocus.en: Industrial AI and smart manufacturing, autonomous driving, enterprise AI applications, AI translation and NLP, robotics.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 于利希超级计算中心运营JUWELS Booster，正规划建设更大规模AI专用算力，但整体算力投入落后于美中。
computeInfrastructure.en: Jülich Supercomputing Centre operates JUWELS Booster; planning larger-scale AI-dedicated compute, but overall compute investment lags behind the US and China.

talentPool.zh: TU Munich、RWTH Aachen、Max Planck研究所等培养AI人才，但薪资水平难与美国硅谷竞争。
talentPool.en: TU Munich, RWTH Aachen, Max Planck Institutes produce AI talent, but salary levels struggle to compete with US Silicon Valley.

globalRanking.zh: 欧洲AI第二梯队领先，全球约第8-10位
globalRanking.en: Leading European AI second tier, approximately 8th-10th globally

outlook.zh: 工业AI为德国独特优势，但缺乏大模型领军企业，算力投资和风险资本远不及美英法。
outlook.en: Industrial AI is Germany's unique advantage, but it lacks leading LLM companies, with compute investment and venture capital far behind the US, UK, and France.

strengths.zh: 欧洲最大经济体、制造业与工程实力、SAP等企业软件巨头、强大的研究机构体系、财政纪律。
strengths.en: Europe's largest economy, manufacturing and engineering prowess, enterprise software giants like SAP, strong research institution system, fiscal discipline.

weaknesses.zh: 能源转型成本高昂、经济增长停滞、AI创业生态薄弱、官僚主义与数字化落后、"债务刹车"限制公共投资。
weaknesses.en: High energy transition costs, stagnating growth, weak AI startup ecosystem, bureaucracy and digital backwardness, 'debt brake' limiting public investment.

outlook.zh: 德国需在维持财政纪律与加大AI投资之间找到平衡，工业AI应用是其最有可能突破的方向。
outlook.en: Germany must balance fiscal discipline with increased AI investment; industrial AI applications represent its most likely breakthrough direction.

description.zh: 德国作为欧洲经济引擎在AI时代面临增长困境：2023年GDP微幅萎缩，能源转型成本高企，"债务刹车"限制财政空间。朔尔茨政府的"交通灯"联盟内部分歧不断。在AI领域，德国以SAP和Aleph Alpha为代表推进工业AI与主权AI战略，但风险资本和算力投入远落后于美英法。"转折时代"下军事现代化加速，大规模援乌持续。
description.en: Germany, as Europe's economic engine, faces growth challenges in the AI era: GDP contracted slightly in 2023, energy transition costs remain high, and the 'debt brake' limits fiscal space. Scholz's 'Traffic Light' coalition faces constant internal divisions. In AI, Germany advances industrial AI and sovereign AI strategies through SAP and Aleph Alpha, but venture capital and compute investment lag far behind the US, UK, and France. Military modernization accelerates under the Zeitenwende, with large-scale Ukraine aid continuing.

name.zh: 大不列颠及北爱尔兰联合王国
name.en: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

dynasty.zh: 保守党执政期（查尔斯三世为君主）

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，君主为虚位国家元首，首相由下议院多数党领袖担任，掌握实际行政权。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy where the monarch is ceremonial head of state and the prime minister, as leader of the House of Commons majority, holds actual executive power.

socialStructure.zh: 以阶层意识鲜明的社会结构著称，伦敦金融城与科技圈精英、中产阶级与后工业化地区工人阶级的分化加剧。
socialStructure.en: Known for pronounced class consciousness, with growing division between City of London finance and tech elites, the middle class, and working class in post-industrial regions.

rulingClass.zh: 首相与内阁、下议院多数党、王室、金融城精英与科技领袖。
rulingClass.en: Prime minister and cabinet, House of Commons majority party, the Crown, City of London elites, and technology leaders.

succession.zh: 首相由下议院多数党领袖担任，无固定任期。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: The prime minister serves as leader of the House of Commons majority party with no fixed term. The monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 议会主权制，下议院（650席）为最高立法机构，上议院（约800席）为修订院。首相领导内阁行使行政权。
structure.en: Parliamentary sovereignty system, with the House of Commons (650 seats) as supreme legislature, the House of Lords (~800 seats) as a revising chamber, and the PM leading the cabinet in executive power.

name.en: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology

function.zh: 负责AI政策、科技创新战略与数字经济监管，主导AI安全研究所运营。
function.en: Responsible for AI policy, science and innovation strategy, and digital economy regulation; leads operation of the AI Safety Institute.

function.zh: 管理公共财政、经济政策与税收制度。
function.en: Manages public finances, economic policy, and the tax system.

function.zh: 领导英国武装力量与国防战略。
function.en: Leads the UK Armed Forces and defense strategy.

localAdmin.zh: 英格兰、苏格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰实行权力下放制度，苏格兰和威尔士设有地方议会与政府。
localAdmin.en: England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland operate under devolution, with Scotland and Wales having their own parliaments and governments.

legalSystem.zh: 英格兰与威尔士实行普通法系，苏格兰保留混合法系。无成文宪法，以惯例和判例法为基础。
legalSystem.en: England and Wales operate under common law, Scotland retains a mixed legal system. No written constitution, based on convention and case law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（累进制最高45%）、增值税（20%）、国民保险税、公司税（25%）为主。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on progressive income tax (up to 45%), VAT (20%), National Insurance contributions, and corporate tax (25%).

religion.zh: 英国国教（圣公会）为国教，但世俗化程度高，无宗教信仰者已超半数；穆斯林为第二大宗教群体
religion.en: Church of England (Anglican) as established church, but highly secularized with non-religious now exceeding half; Muslims as second largest religious group

philosophy.zh: 经验主义与功利主义传统深厚（洛克、休谟、边沁、密尔），当代以分析哲学和有效利他主义在AI安全领域的应用著称。
philosophy.en: Deep traditions of empiricism and utilitarianism (Locke, Hume, Bentham, Mill); contemporarily known for analytic philosophy and effective altruism's application in AI safety.

culturalAchievements.zh: 莎士比亚戏剧传统、BBC全球媒体影响力、摇滚乐（披头士）、哈利·波特文化现象、伦敦金融城、DeepMind引领AI研究。
culturalAchievements.en: Shakespearean dramatic tradition, BBC global media influence, rock music (The Beatles), Harry Potter cultural phenomenon, the City of London, DeepMind leading AI research.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (English as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第六大经济体，金融服务与科技为核心支柱。脱欧后贸易摩擦持续，但伦敦保持全球金融中心地位，AI产业蓬勃发展。
gdpDescription.en: The world's sixth-largest economy with financial services and technology as core pillars. Post-Brexit trade friction continues, but London maintains its global financial center status, with a thriving AI industry.

mainIndustries.zh: 金融服务、AI与科技、制药（阿斯利康/GSK）、半导体设计（Arm）、航空航天（罗罗/BAE）、创意产业
mainIndustries.en: Financial services, AI and technology, pharmaceuticals (AstraZeneca/GSK), semiconductor design (Arm), aerospace (Rolls-Royce/BAE), creative industries

tradeGoods.zh: 金融服务、Arm芯片设计、药品、AI模型与服务、石油天然气、威士忌、航空发动机
tradeGoods.en: Financial services, Arm chip designs, pharmaceuticals, AI models and services, oil and gas, whisky, aerospace engines

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约30万英镑，伦敦房价极高拉大地区差距，生活成本危机持续影响低收入群体。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately £300,000; extremely high London housing prices widen regional disparities; the cost-of-living crisis continues to affect lower-income groups.

tradeRoutes.zh: 脱欧后以英美贸易和英联邦贸易为重心，同时与欧盟保持贸易合作协议（TCA），积极加入CPTPP。
tradeRoutes.en: Post-Brexit focus on US-UK and Commonwealth trade, maintaining the EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement (TCA), and actively joining CPTPP.

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济，金融监管相对宽松（"大爆炸"改革遗产），政府通过产业战略支持AI和绿色科技。
economicSystem.en: Free market economy with relatively light financial regulation ('Big Bang' reform legacy), government supporting AI and green tech through industrial strategy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的100%，特拉斯政府迷你预算危机后苏纳克政府致力于恢复财政信誉。
treasuryDescription.en: Public debt at approximately 100% of GDP; the Sunak government is committed to restoring fiscal credibility after the Truss mini-budget crisis.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的100%，约2.5万亿英镑。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 100% of GDP, around £2.5 trillion.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 紧缩倾向的财政政策，苏纳克政府优先控制通胀与债务，但公共服务资金紧张。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity-leaning fiscal policy; the Sunak government prioritizes inflation and debt control, but public services face funding pressures.

description.zh: 正缩减至7.2万人，但保持高度专业化与全球部署能力。
description.en: Shrinking to 72,000 but maintaining high professionalism and global deployment capability.

description.zh: 拥有伊丽莎白女王级航母，核潜艇构成独立核威慑。
description.en: Possesses Queen Elizabeth-class carriers; nuclear submarines form an independent nuclear deterrent.

description.zh: 配备F-35B与台风战斗机，Tempest六代机联合研发中。
description.en: Equipped with F-35B and Typhoon fighters; Tempest sixth-gen fighter under joint development.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王查尔斯三世（名义），首相苏纳克（实际）

technology.zh: 独立核威慑（三叉戟潜射弹道导弹，约225枚核弹头）、F-35B、Tempest六代机项目、AI军事应用研发。
technology.en: Independent nuclear deterrent (Trident SLBMs, ~225 warheads), F-35B, Tempest sixth-gen fighter program, AI military applications R&D.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯威胁、网络战、北爱尔兰协议政治紧张、海外领地安全挑战。
threats.en: Russian threat, cyber warfare, Northern Ireland Protocol political tensions, overseas territory security challenges.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，向乌克兰提供重要军事训练与装备援助，首个向乌提供远程导弹（风暴影）。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; provides significant military training and equipment aid to Ukraine, first to supply long-range missiles (Storm Shadow).

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长主要依赖移民，脱欧后移民政策转向积分制，净移民数量反而创历史新高。
populationDescription.en: Population growth primarily driven by immigration; post-Brexit immigration policy shifted to a points-based system, yet net migration has reached record highs.

ethnicGroups.zh: 白人（约82%）、亚裔（约9%，含印巴裔）、黑人（约4%）、混血及其他（约5%）
ethnicGroups.en: White (~82%), Asian (~9%, including Indian and Pakistani), Black (~4%), mixed and other (~5%)

socialClasses.zh: 传统阶级意识浓厚，伦敦金融与科技精英、中产专业人士、后工业区工人阶级之间差距明显。
socialClasses.en: Strong traditional class consciousness; marked gap between London financial and tech elites, middle-class professionals, and post-industrial working class.

allies.zh: 美国（"特殊关系"）、北约盟国、AUKUS（澳英美）、英联邦国家、五眼联盟。
allies.en: US ('Special Relationship'), NATO allies, AUKUS (Australia-UK-US), Commonwealth nations, Five Eyes.

enemies.zh: 与俄罗斯关系因乌克兰战争、间谍案（索尔兹伯里毒杀事件）长期对立。
enemies.en: Long-standing confrontation with Russia over the Ukraine war and espionage cases (Salisbury poisoning).

treaties.zh: 北约公约、AUKUS、五眼联盟、CPTPP（2023年正式加入）、英欧贸易合作协议。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, AUKUS, Five Eyes, CPTPP (formally joined 2023), UK-EU Trade and Cooperation Agreement.

foreignPolicy.zh: "全球化英国"战略，深化印太参与（AUKUS），主导全球AI安全治理（布莱奇利公园峰会）。
foreignPolicy.en: 'Global Britain' strategy, deepening Indo-Pacific engagement (AUKUS), leading global AI safety governance (Bletchley Park Summit).

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年11月主办布莱奇利公园AI安全峰会（全球首个AI安全政府间峰会），加入CPTPP。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Hosted the Bletchley Park AI Safety Summit in November 2023 (the world's first intergovernmental AI safety summit), joined CPTPP.

keyInnovations.zh: DeepMind AI研究（AlphaFold）、Arm芯片架构（全球移动设备基础）、AI安全研究所、量子计算、金融科技。
keyInnovations.en: DeepMind AI research (AlphaFold), Arm chip architecture (global mobile device foundation), AI Safety Institute, quantum computing, fintech.

infrastructure.zh: 伦敦为全球科技与金融中心、牛桥研究集群、剑桥"硅沼泽"科技园区、5G网络扩展中。
infrastructure.en: London as a global tech and financial center, Oxbridge research cluster, Cambridge 'Silicon Fen' tech park, expanding 5G networks.

policy.zh: 2023年11月主办布莱奇利公园AI安全峰会，成立全球首个AI安全研究所（AISI），发布亲创新的AI监管白皮书。
policy.en: Hosted the Bletchley Park AI Safety Summit in November 2023, established the world's first AI Safety Institute (AISI), released a pro-innovation AI regulatory white paper.

regulatoryStance.zh: 亲创新、轻监管的"沙盒"方法，不急于立法而是通过行业监管机构分部门管理，与欧盟AI法案形成对比。
regulatoryStance.en: Pro-innovation, light-touch 'sandbox' approach, prioritizing sector-specific regulation through industry regulators rather than rushing legislation, contrasting with the EU AI Act.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年英国AI领域投资约38亿英镑，政府承诺10亿英镑AI研究基金，为美国之外最大AI投资市场。
investmentScale.en: UK AI investment approximately £3.8 billion in 2023; government committed £1 billion AI research fund, making it the largest AI investment market outside the US.

capabilities.zh: 革命性蛋白质结构预测AI，预测了2.14亿个蛋白质结构，对生物医学影响深远。
capabilities.en: Revolutionary protein structure prediction AI that predicted 214 million protein structures, with profound biomedical impact.

capabilities.zh: 多模态大模型，DeepMind伦敦团队参与核心研发。
capabilities.en: Multimodal LLM, with DeepMind's London team participating in core development.

keyProducts.zh: AlphaFold、Gemini（部分）、AlphaGo
keyProducts.en: AlphaFold, Gemini (partial), AlphaGo

keyProducts.zh: Arm芯片架构，全球99%智能手机处理器基础
keyProducts.en: Arm chip architecture, foundation of 99% of global smartphone processors

keyProducts.zh: Stable Diffusion开源图像生成模型
keyProducts.en: Stable Diffusion open-source image generation model

contribution.zh: DeepMind创始人，推动AlphaFold和Gemini等突破性AI研究，2023年被任命为大英帝国司令勋章。
contribution.en: DeepMind founder, driving breakthrough AI research including AlphaFold and Gemini, appointed CBE in 2023.

contribution.zh: 投资人与AI伦理倡导者，受命领导全球首个AI安全研究所，推动"前沿AI"安全评估框架。
contribution.en: Investor and AI ethics advocate, tasked with leading the world's first AI Safety Institute, advancing 'frontier AI' safety evaluation frameworks.

researchFocus.zh: AI安全与对齐研究、蛋白质结构预测、芯片架构设计、自然语言处理、AI伦理与治理。
researchFocus.en: AI safety and alignment research, protein structure prediction, chip architecture design, NLP, AI ethics and governance.

computeInfrastructure.zh: Bristol超算中心Isambard-AI建设中，政府投资9亿英镑建设AI算力，DeepMind使用Google全球算力资源。
computeInfrastructure.en: Isambard-AI under construction at Bristol Supercomputing Centre; government investing £900 million in AI compute; DeepMind uses Google's global compute resources.

talentPool.zh: 牛津、剑桥、帝国理工、UCL等培养世界顶级AI人才，伦敦为欧洲最大AI人才聚集地。
talentPool.en: Oxford, Cambridge, Imperial College, UCL produce world-leading AI talent; London is Europe's largest AI talent hub.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI第三强国（仅次于美国和中国）
globalRanking.en: Third strongest AI nation globally (behind only the US and China)

outlook.zh: 英国以AI安全治理和DeepMind研究为双引擎，但需解决脱欧后人才流动限制和算力差距问题。
outlook.en: The UK is powered by AI safety governance and DeepMind research as dual engines, but must address post-Brexit talent mobility restrictions and compute gaps.

strengths.zh: DeepMind全球AI研究领先、Arm芯片架构垄断移动市场、AI安全治理全球引领者、牛剑顶级人才库、英语母语优势。
strengths.en: DeepMind's world-leading AI research, Arm's chip architecture monopoly in mobile, global AI safety governance leadership, Oxbridge talent pool, native English advantage.

weaknesses.zh: 脱欧后贸易摩擦、经济增长乏力、NHS资金紧张、南北差距、AI人才被美国高薪吸引。
weaknesses.en: Post-Brexit trade friction, weak economic growth, NHS funding pressures, North-South divide, AI talent attracted by US salaries.

outlook.zh: 英国定位为全球AI安全标准制定者与研究重镇，布莱奇利公园峰会成功提升国际影响力，但需更多算力投资。
outlook.en: The UK positions itself as a global AI safety standard setter and research powerhouse; the Bletchley Park Summit successfully boosted international influence, but more compute investment is needed.

description.zh: 英国在AI时代以DeepMind和AI安全治理为双旗帜占据全球领先地位。2023年11月布莱奇利公园AI安全峰会是全球首个AI安全政府间峰会，英国成立全球首个AI安全研究所（AISI）。Arm Holdings纳斯达克上市标志着英国在芯片架构设计领域的关键地位。苏纳克政府推行亲创新的AI监管路线，与欧盟的严格立法形成差异化竞争。脱欧后经济挑战与生活成本危机持续。
description.en: The UK occupies a globally leading position in the AI era with DeepMind and AI safety governance as dual flagships. The November 2023 Bletchley Park AI Safety Summit was the world's first intergovernmental AI safety summit, and the UK established the world's first AI Safety Institute (AISI). Arm Holdings' Nasdaq IPO highlights the UK's critical role in chip architecture. The Sunak government pursues a pro-innovation AI regulatory approach, differentiating from the EU's strict legislation. Post-Brexit economic challenges and the cost-of-living crisis persist.

dynasty.zh: 看守内阁（吕特四届政府辞职后）
dynasty.en: Caretaker cabinet (after Rutte's fourth government resignation)

capital.zh: 阿姆斯特丹（宪法首都）/海牙（政府所在地）

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，国王为虚位元首，多党联合执政为常态。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy with the king as ceremonial head; multi-party coalition governance is the norm.

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等的"协商民主"社会，"圩田模式"强调共识决策，中产阶级为社会基础。
socialStructure.en: A highly egalitarian 'consociational democracy' with the 'Polder Model' emphasizing consensus-based decision-making and a middle-class foundation.

rulingClass.zh: 联合内阁、议会多党联盟、王室、大型企业（ASML/Shell/Unilever）与社会伙伴组织。
rulingClass.en: Coalition cabinet, multi-party parliamentary alliance, the royal house, major corporations (ASML/Shell/Unilever), and social partner organizations.

succession.zh: 首相由议会多数联盟协商产生，无固定任期。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: The prime minister emerges from parliamentary coalition negotiations with no fixed term. The monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 两院制议会：众议院（150席）与参议院（75席）。多党联合执政为常态，共识政治传统深厚。
structure.en: Bicameral parliament: House of Representatives (150 seats) and Senate (75 seats). Multi-party coalition governance is the norm, with deep consensus politics tradition.

name.en: Ministry of Economic Affairs and Climate Policy

function.zh: 负责经济政策、ASML等战略企业保护、创新与数字经济。
function.en: Responsible for economic policy, protection of strategic companies like ASML, innovation, and digital economy.

function.zh: 领导荷兰武装力量与北约防务义务。
function.en: Leads Dutch Armed Forces and NATO defense obligations.

localAdmin.zh: 12个省与342个市镇构成地方治理体系，地方政府在空间规划和社会服务方面拥有重要权限。
localAdmin.en: 12 provinces and 342 municipalities form the local governance system, with local governments holding significant authority in spatial planning and social services.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以《民法典》为基础，国际法具有直接适用效力。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the Civil Code, with international law having direct applicability.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（累进制最高49.5%）、增值税（21%）、公司税（25.8%）为主，对企业有创新箱税收优惠（9%）。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on progressive income tax (up to 49.5%), VAT (21%), corporate tax (25.8%), with an innovation box tax incentive (9%) for businesses.

religion.zh: 无宗教信仰者占多数（约55%），天主教（约20%）与新教（约15%）次之，穆斯林约5%
religion.en: Non-religious majority (~55%), Catholic (~20%) and Protestant (~15%) next, Muslim approximately 5%

philosophy.zh: 宽容传统悠久（斯宾诺莎、伊拉斯谟），商业实用主义与社会自由主义并重，"圩田模式"共识文化。
philosophy.en: Long tradition of tolerance (Spinoza, Erasmus), balancing commercial pragmatism with social liberalism, 'Polder Model' consensus culture.

culturalAchievements.zh: 荷兰黄金时代绘画（伦勃朗、维米尔）、ASML全球光刻技术垄断、DJ文化、郁金香与风车文化符号、建筑设计创新。
culturalAchievements.en: Dutch Golden Age painting (Rembrandt, Vermeer), ASML's global lithography monopoly, DJ culture, tulips and windmills as cultural icons, architectural design innovation.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（荷兰语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (Dutch as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 人均GDP欧洲前列，ASML（全球唯一EUV光刻机供应商）使荷兰成为全球AI芯片供应链的绝对咽喉。物流与贸易枢纽地位稳固。
gdpDescription.en: Per capita GDP among Europe's highest; ASML (sole global EUV lithography supplier) makes the Netherlands an absolute chokepoint in the global AI chip supply chain. Logistics and trade hub status remains solid.

mainIndustries.zh: 半导体设备（ASML）、物流与港口（鹿特丹）、农业科技、化工（帝斯曼）、金融、在线旅游（Booking.com）
mainIndustries.en: Semiconductor equipment (ASML), logistics and ports (Rotterdam), agritech, chemicals (DSM), finance, online travel (Booking.com)

tradeGoods.zh: ASML光刻机（AI芯片制造必需）、花卉、化工产品、农产品、石油炼制品、数字服务
tradeGoods.en: ASML lithography machines (essential for AI chip manufacturing), flowers, chemical products, agricultural goods, refined petroleum, digital services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平在欧洲处于中上水平，住房市场高度紧张，房价长期上涨。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth at upper-middle level in Europe, with an extremely tight housing market and persistently rising prices.

tradeRoutes.zh: 鹿特丹港为欧洲最大港口，荷兰是欧洲贸易枢纽，对德美中贸易密切。ASML光刻机出口受美国芯片禁令影响。
tradeRoutes.en: Rotterdam, Europe's largest port, makes the Netherlands a European trade hub, with close trade ties to Germany, the US, and China. ASML lithography exports affected by US chip restrictions.

economicSystem.zh: 开放型市场经济，"圩田模式"劳资协商机制，政府对战略企业（ASML）提供保护性政策。
economicSystem.en: Open market economy with the 'Polder Model' labor-employer consultation mechanism, government providing protective policies for strategic companies (ASML).

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况良好，公共债务低于欧盟平均水平，ASML带来的税收增长显著。
treasuryDescription.en: Healthy fiscal position with public debt below the EU average; ASML-driven tax revenue growth is significant.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的48%，财政状况在欧元区属于优良。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 48% of GDP, with a strong fiscal position by Eurozone standards.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理，看守内阁期间维持稳定政策，对ASML等战略企业提供税收优惠与研发支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management; caretaker cabinet maintains stable policies; provides tax incentives and R&D support for strategic companies like ASML.

description.zh: 参与北约快速反应部队，与德国陆军深度一体化合作。
description.en: Participates in NATO Rapid Reaction Force, with deep integration cooperation with the German Army.

description.zh: 以护卫舰和两栖舰为主力，保护海上贸易路线。
description.en: Frigates and amphibious ships as main assets, protecting maritime trade routes.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王威廉-亚历山大（名义），首相（实际）

technology.zh: F-35战斗机采购计划、德荷军事一体化、参与北约网络防御中心，对ASML实施国家安全保护措施。
technology.en: F-35 procurement program, Dutch-German military integration, participation in NATO Cyber Defense Centre, national security protection measures for ASML.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯混合战威胁、网络攻击、ASML技术泄露风险为核心安全关切。
threats.en: Russian hybrid warfare threats, cyber attacks, and ASML technology leak risks are core security concerns.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，向乌克兰提供F-16战斗机（2024年交付计划）及弹药援助。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; providing F-16 fighters (2024 delivery planned) and ammunition aid to Ukraine.

populationDescription.zh: 人口密度欧洲最高之一，高度城市化国家，移民与住房问题为政治焦点。
populationDescription.en: Among the highest population densities in Europe, highly urbanized; immigration and housing are political focal points.

ethnicGroups.zh: 荷兰裔为主（约76%），土耳其裔（约2.5%）、摩洛哥裔（约2.5%）、苏里南裔及其他移民群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Dutch (~76%), Turkish-origin (~2.5%), Moroccan-origin (~2.5%), Surinamese-origin, and other immigrant groups

socialClasses.zh: 平等主义传统强，中产阶级比例高，但ASML等高科技企业员工与普通劳动者收入差距扩大。
socialClasses.en: Strong egalitarian tradition with high middle-class proportion, but income gap widening between employees at high-tech firms like ASML and ordinary workers.

allies.zh: 欧盟创始成员国、北约盟国、比荷卢联盟、与美国密切合作（芯片出口管制协调）。
allies.en: EU founding member, NATO ally, Benelux union, close cooperation with the US (chip export control coordination).

enemies.zh: 与俄罗斯因MH17事件（2014年）及乌克兰战争长期对立。
enemies.en: Long-standing confrontation with Russia over MH17 (2014) and the Ukraine war.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、比荷卢联盟、ASML对华出口管制协议（与美日协调）。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Benelux union, ASML China export restriction agreement (coordinated with US and Japan).

foreignPolicy.zh: 以规则为基础的国际秩序倡导者，配合美国对华芯片出口限制（限制ASML对华销售先进光刻机），支援乌克兰。
foreignPolicy.en: Advocate for rules-based international order, coordinating with the US on chip export restrictions to China (limiting ASML's advanced lithography sales to China), supporting Ukraine.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年实施ASML对华先进光刻机出口限制，吕特政府因移民政策分歧辞职，大选后政治格局重组中。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Implemented ASML's advanced lithography export restrictions to China in 2023, Rutte government resigned over immigration policy disagreements, political landscape restructuring after elections.

era.en: Critical node in AI chip supply chain

keyInnovations.zh: ASML极紫外光刻技术（EUV，全球唯一供应商，AI芯片制造的绝对基础）、水利工程、农业科技、Booking.com平台技术。
keyInnovations.en: ASML extreme ultraviolet lithography (EUV, sole global supplier, absolute foundation of AI chip manufacturing), hydraulic engineering, agritech, Booking.com platform technology.

infrastructure.zh: 鹿特丹港（欧洲最大）、史基浦机场（欧洲枢纽）、埃因霍温高科技园区（ASML/飞利浦/NXP集群）、AMS-IX互联网交换中心。
infrastructure.en: Port of Rotterdam (Europe's largest), Schiphol Airport (European hub), Eindhoven High Tech Campus (ASML/Philips/NXP cluster), AMS-IX internet exchange.

policy.zh: 荷兰AI战略聚焦于ASML作为AI芯片供应链咽喉的保护、AI伦理研究与公共部门AI应用推广。
policy.en: Dutch AI strategy focuses on protecting ASML as the AI chip supply chain chokepoint, AI ethics research, and promoting AI applications in the public sector.

regulatoryStance.zh: 支持欧盟AI法案框架，同时保护ASML等战略企业的创新自由度，强调数据隐私与AI伦理。
regulatoryStance.en: Supports the EU AI Act framework while protecting innovation freedom for strategic companies like ASML, emphasizing data privacy and AI ethics.

investmentScale.zh: 2023年荷兰AI投资约10亿欧元，ASML年研发投入超40亿欧元（含AI辅助光刻技术研发）。
investmentScale.en: Dutch AI investment approximately €1 billion in 2023; ASML's annual R&D spending exceeds €4 billion (including AI-assisted lithography R&D).

capabilities.zh: 利用AI优化光刻精度、产能和良率，是先进芯片制造不可或缺的技术。
capabilities.en: Uses AI to optimize lithography precision, throughput, and yield—an indispensable technology for advanced chip manufacturing.

valuation.zh: 市值超3000亿美元，全球唯一EUV光刻机供应商
valuation.en: Market cap over $300 billion, sole global EUV lithography supplier

keyProducts.zh: EUV光刻机（全球AI芯片制造的唯一供应商）、DUV光刻系统
keyProducts.en: EUV lithography machines (sole supplier for global AI chip manufacturing), DUV lithography systems

valuation.en: Booking Holdings market cap approximately $120 billion

keyProducts.zh: AI旅行推荐与动态定价、AI客服聊天机器人
keyProducts.en: AI travel recommendations and dynamic pricing, AI customer service chatbot

keyProducts.zh: AI地图引擎、自动驾驶高精地图
keyProducts.en: AI mapping engine, high-definition maps for autonomous driving

contribution.zh: 领导ASML成为全球AI芯片供应链最关键企业，EUV光刻技术是所有先进AI芯片（NVIDIA/Apple/AMD）的制造基础。
contribution.en: Led ASML to become the most critical company in the global AI chip supply chain; EUV lithography is the manufacturing foundation for all advanced AI chips (NVIDIA/Apple/AMD).

researchFocus.zh: 半导体光刻AI优化、AI伦理与公平性研究、自动驾驶地图、推荐系统、荷兰语NLP。
researchFocus.en: Semiconductor lithography AI optimization, AI ethics and fairness research, autonomous driving maps, recommendation systems, Dutch NLP.

computeInfrastructure.zh: SURF国家超算服务、阿姆斯特丹与法兰克福间数据中心走廊、AMS-IX全球互联网核心交换节点。
computeInfrastructure.en: SURF national supercomputing services, Amsterdam-Frankfurt data center corridor, AMS-IX global internet core exchange node.

talentPool.zh: 代尔夫特理工、阿姆斯特丹大学、埃因霍温理工培养半导体与AI人才，ASML为欧洲最大科技雇主之一。
talentPool.en: TU Delft, University of Amsterdam, TU Eindhoven produce semiconductor and AI talent; ASML is one of Europe's largest tech employers.

globalRanking.zh: AI芯片供应链全球第一（ASML无可替代），AI应用研发全球约第12-15位
globalRanking.en: No. 1 in global AI chip supply chain (ASML irreplaceable), AI application R&D approximately 12th-15th globally

outlook.zh: ASML的EUV垄断使荷兰在AI时代拥有超越国家体量的战略重要性，但地缘政治压力（中美芯片战）日益加大。
outlook.en: ASML's EUV monopoly gives the Netherlands strategic importance in the AI era far beyond its national size, but geopolitical pressure (US-China chip war) is intensifying.

strengths.zh: ASML全球EUV光刻垄断（AI芯片制造咽喉）、贸易物流枢纽、高人均GDP、财政健康、高教育水平。
strengths.en: ASML's global EUV lithography monopoly (AI chip manufacturing chokepoint), trade logistics hub, high per capita GDP, healthy finances, high education levels.

weaknesses.zh: 国土面积小、住房危机、移民政策分歧导致政治不稳、ASML对华限制带来的外交压力。
weaknesses.en: Small national territory, housing crisis, political instability from immigration policy divisions, diplomatic pressure from ASML China restrictions.

outlook.zh: 荷兰因ASML而在AI芯片供应链中拥有不可替代的地位，但需在美中科技竞争中审慎导航外交平衡。
outlook.en: The Netherlands holds an irreplaceable position in the AI chip supply chain due to ASML, but must carefully navigate diplomatic balance amid US-China tech competition.

description.zh: 荷兰凭借ASML——全球唯一EUV光刻机供应商——在AI时代拥有远超其国家体量的战略地位。没有ASML的光刻机，NVIDIA、苹果、AMD等公司无法制造先进AI芯片。2023年荷兰在美国压力下限制ASML对华出口先进光刻设备，成为中美芯片战的关键节点。吕特政府因移民政策分歧辞职，看守内阁运作中。Booking.com和TomTom代表荷兰在AI应用领域的实力。
description.en: The Netherlands, through ASML—the world's sole EUV lithography supplier—holds strategic importance in the AI era far beyond its national size. Without ASML's lithography machines, NVIDIA, Apple, AMD and others cannot manufacture advanced AI chips. In 2023, the Netherlands restricted ASML's export of advanced lithography equipment to China under US pressure, becoming a key node in the US-China chip war. The Rutte government resigned over immigration policy disagreements; the caretaker cabinet operates. Booking.com and TomTom represent Dutch strength in AI applications.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦制议会制君主立宪国，语言社区（荷语/法语/德语）与地区（弗兰德/瓦隆/布鲁塞尔）构成复杂治理结构。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary constitutional monarchy with a complex governance structure of linguistic communities (Dutch/French/German) and regions (Flanders/Wallonia/Brussels).

socialStructure.zh: 以语言社区为分界的二元社会，弗兰德（荷语区）经济较发达，瓦隆（法语区）面临后工业化挑战。
socialStructure.en: A dual society divided along linguistic lines, with Flanders (Dutch-speaking) more economically developed and Wallonia (French-speaking) facing post-industrial challenges.

rulingClass.zh: 多党联合内阁、联邦与社区/地区双层议会、王室、欧盟机构驻比工作人员。
rulingClass.en: Multi-party coalition cabinet, dual-layer federal and community/regional parliaments, the royal house, EU institutional staff based in Belgium.

succession.zh: 首相由联邦议会多数联盟协商产生。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: The prime minister emerges from federal parliamentary coalition negotiations. The monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 联邦制，六个政府并存（联邦、弗兰德、瓦隆、布鲁塞尔首都、法语社区、德语社区），决策过程极为复杂。
structure.en: Federal system with six governments coexisting (federal, Flanders, Wallonia, Brussels-Capital, French Community, German-speaking Community), with extremely complex decision-making.

function.zh: 管理联邦经济政策与竞争法规，协调欧盟经济政策。
function.en: Manages federal economic policy and competition regulations, coordinates EU economic policy.

function.zh: 推进数字化转型、AI政策与电子政务。
function.en: Advances digital transformation, AI policy, and e-government.

localAdmin.zh: 三个地区（弗兰德/瓦隆/布鲁塞尔）和三个语言社区各有独立议会和政府，地方分权程度极高。
localAdmin.en: Three regions (Flanders/Wallonia/Brussels) and three linguistic communities each have independent parliaments and governments, with extremely high decentralization.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以《民法典》为基础，宪法法院行使合宪审查。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the Civil Code, with the Constitutional Court exercising constitutional review.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（累进制最高50%）、增值税（21%）、公司税（25%）为主，税负为欧洲最高之一。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on progressive income tax (up to 50%), VAT (21%), corporate tax (25%); among the highest tax burdens in Europe.

religion.zh: 天主教传统为主（约50%文化认同），世俗化程度高，穆斯林约8%
religion.en: Catholic tradition predominant (~50% cultural identification), highly secularized, Muslim approximately 8%

philosophy.zh: 超现实主义（马格利特）、欧洲联邦主义理想的实践地，多元文化共存的协商传统。
philosophy.en: Surrealism (Magritte), a proving ground for European federalist ideals, with a tradition of multicultural coexistence through negotiation.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（荷兰语/法语/德语三种官方语言）

culturalAchievements.zh: 比利时巧克力与啤酒文化、漫画传统（丁丁历险记/蓝精灵）、布鲁塞尔作为欧盟总部的全球政治文化影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Belgian chocolate and beer culture, comic tradition (Tintin/The Smurfs), Brussels' global political-cultural influence as EU headquarters.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（荷兰语日耳曼语族/法语罗曼语族/德语日耳曼语族）

gdpDescription.zh: 高度开放的小型经济体，布鲁塞尔作为欧盟总部带来大量国际组织经济活动，安特卫普为全球钻石与港口贸易中心。
gdpDescription.en: A highly open small economy; Brussels as EU headquarters generates significant international organization economic activity; Antwerp is a global diamond and port trading center.

mainIndustries.zh: 化工与制药（UCB/杨森）、钻石贸易（安特卫普）、物流与港口、巧克力与啤酒、欧盟机构经济
mainIndustries.en: Chemicals and pharmaceuticals (UCB/Janssen), diamond trade (Antwerp), logistics and ports, chocolate and beer, EU institutional economy

tradeGoods.zh: 药品、化工品、钻石、巧克力、啤酒、机械设备
tradeGoods.en: Pharmaceuticals, chemicals, diamonds, chocolate, beer, machinery

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平在欧洲中上，住房自有率较高（约70%），但税负沉重。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth at upper-middle level in Europe, relatively high homeownership (~70%), but heavy tax burden.

tradeRoutes.zh: 比利时是欧洲贸易十字路口，安特卫普为欧洲第二大港口，与德法荷英贸易紧密。
tradeRoutes.en: Belgium is a European trade crossroads; Antwerp is Europe's second-largest port, with close trade ties to Germany, France, the Netherlands, and the UK.

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济，强大的工会力量与社会对话机制，高福利高税负模式。
economicSystem.en: Social market economy with strong trade union presence and social dialogue mechanism, high welfare-high tax model.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公共债务较高但处于可控水平，复杂的联邦财政转移制度协调弗兰德与瓦隆之间的经济差距。
treasuryDescription.en: Public debt is high but manageable; a complex federal fiscal transfer system coordinates the economic gap between Flanders and Wallonia.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 105% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 高税高支出的福利国家模式，联邦体制下财政协调困难，改革推进缓慢。
fiscalPolicy.en: High-tax, high-spending welfare state model; fiscal coordination is difficult under the federal system, with reforms progressing slowly.

description.zh: 参与北约部署与联合国维和任务。
description.en: Participates in NATO deployments and UN peacekeeping missions.

description.zh: 配备F-16战斗机，计划更换为F-35。
description.en: Equipped with F-16 fighters, planning transition to F-35s.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王菲利普（名义），首相（实际）

technology.zh: F-16战斗机（计划过渡至F-35）、参与北约联合防御体系，布鲁塞尔为北约总部所在地。
technology.en: F-16 fighters (transitioning to F-35), participation in NATO joint defense; Brussels hosts NATO headquarters.

threats.zh: 恐怖主义（2016年布鲁塞尔爆炸案阴影）、网络安全、北约防务义务压力。
threats.en: Terrorism (shadow of 2016 Brussels bombings), cybersecurity, NATO defense obligation pressures.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，参与北约集体防御与反恐行动。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; participates in NATO collective defense and counter-terrorism operations.

populationDescription.zh: 人口密度高，荷语区（弗兰德约600万）与法语区（瓦隆约360万）及布鲁塞尔（约120万）三大社区。
populationDescription.en: High population density, with three major communities: Dutch-speaking Flanders (~6M), French-speaking Wallonia (~3.6M), and Brussels (~1.2M).

ethnicGroups.zh: 弗拉芒人（约58%）、瓦隆人（约31%）、布鲁塞尔国际社区及移民群体
ethnicGroups.en: Flemish (~58%), Walloon (~31%), Brussels international community, and immigrant groups

socialClasses.zh: 福利国家制度下阶层差距较小，但弗兰德与瓦隆经济发展差距反映在社会结构中。
socialClasses.en: Relatively small class gaps under the welfare state, but the Flanders-Wallonia economic development gap is reflected in social structure.

allies.zh: 欧盟创始成员国（布鲁塞尔为欧盟与北约双总部）、比荷卢联盟、北约核心成员。
allies.en: EU founding member (Brussels hosts both EU and NATO headquarters), Benelux union, core NATO member.

enemies.zh: 无直接敌对国家，但面临恐怖主义威胁。
enemies.en: No directly hostile nations, but faces terrorism threats.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、比荷卢联盟条约，布鲁塞尔作为欧盟立法所在地直接参与AI法案制定。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Benelux union treaty; Brussels as seat of EU legislation directly participates in AI Act formulation.

foreignPolicy.zh: 坚定的欧洲一体化支持者和多边主义倡导者，以布鲁塞尔欧盟/北约双总部地位发挥超越国家体量的外交影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Firm supporter of European integration and multilateralism, leveraging Brussels' dual EU/NATO headquarters status for diplomatic influence beyond its national size.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年布鲁塞尔作为欧盟AI法案谈判地见证全球首部综合性AI法规通过三方协商最终阶段。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: In 2023, Brussels as the EU AI Act negotiation venue witnessed the final trilogue stage of the world's first comprehensive AI regulation.

keyInnovations.zh: 欧盟AI法案制定地、IMEC半导体研究中心（纳米电子学全球领先）、制药创新。
keyInnovations.en: EU AI Act formulation site, IMEC semiconductor research center (global leader in nanoelectronics), pharmaceutical innovation.

infrastructure.zh: 布鲁塞尔为欧盟与北约双总部、安特卫普港欧洲第二大、IMEC研发基础设施世界领先。
infrastructure.en: Brussels as dual EU and NATO headquarters, Antwerp as Europe's second-largest port, IMEC R&D infrastructure world-leading.

policy.zh: 比利时AI战略主要通过欧盟框架实施，布鲁塞尔作为欧盟AI法案制定地具有独特政策影响力。IMEC是全球半导体研发核心。
policy.en: Belgian AI strategy is primarily implemented through the EU framework; Brussels has unique policy influence as the EU AI Act formulation site. IMEC is a global semiconductor R&D core.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，强调AI伦理与透明度，联邦制下各社区也推进各自的数字化政策。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework, emphasizing AI ethics and transparency; under federalism, each community also advances its own digital policies.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资规模较小，但IMEC年研发投入超8亿欧元在纳米技术与半导体AI领域居全球前列。
investmentScale.en: Small AI-specific investment, but IMEC's annual R&D spending exceeding €800 million ranks globally in nanotechnology and semiconductor AI.

valuation.zh: 非营利研究机构，年预算超8亿欧元
valuation.en: Non-profit research institute, annual budget over €800 million

keyProducts.zh: 纳米电子学与芯片技术研发，为全球芯片巨头提供前沿工艺研究
keyProducts.en: Nanoelectronics and chip technology R&D, providing frontier process research for global chip giants

researchFocus.zh: 纳米电子学（IMEC）、AI芯片制造工艺、AI伦理与治理（欧盟框架）。
researchFocus.en: Nanoelectronics (IMEC), AI chip manufacturing processes, AI ethics and governance (EU framework).

computeInfrastructure.zh: IMEC纳米电子学研究设施全球领先，比利时国家超算中心提供研究算力支持。
computeInfrastructure.en: IMEC nanoelectronics research facilities are world-leading; Belgian national supercomputing center provides research compute support.

talentPool.zh: 鲁汶大学（KU Leuven）为欧洲顶尖研究型大学，IMEC吸引全球半导体人才。
talentPool.en: KU Leuven is a top European research university; IMEC attracts global semiconductor talent.

globalRanking.zh: AI应用层面较弱，但IMEC在芯片制造研发领域具全球影响力
globalRanking.en: Weak in AI application, but IMEC has global influence in chip manufacturing R&D

outlook.zh: 比利时在AI领域主要通过IMEC和欧盟政策枢纽地位发挥影响力，AI应用层面仍有待发展。
outlook.en: Belgium exerts AI influence mainly through IMEC and its EU policy hub status; AI application development still needs growth.

strengths.zh: 欧盟与北约双总部、IMEC全球半导体研发领先、地理枢纽位置、高教育水平。
strengths.en: Dual EU and NATO headquarters, IMEC global semiconductor R&D leadership, geographic hub location, high education levels.

weaknesses.zh: 复杂联邦体制导致决策低效、高税负、弗兰德与瓦隆分裂张力、公共债务高。
weaknesses.en: Complex federal system causing decision-making inefficiency, high tax burden, Flanders-Wallonia division tensions, high public debt.

outlook.zh: 比利时凭借布鲁塞尔的欧盟政策制定者地位和IMEC的芯片研发能力在AI时代发挥独特但有限的影响力。
outlook.en: Belgium leverages Brussels' EU policymaker status and IMEC's chip R&D capability to exert unique but limited influence in the AI era.

description.zh: 比利时作为欧盟与北约双总部所在国，在AI时代以政策枢纽角色发挥超越国家体量的影响力。布鲁塞尔是欧盟AI法案的制定地，IMEC（鲁汶）是全球纳米电子学与芯片制造工艺研发的核心机构。国内复杂的联邦制（荷语区/法语区/德语区三社区并存）增加治理难度，但高教育水平和地理枢纽位置支撑经济韧性。
description.en: Belgium, as host of both EU and NATO headquarters, exerts influence beyond its national size through its policy hub role in the AI era. Brussels is where the EU AI Act was formulated; IMEC (Leuven) is a core global institution for nanoelectronics and chip manufacturing R&D. The complex federal system (Dutch/French/German-speaking communities) adds governance difficulty, but high education levels and geographic hub location support economic resilience.

ruler.zh: 联邦委员会（七人集体领导）

dynasty.zh: 多党协商制（魔法公式联合执政）

governmentForm.zh: 联邦制直接民主共和国，七名联邦委员集体行使行政权，公民可通过公投直接参与立法。
governmentForm.en: Federal direct democratic republic where seven Federal Council members collectively exercise executive power, with citizens directly participating in legislation through referendums.

socialStructure.zh: 高度稳定的中产阶级社会，四语区（德/法/意/罗曼什）和平共存，直接民主传统深厚。
socialStructure.en: A highly stable middle-class society with four linguistic regions (German/French/Italian/Romansh) coexisting peacefully, with deep direct democracy traditions.

rulingClass.zh: 联邦委员会（四大党"魔法公式"分配）、州政府、金融精英与制药企业领袖。
rulingClass.en: Federal Council ('Magic Formula' distribution among four major parties), cantonal governments, financial elites, and pharmaceutical corporate leaders.

succession.zh: 联邦委员由联邦议会选举产生，任期四年。联邦主席由委员轮流担任，任期一年。
succession.en: Federal Council members are elected by the Federal Assembly for four-year terms. The Federal President rotates among members for a one-year term.

structure.zh: 联邦制，26个州拥有广泛自治权。两院制联邦议会（国民院200席/联邦院46席）。直接民主制度允许公民发起全民公投。
structure.en: Federal system with 26 cantons enjoying extensive autonomy. Bicameral Federal Assembly (National Council 200 seats / Council of States 46 seats). Direct democracy allows citizens to initiate referendums.

name.zh: 联邦经济、教育与研究部
name.en: Federal Department of Economic Affairs, Education and Research

function.zh: 管理经济政策、高等教育（ETH体系）与创新研发。
function.en: Manages economic policy, higher education (ETH system), and innovation R&D.

localAdmin.zh: 26个州各有宪法、议会与政府，直接民主传统下公民对地方事务拥有广泛参与权。
localAdmin.en: Each of 26 cantons has its own constitution, parliament, and government, with citizens holding extensive participation rights in local affairs under the direct democracy tradition.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，受法德法律传统影响，联邦法院为最高司法机构。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system influenced by French and German legal traditions; the Federal Supreme Court is the highest judicial body.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦与州两级征税，各州税率差异大（低税州如楚格吸引大量企业），联邦增值税仅8.1%。
taxationSystem.en: Dual federal and cantonal taxation with large interstate rate variations (low-tax cantons like Zug attract many companies); federal VAT only 8.1%.

religion.zh: 天主教（约35%）与新教（约23%）为主，无宗教信仰者约30%
religion.en: Catholic (~35%) and Protestant (~23%) predominant, non-religious approximately 30%

philosophy.zh: 永久中立传统、直接民主理想、多元文化共存模式，当代以隐私保护与金融自由闻名。
philosophy.en: Permanent neutrality tradition, direct democracy ideals, multicultural coexistence model; contemporarily known for privacy protection and financial freedom.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（德语/法语/意大利语/罗曼什语四种官方语言）

culturalAchievements.zh: 钟表工艺、ETH苏黎世科学传统（爱因斯坦母校）、瑞士银行文化、CERN粒子物理研究、日内瓦国际组织集群。
culturalAchievements.en: Watchmaking craftsmanship, ETH Zurich scientific tradition (Einstein's alma mater), Swiss banking culture, CERN particle physics, Geneva international organization cluster.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（德语日耳曼语族/法语罗曼语族/意大利语罗曼语族/罗曼什语罗曼语族）

gdpDescription.zh: 全球人均GDP最高国家之一，金融、制药与精密制造为经济支柱。永久中立国地位与低税环境吸引全球企业总部。
gdpDescription.en: Among the world's highest per capita GDP countries, with finance, pharmaceuticals, and precision manufacturing as economic pillars. Permanent neutrality and low-tax environment attract global corporate headquarters.

mainIndustries.zh: 金融与银行、制药（罗氏/诺华）、精密制造与钟表、食品（雀巢）、大宗商品贸易、AI研究
mainIndustries.en: Finance and banking, pharmaceuticals (Roche/Novartis), precision manufacturing and watches, food (Nestlé), commodity trading, AI research

tradeGoods.zh: 药品、钟表、金融服务、化学品、精密仪器、咖啡（雀巢）
tradeGoods.en: Pharmaceuticals, watches, financial services, chemicals, precision instruments, coffee (Nestlé)

householdWealth.zh: 全球家庭财富中位数最高国家之一（约17万美元），但物价与房价极高。
householdWealth.en: Among the highest median household wealth globally (~$170,000), but extremely high prices and rents.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与欧盟通过双边协议维持紧密贸易关系（非成员国），全球金融中心地位辐射全球。
tradeRoutes.en: Maintains close trade relations with the EU through bilateral agreements (non-member), with global financial center status radiating worldwide.

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济，低税率、低监管与高质量公共服务并存，"瑞士模式"以稳定与精密著称。
economicSystem.en: Free market economy with low taxes, light regulation, and high-quality public services coexisting; the 'Swiss Model' is known for stability and precision.

treasuryDescription.zh: 瑞士国家银行持有大量外汇储备，财政状况极为健康，"债务刹车"机制确保预算长期平衡。
treasuryDescription.en: The Swiss National Bank holds large foreign exchange reserves; the fiscal situation is extremely healthy; the 'debt brake' mechanism ensures long-term budget balance.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的38%，在发达国家中极低。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 38% of GDP, extremely low among developed nations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 保守审慎的财政政策，"债务刹车"宪法条款保障长期财政可持续性。
fiscalPolicy.en: Conservative and prudent fiscal policy; the constitutional 'debt brake' ensures long-term fiscal sustainability.

description.zh: 以民兵制为基础的国土防御力量，全民皆兵传统。
description.en: Militia-based homeland defense force with a tradition of universal military service.

description.zh: 配备F/A-18战斗机，已决定采购F-35A。
description.en: Equipped with F/A-18 fighters, with F-35A procurement decided.

technology.zh: F/A-18战斗机（即将换装F-35A）、民兵制国土防御体系、先进防空系统、永久中立国军事地位。
technology.en: F/A-18 fighters (transitioning to F-35A), militia-based homeland defense, advanced air defense, permanent neutrality military posture.

threats.zh: 永久中立国面临的威胁较低，主要关注网络安全与国际金融制裁合规压力。
threats.en: Low threats as a permanent neutral; main concerns are cybersecurity and international financial sanctions compliance pressure.

recentBattles.zh: 无作战行动，保持永久中立。2022年因俄乌战争首次对俄实施制裁，引发中立传统争议。
recentBattles.en: No combat operations; maintains permanent neutrality. First imposed sanctions on Russia in 2022 over the Ukraine war, sparking controversy over neutrality tradition.

populationDescription.zh: 多语多文化的小型国家，外国人口比例高达约25%，四语区和平共处为典范。
populationDescription.en: A small multilingual, multicultural nation with foreign population at approximately 25%; four linguistic regions coexisting peacefully serve as a model.

ethnicGroups.zh: 德语区（约63%）、法语区（约23%）、意大利语区（约8%）、罗曼什语区（约0.5%），外国居民约25%
ethnicGroups.en: German-speaking (~63%), French-speaking (~23%), Italian-speaking (~8%), Romansh-speaking (~0.5%), foreign residents approximately 25%

socialClasses.zh: 高度富裕的平等社会，职业教育体系保障社会流动性，但高物价限制低收入群体生活质量。
socialClasses.en: A highly affluent egalitarian society; the vocational education system ensures social mobility, but high prices limit quality of life for lower-income groups.

allies.zh: 与欧盟保持双边协议（非成员国）、联合国/国际组织所在地（日内瓦）、与北约合作但不加入。
allies.en: Maintains bilateral agreements with the EU (non-member), host of UN/international organizations (Geneva), cooperates with but does not join NATO.

enemies.zh: 永久中立国，无正式敌对关系，但对俄制裁引发外交压力。
enemies.en: Permanent neutral with no formal hostile relations, but Russia sanctions have created diplomatic pressure.

treaties.zh: 与欧盟的120余项双边协议、WTO、联合国（日内瓦总部所在国）。
treaties.en: 120+ bilateral agreements with the EU, WTO, United Nations (host of Geneva headquarters).

foreignPolicy.zh: 永久中立、多边主义、日内瓦国际组织中心地位维护、与欧盟关系管理。
foreignPolicy.en: Permanent neutrality, multilateralism, maintaining Geneva's international organization center status, managing EU relations.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年瑞士-欧盟关系谈判重启，对俄制裁与中立传统的紧张关系持续。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Swiss-EU relations negotiations restarted in 2023; tensions between Russia sanctions and neutrality tradition continue.

era.zh: 精密科技与基础研究前沿
era.en: Precision technology and fundamental research frontier

keyInnovations.zh: ETH苏黎世AI研究、CERN粒子物理（万维网诞生地）、制药AI（罗氏/诺华）、精密制造、金融科技。
keyInnovations.en: ETH Zurich AI research, CERN particle physics (birthplace of the World Wide Web), pharmaceutical AI (Roche/Novartis), precision manufacturing, fintech.

infrastructure.zh: ETH苏黎世/洛桑（EPFL）双联邦理工体系、CERN大型强子对撞机、高效铁路网络、全球金融基础设施。
infrastructure.en: ETH Zurich/EPFL dual federal institute system, CERN Large Hadron Collider, efficient rail network, global financial infrastructure.

policy.zh: 瑞士AI战略聚焦基础研究（ETH/EPFL）与制药AI应用，未加入欧盟AI法案但关注国际AI治理标准制定。
policy.en: Swiss AI strategy focuses on fundamental research (ETH/EPFL) and pharmaceutical AI applications; not part of the EU AI Act but attentive to international AI governance standard-setting.

regulatoryStance.zh: 轻监管、亲创新立场，不受欧盟AI法案直接约束，但密切关注并考虑兼容性。
regulatoryStance.en: Light-regulation, pro-innovation stance; not directly bound by the EU AI Act but closely monitoring and considering compatibility.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模适中，但ETH/EPFL研究经费充沛，罗氏和诺华在AI制药研发投入巨大。
investmentScale.en: Moderate AI investment scale, but ample research funding at ETH/EPFL; Roche and Novartis invest heavily in AI pharmaceutical R&D.

capabilities.zh: 基础大语言模型研究与高效训练方法探索，学术影响力显著。
capabilities.en: Fundamental LLM research and efficient training methodology exploration, with significant academic influence.

valuation.zh: 罗氏集团市值约2200亿美元
valuation.en: Roche Group market cap approximately $220 billion

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的药物发现与精准医疗平台
keyProducts.en: AI-driven drug discovery and precision medicine platforms

keyProducts.zh: AI加速临床试验与药物开发
keyProducts.en: AI-accelerated clinical trials and drug development

contribution.zh: 领导ETH AI研究中心，推进机器学习基础研究与跨学科AI应用。
contribution.en: Leads ETH AI Center, advancing fundamental machine learning research and cross-disciplinary AI applications.

researchFocus.zh: 大语言模型基础研究、AI制药与精准医疗、机器人学、计算机视觉、AI伦理。
researchFocus.en: Fundamental LLM research, AI pharmaceuticals and precision medicine, robotics, computer vision, AI ethics.

computeInfrastructure.zh: CSCS国家超算中心（瑞士国家科学基金会运营）、ETH/EPFL校内算力集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: CSCS National Supercomputing Centre (operated by Swiss National Science Foundation), ETH/EPFL campus compute clusters.

talentPool.zh: ETH苏黎世与EPFL洛桑为全球顶级理工院校，吸引国际AI研究人才；谷歌苏黎世为其欧洲最大研发中心。
talentPool.en: ETH Zurich and EPFL are among the world's top engineering schools, attracting international AI research talent; Google Zurich is its largest European R&D center.

globalRanking.zh: AI基础研究全球前列（人均论文产出极高），AI产业化约全球第12-15位
globalRanking.en: AI fundamental research among global leaders (extremely high per capita paper output), AI industrialization approximately 12th-15th globally

outlook.zh: 瑞士以ETH/EPFL基础研究和制药AI为核心优势，但市场规模小限制AI产业化发展。
outlook.en: Switzerland's core advantages are ETH/EPFL fundamental research and pharmaceutical AI, but small market size limits AI industrialization.

strengths.zh: ETH/EPFL世界级研究、制药巨头AI投入、超高人均GDP、财政健康、永久中立地位、国际组织集群。
strengths.en: World-class ETH/EPFL research, pharma giant AI investment, ultra-high per capita GDP, healthy finances, permanent neutrality, international organization cluster.

weaknesses.zh: 市场规模极小、非欧盟成员增加贸易摩擦、中立传统受制裁压力挑战、高物价抑制人才吸引力。
weaknesses.en: Extremely small market, non-EU membership increasing trade friction, neutrality tradition challenged by sanctions pressure, high prices dampening talent attraction.

outlook.zh: 瑞士在AI基础研究和制药AI领域保持精品定位，但难以产生大规模AI产业集群。
outlook.en: Switzerland maintains a boutique positioning in AI fundamental research and pharmaceutical AI, but is unlikely to generate large-scale AI industry clusters.

description.zh: 瑞士凭借ETH苏黎世和EPFL洛桑两所世界顶级理工院校在AI基础研究领域占据重要地位。罗氏和诺华两大制药巨头大力投入AI药物研发。CERN（万维网诞生地）持续推动粒子物理与计算技术前沿。永久中立国地位与低税环境吸引谷歌等科技巨头在苏黎世设立欧洲最大研发中心。2022年因俄乌战争首次对俄制裁，引发中立传统争议。
description.en: Switzerland holds an important position in AI fundamental research through ETH Zurich and EPFL, two of the world's top engineering schools. Pharma giants Roche and Novartis are investing heavily in AI drug discovery. CERN (birthplace of the World Wide Web) continues pushing frontiers of particle physics and computing. Permanent neutrality and low-tax environment attract tech giants like Google to establish their largest European R&D centers in Zurich. The first-ever sanctions on Russia in 2022 over the Ukraine war sparked controversy over the neutrality tradition.

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制共和国，总理领导内阁行使行政权，联邦总统为虚位元首。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary republic where the chancellor leads the cabinet in executive power, with the federal president as ceremonial head.

socialStructure.zh: 以社会伙伴制为特色的福利国家，劳资协商传统深厚，中产阶级社会稳定。
socialStructure.en: A welfare state characterized by social partnership, with deep labor-employer consultation traditions and a stable middle-class society.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、联邦议会多数联盟、社会伙伴组织（工商会/工会联盟）。
rulingClass.en: Chancellor and cabinet, National Council majority coalition, social partner organizations (Chamber of Commerce/Trade Union Federation).

succession.zh: 总理由联邦议会多数党领袖担任。联邦总统由直选产生，任期六年。
succession.en: The chancellor serves as leader of the National Council majority. The federal president is directly elected for a six-year term.

structure.zh: 联邦议会制，国民议会（183席）为主要立法机构，联邦议会代表九个州利益。
structure.en: Federal parliamentary system, with the National Council (183 seats) as the main legislature and the Federal Council representing nine states' interests.

name.en: Federal Ministry for Digital and Economic Affairs

function.zh: 负责数字经济、创新与AI政策协调。
function.en: Responsible for digital economy, innovation, and AI policy coordination.

localAdmin.zh: 九个联邦州各有州议会与州政府，维也纳同时为州与联邦首都。
localAdmin.en: Nine federal states each have state parliaments and governments; Vienna serves as both a state and the federal capital.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以《联邦宪法》为最高法律，宪法法院行使违宪审查。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with the Federal Constitution as supreme law; the Constitutional Court exercises judicial review.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高55%）、增值税（20%）、公司税（23%）为主，社会保障缴费较高。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to 55%), VAT (20%), corporate tax (23%), with relatively high social security contributions.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约55%），无宗教信仰者约26%，穆斯林约8%
religion.en: Catholic predominant (~55%), non-religious approximately 26%, Muslim approximately 8%

philosophy.zh: 维也纳学派逻辑实证主义、精神分析学（弗洛伊德）传统深厚，当代注重环保与社会和谐。
philosophy.en: Deep traditions of Vienna Circle logical positivism and psychoanalysis (Freud); contemporary focus on environmentalism and social harmony.

culturalAchievements.zh: 古典音乐之都（莫扎特/贝多芬/施特劳斯）、维也纳歌剧院、咖啡馆文化、精神分析学发源地、滑雪旅游。
culturalAchievements.en: Classical music capital (Mozart/Beethoven/Strauss), Vienna State Opera, café culture, birthplace of psychoanalysis, ski tourism.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（德语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (German as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 高度发达的小型开放经济体，旅游业、精密制造与服务业为支柱，与德国经济深度绑定。
gdpDescription.en: A highly developed small open economy with tourism, precision manufacturing, and services as pillars, deeply tied to the German economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、精密制造（钢铁/机械）、金融、能源、食品饮料（红牛）
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, precision manufacturing (steel/machinery), finance, energy, food and beverages (Red Bull)

tradeGoods.zh: 机械设备、钢铁制品、汽车零部件、药品、红牛饮料、旅游服务
tradeGoods.en: Machinery, steel products, automotive parts, pharmaceuticals, Red Bull, tourism services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平较高，社会福利保障完善，但房价上涨为维也纳居民主要关切。
householdWealth.en: High household wealth levels with comprehensive social welfare, but rising housing prices are a main concern for Vienna residents.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国贸易最为紧密，欧盟单一市场为核心，阿尔卑斯过境为南北欧贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: Closest trade ties with Germany, EU single market as core, Alpine transit serving as North-South European trade corridor.

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济，社会伙伴制下劳资关系稳定，国有企业在能源与基础设施领域仍有重要角色。
economicSystem.en: Social market economy with stable labor relations under social partnership; state enterprises still play important roles in energy and infrastructure.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公共债务可控，COVID后财政整顿进行中。
treasuryDescription.en: Public debt manageable; post-COVID fiscal consolidation underway.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 77% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 温和紧缩方向，力求在社会福利维持与财政整顿之间平衡。
fiscalPolicy.en: Moderately austerity-oriented, seeking balance between maintaining social welfare and fiscal consolidation.

description.zh: 保持永久中立国防御姿态，参与联合国维和任务。
description.en: Maintains permanent neutrality defense posture, participates in UN peacekeeping.

commanderInChief.zh: 联邦总统（名义），国防部长（实际）

technology.zh: 台风战斗机、参与欧洲联合防务项目，保持永久中立国军事定位。
technology.en: Eurofighter Typhoons, participation in European joint defense projects, maintaining permanent neutrality military posture.

threats.zh: 作为永久中立国威胁较低，主要关注网络安全与跨国犯罪。
threats.en: Low threats as a permanent neutral; main concerns are cybersecurity and transnational crime.

recentBattles.zh: 无作战行动，保持永久中立。参与联合国和欧盟维和行动。
recentBattles.en: No combat operations; maintains permanent neutrality. Participates in UN and EU peacekeeping.

populationDescription.zh: 人口增长依赖移民，维也纳为多元文化城市，老龄化趋势加剧。
populationDescription.en: Population growth relies on immigration; Vienna is a multicultural city; aging trend accelerating.

ethnicGroups.zh: 奥地利人为主（约88%），前南斯拉夫裔、土耳其裔及其他移民群体约12%
ethnicGroups.en: Austrian majority (~88%), former Yugoslav, Turkish-origin, and other immigrant groups approximately 12%

socialClasses.zh: 社会伙伴制保障社会稳定，中产阶级基础深厚，但移民融合与住房可负担性成为新挑战。
socialClasses.en: Social partnership ensures social stability with deep middle-class foundation, but immigrant integration and housing affordability are new challenges.

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国，与德国关系最为密切，保持永久中立（不加入北约）。
allies.en: EU member state, closest relations with Germany, maintaining permanent neutrality (not joining NATO).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌对关系，永久中立国。
enemies.en: No formal hostile relations; permanent neutral.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、联合国宪章，永久中立写入宪法。
treaties.en: EU treaties, UN Charter, permanent neutrality enshrined in constitution.

foreignPolicy.zh: 永久中立、欧洲一体化支持、维也纳作为国际组织驻地（联合国、OPEC、OSCE）。
foreignPolicy.en: Permanent neutrality, European integration support, Vienna as international organization host (UN, OPEC, OSCE).

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年维也纳继续作为国际外交舞台，内哈默政府在对乌立场上保持相对谨慎。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Vienna continued as an international diplomatic stage in 2023; the Nehammer government maintained relative caution on Ukraine stance.

keyInnovations.zh: 精密制造、红牛创新文化、维也纳科技大学研究、可再生能源技术。
keyInnovations.en: Precision manufacturing, Red Bull innovation culture, TU Wien research, renewable energy technology.

infrastructure.zh: 高效铁路网（ÖBB）、维也纳为联合国/OPEC/OSCE驻地、优质数字基础设施。
infrastructure.en: Efficient rail network (ÖBB), Vienna as UN/OPEC/OSCE host, quality digital infrastructure.

policy.zh: 奥地利AI战略"AIM AT 2030"投资约1亿欧元，聚焦AI应用于制造业、旅游业和公共服务。
policy.en: Austria's AI strategy 'AIM AT 2030' invests approximately €100 million, focusing on AI applications in manufacturing, tourism, and public services.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，强调AI伦理与数据保护。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework, emphasizing AI ethics and data protection.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模较小，约1亿欧元公共资金加上私营部门投资。
