investmentScale.en: Small AI investment scale, approximately €100 million in public funds plus private sector investment.

keyProducts.zh: 移动AI光学字符识别（OCR）技术
keyProducts.en: Mobile AI optical character recognition (OCR) technology

researchFocus.zh: AI制造应用、计算机视觉、自然语言处理（德语）、智慧旅游。
researchFocus.en: AI manufacturing applications, computer vision, NLP (German), smart tourism.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 维也纳科学计算集群（VSC）提供研究算力支持。
computeInfrastructure.en: Vienna Scientific Cluster (VSC) provides research compute support.

talentPool.zh: 维也纳科技大学、格拉茨科技大学培养AI人才，但规模有限。
talentPool.en: TU Wien, TU Graz produce AI talent, but at limited scale.

globalRanking.zh: AI领域影响力较小，全球约第25-30位

outlook.zh: 奥地利AI发展定位于细分领域应用（制造/旅游），难以在大模型竞赛中发挥影响力。
outlook.en: Austria's AI development is positioned in niche applications (manufacturing/tourism), unlikely to play a role in the LLM race.

strengths.zh: 高生活质量、维也纳国际组织集群、精密制造能力、旅游资源丰富、社会稳定。
strengths.en: High quality of life, Vienna's international organization cluster, precision manufacturing, rich tourism resources, social stability.

weaknesses.zh: 经济体量小、AI投资有限、与德国经济高度依赖、人口老龄化。
weaknesses.en: Small economy, limited AI investment, high dependence on German economy, population aging.

outlook.zh: 奥地利将继续发挥维也纳国际中心地位与高质量制造的优势，在AI领域专注利基应用。
outlook.en: Austria will continue leveraging Vienna's international center status and high-quality manufacturing, focusing on niche AI applications.

description.zh: 奥地利作为永久中立国和维也纳国际组织集群所在地，在AI时代保持稳定但影响力有限。内哈默总理领导的人民党-绿党政府推进"AIM AT 2030"AI战略。经济与德国深度绑定，精密制造和旅游业为支柱。维也纳持续发挥联合国、OPEC、OSCE等国际组织驻地的外交枢纽作用。
description.en: Austria, as a permanent neutral and host of Vienna's international organization cluster, remains stable but with limited influence in the AI era. Chancellor Nehammer's ÖVP-Greens government advances the 'AIM AT 2030' AI strategy. The economy is deeply tied to Germany, with precision manufacturing and tourism as pillars. Vienna continues its diplomatic hub role as host of the UN, OPEC, OSCE, and other international organizations.

dynasty.zh: 工人社会党联合政府（费利佩六世为君主）
dynasty.en: PSOE coalition government (Felipe VI as monarch)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，首相领导内阁，17个自治区拥有广泛自治权。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy with the PM leading the cabinet; 17 autonomous communities enjoy extensive self-governance.

socialStructure.zh: 地中海社会模式，家庭纽带紧密，青年失业率长期偏高，旅游业依赖性强。
socialStructure.en: Mediterranean social model with strong family ties, persistently high youth unemployment, and heavy tourism dependence.

rulingClass.zh: 首相与内阁、议会多党联盟、王室、自治区政府领袖、银行与旅游业精英。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, multi-party parliamentary alliance, the Crown, autonomous community leaders, banking and tourism elites.

succession.zh: 首相由议会多数投票产生。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: The PM is confirmed by parliamentary majority vote. The monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 议会制，众议院（350席）与参议院（265席）构成两院制。17个自治区和2个自治市各有议会与政府。
structure.en: Parliamentary system with the Congress (350 seats) and Senate (265 seats) forming a bicameral legislature. 17 autonomous communities and 2 autonomous cities each have parliaments and governments.

name.en: Ministry of Economic Affairs and Digital Transformation

function.zh: 负责经济政策、数字化转型与AI战略。
function.en: Responsible for economic policy, digital transformation, and AI strategy.

function.zh: 管理科研政策与创新资助。
function.en: Manages science policy and innovation funding.

localAdmin.zh: 17个自治区拥有广泛自治权（加泰罗尼亚/巴斯克地区自治权最大），8000余市镇构成基层治理。
localAdmin.en: 17 autonomous communities enjoy extensive self-governance (Catalonia/Basque Country with most autonomy), 8,000+ municipalities form grassroots governance.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1978年宪法为基础，宪法法院行使合宪审查。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1978 Constitution; the Constitutional Court exercises judicial review.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高47%）、增值税（21%）、公司税（25%）为主，各自治区有一定税率差异。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to 47%), VAT (21%), corporate tax (25%), with some variation across autonomous communities.

religion.zh: 天主教传统深厚（约55%认同），但世俗化趋势明显，无宗教者约35%
religion.en: Deep Catholic tradition (~55% identification), but strong secularization trend, non-religious approximately 35%

philosophy.zh: 天主教人文主义与启蒙理性主义传统，当代以社会自由主义与地区身份认同运动为特征。
philosophy.en: Catholic humanism and Enlightenment rationalism traditions; contemporary characteristics include social liberalism and regional identity movements.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语为主，加泰/巴斯克/加利西亚语为地方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish primary, Catalan/Basque/Galician as regional languages)

culturalAchievements.zh: 弗拉门戈、高迪建筑（圣家堂）、塞万提斯文学传统、毕加索/达利艺术、足球文化（巴萨/皇马）、地中海美食。
culturalAchievements.en: Flamenco, Gaudí architecture (Sagrada Família), Cervantes literary tradition, Picasso/Dalí art, football culture (Barça/Real Madrid), Mediterranean cuisine.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Spanish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 欧元区第四大经济体，旅游业强国（全球第二旅游目的地），可再生能源领先，但青年失业率仍偏高。2023年经济增长在欧元区表现突出。
gdpDescription.en: Fourth-largest Eurozone economy, tourism powerhouse (second most visited country globally), renewable energy leader, but youth unemployment remains high. 2023 economic growth was outstanding in the Eurozone.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、可再生能源、汽车制造、农业（橄榄油/葡萄酒）、金融、建筑
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, renewable energy, automotive manufacturing, agriculture (olive oil/wine), finance, construction

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车、食品饮料（橄榄油/葡萄酒）、旅游服务、化工品、机械
tradeGoods.en: Vehicles, food and beverages (olive oil/wine), tourism services, chemicals, machinery

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平中等，住房自有率较高（约76%），但2008年房地产危机影响犹存。
householdWealth.en: Moderate household wealth, relatively high homeownership (~76%), but effects of the 2008 real estate crisis linger.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟单一市场为核心，地中海贸易路线，与拉丁美洲保持密切经济文化纽带。
tradeRoutes.en: EU single market as core, Mediterranean trade routes, maintaining close economic and cultural ties with Latin America.

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济，政府在劳动力市场、住房与可再生能源领域积极干预。
economicSystem.en: Social market economy with government actively intervening in labor markets, housing, and renewable energy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 公共债务经2008年危机后大幅攀升，近年逐步下降但仍处高位。
treasuryDescription.en: Public debt surged after the 2008 crisis, gradually declining in recent years but still high.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 109% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 温和扩张性财政政策，利用欧盟复苏基金推动数字化与绿色转型投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Moderately expansionary fiscal policy, leveraging EU Recovery Funds for digital and green transition investment.

description.zh: 参与北约任务与联合国维和行动。
description.en: Participates in NATO missions and UN peacekeeping.

description.zh: 拥有胡安·卡洛斯一世号战略投射舰。
description.en: Possesses the Juan Carlos I strategic projection ship.

description.zh: 配备台风战斗机，参与欧洲未来战斗机（FCAS）项目。
description.en: Equipped with Eurofighter Typhoons, participating in the Future Combat Air System (FCAS) program.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王费利佩六世（名义），首相（实际）

technology.zh: 台风战斗机、参与FCAS六代机项目（与法德合作）、海军投射能力。
technology.en: Eurofighter Typhoons, participation in FCAS sixth-gen fighter program (with France and Germany), naval projection capability.

threats.zh: 地中海移民压力、直布罗陀争议、北非地缘不稳定、恐怖主义威胁。
threats.en: Mediterranean migration pressure, Gibraltar dispute, North African geopolitical instability, terrorism threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，参与北约集体防御与海上巡逻行动。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; participates in NATO collective defense and maritime patrol operations.

populationDescription.zh: 人口老龄化趋势严重，出生率欧洲最低之一，移民补充劳动力。加泰罗尼亚独立运动为政治焦点。
populationDescription.en: Severe population aging trend, among the lowest birth rates in Europe, immigration supplements labor force. Catalan independence movement is a political focal point.

ethnicGroups.zh: 西班牙人为主，加泰罗尼亚人、巴斯克人、加利西亚人等地区身份认同鲜明，拉美移民群体增长
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Spanish, with distinct regional identities (Catalan, Basque, Galician), growing Latin American immigrant community

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级在2008年危机中受创，青年失业率约28%，旅游城市与内陆地区发展差距大。
socialClasses.en: Middle class impacted by the 2008 crisis, youth unemployment approximately 28%, large development gap between tourist cities and inland regions.

allies.zh: 欧盟与北约成员国，与拉丁美洲国家保持密切联系，与葡萄牙关系紧密。
allies.en: EU and NATO member, maintaining close ties with Latin American nations, tight relationship with Portugal.

enemies.zh: 与摩洛哥因休达/梅利利亚主权存在紧张关系，直布罗陀争议与英国长期未决。
enemies.en: Tensions with Morocco over Ceuta/Melilla sovereignty, long-standing Gibraltar dispute with the UK.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、与拉美国家广泛双边协定。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, extensive bilateral agreements with Latin American nations.

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧洲一体化支持者，地中海安全关注，维护与拉美文化经济纽带。
foreignPolicy.en: European integration supporter, Mediterranean security focus, maintaining cultural and economic ties with Latin America.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年桑切斯成功组建新一届联合政府，与加泰罗尼亚独立派达成赦免协议引发争议。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Sánchez successfully formed a new coalition government in 2023; amnesty deal with Catalan independence leaders sparked controversy.

era.zh: 可再生能源与数字转型

keyInnovations.zh: 巴塞罗那超级计算中心（MareNostrum 5）、可再生能源技术（全球风电/光伏领先）、智慧城市。
keyInnovations.en: Barcelona Supercomputing Center (MareNostrum 5), renewable energy technology (global wind/solar leader), smart cities.

infrastructure.zh: 高速铁路网欧洲第二长、可再生能源装机量欧洲前列、巴塞罗那超算中心。
infrastructure.en: Second-longest high-speed rail network in Europe, among Europe's top renewable energy installed capacity, Barcelona Supercomputing Center.

policy.zh: 西班牙国家AI战略（ENIA）投资6亿欧元，利用欧盟复苏基金推动AI研发与数字化转型。
policy.en: Spain's National AI Strategy (ENIA) invests €600 million, leveraging EU Recovery Funds for AI R&D and digital transformation.

regulatoryStance.zh: 积极支持欧盟AI法案，西班牙被选为首个AI监管沙盒试点国。
regulatoryStance.en: Actively supports the EU AI Act; Spain was selected as the first AI regulatory sandbox pilot country.

investmentScale.zh: ENIA计划总投资6亿欧元，加上欧盟复苏基金中的AI相关拨款。
investmentScale.en: ENIA total planned investment of €600 million, plus AI-related allocations from EU Recovery Funds.

name.zh: 巴塞罗那超级计算中心

keyProducts.zh: MareNostrum 5超级计算机、欧洲高性能计算基础设施
keyProducts.en: MareNostrum 5 supercomputer, European high-performance computing infrastructure

keyProducts.zh: 企业AI解决方案、云与网络安全服务
keyProducts.en: Enterprise AI solutions, cloud and cybersecurity services

affiliation.zh: 巴塞罗那超级计算中心

contribution.zh: 领导BSC成为欧洲HPC领军机构，MareNostrum 5为欧洲最强超算之一。
contribution.en: Led BSC to become a leading European HPC institution; MareNostrum 5 is among Europe's most powerful supercomputers.

researchFocus.zh: 高性能计算与AI、西班牙语NLP、智慧城市AI应用、可再生能源AI优化。
researchFocus.en: High-performance computing and AI, Spanish NLP, smart city AI applications, renewable energy AI optimization.

computeInfrastructure.zh: MareNostrum 5超级计算机（EuroHPC联合项目）是西班牙AI算力核心，计算能力欧洲前列。
computeInfrastructure.en: MareNostrum 5 (EuroHPC joint project) is Spain's AI compute core, with computing power among Europe's top.

talentPool.zh: 巴塞罗那大学、马德里理工大学培养AI人才，但人才流失至美国和北欧问题突出。
talentPool.en: University of Barcelona, UPM produce AI talent, but brain drain to the US and Northern Europe is prominent.

globalRanking.zh: 欧洲AI第二梯队，全球约第15-18位
globalRanking.en: European AI second tier, approximately 15th-18th globally

outlook.zh: 西班牙在HPC基础设施和西班牙语NLP领域有独特优势，但AI产业投资仍需大幅增加。
outlook.en: Spain has unique advantages in HPC infrastructure and Spanish NLP, but AI industry investment still needs significant increase.

strengths.zh: 巴塞罗那超算中心、可再生能源领先、旅游经济韧性、2023年经济增长亮眼、西班牙语市场潜力。
strengths.en: Barcelona Supercomputing Center, renewable energy leadership, tourism economic resilience, strong 2023 growth, Spanish-language market potential.

weaknesses.zh: 青年失业率高、加泰独立问题、AI投资不足、公共债务高、人才外流。
weaknesses.en: High youth unemployment, Catalan independence issue, insufficient AI investment, high public debt, brain drain.

outlook.zh: 西班牙在可再生能源AI优化和西班牙语AI应用方面具有发展空间，但需解决结构性经济问题。
outlook.en: Spain has growth potential in renewable energy AI optimization and Spanish-language AI applications, but must address structural economic issues.

description.zh: 西班牙在AI时代以巴塞罗那超级计算中心（MareNostrum 5）为技术旗舰，可再生能源领域全球领先。桑切斯政府利用欧盟复苏基金大力推进数字化转型，西班牙被选为欧盟AI监管沙盒首个试点国。加泰罗尼亚独立运动通过赦免协议暂时缓和但长期不确定。2023年经济增长在欧元区表现突出，但青年失业率仍高企。
description.en: Spain uses the Barcelona Supercomputing Center (MareNostrum 5) as its technological flagship in the AI era, with global leadership in renewable energy. The Sánchez government leverages EU Recovery Funds to advance digital transformation; Spain was selected as the first EU AI regulatory sandbox pilot. The Catalan independence movement has temporarily eased through an amnesty deal but remains uncertain long-term. 2023 economic growth was outstanding in the Eurozone, though youth unemployment remains high.

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，总理主导内政，总统拥有解散议会等权力。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic where the PM leads domestic affairs and the president holds powers including dissolving parliament.

socialStructure.zh: 南欧社会模式，家庭纽带紧密，科技初创生态在里斯本蓬勃发展，吸引数字游牧者。
socialStructure.en: Southern European social model with strong family ties; tech startup ecosystem thriving in Lisbon, attracting digital nomads.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、议会多数、总统、银行与企业精英。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary majority, president, banking and corporate elites.

succession.zh: 总理由议会多数产生。总统由直选产生，任期五年。
succession.en: PM emerges from parliamentary majority. President is directly elected for a five-year term.

structure.zh: 一院制共和国议会（230席），总理领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Assembly of the Republic (230 seats), PM leads the cabinet.

name.en: Ministry of Economy and Maritime Affairs

function.zh: 管理经济政策、海洋经济与数字创新。
function.en: Manages economic policy, maritime economy, and digital innovation.

localAdmin.zh: 18个区和2个自治区（亚速尔群岛和马德拉岛）构成地方治理。
localAdmin.en: 18 districts and 2 autonomous regions (Azores and Madeira) form local governance.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以宪法为最高法律。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with the constitution as supreme law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高48%）、增值税（23%）、公司税（21%）为主。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to 48%), VAT (23%), corporate tax (21%).

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约80%文化认同），世俗化趋势
religion.en: Catholic predominant (~80% cultural identification), secularization trend

philosophy.zh: 航海探险遗产、"思乡"（saudade）文化情感、欧洲一体化理想主义。
philosophy.en: Maritime exploration heritage, 'saudade' cultural sentiment, European integration idealism.

culturalAchievements.zh: 法多音乐、大航海时代遗产、里斯本科技创业文化（Web Summit主办城市）、葡萄酒（波特酒）、足球。
culturalAchievements.en: Fado music, Age of Discovery heritage, Lisbon tech startup culture (Web Summit host city), wine (Port), football.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（葡萄牙语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Portuguese as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 小型开放经济体，旅游业与科技初创生态为亮点，Web Summit落户里斯本标志科技雄心。2023年经济韧性较好。
gdpDescription.en: A small open economy with tourism and tech startup ecosystem as highlights; Web Summit's relocation to Lisbon signals tech ambition. Good economic resilience in 2023.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、科技初创、纺织与鞋业、软木（全球第一）、葡萄酒、可再生能源
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, tech startups, textiles and footwear, cork (world's largest), wine, renewable energy

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车零部件、纺织品、软木制品、葡萄酒、石油炼制品、科技服务
tradeGoods.en: Auto parts, textiles, cork products, wine, refined petroleum, tech services

householdWealth.zh: 西欧较低水平，但近年房价上涨（黄金签证带动），生活成本相对合理吸引外国远程工作者。
householdWealth.en: Lower level in Western Europe, but recent housing price increases (golden visa-driven); relatively reasonable cost of living attracts foreign remote workers.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟单一市场为核心，与葡语国家（巴西/安哥拉/莫桑比克）保持贸易联系。
tradeRoutes.en: EU single market as core, maintaining trade ties with Portuguese-speaking countries (Brazil/Angola/Mozambique).

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，政府通过欧盟资金推动产业升级与数字化转型。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy with government using EU funds to drive industrial upgrading and digital transformation.

treasuryDescription.zh: 经历2010年代债务危机后财政状况显著改善，2023年接近预算平衡。
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal situation significantly improved after the 2010s debt crisis; approaching budget balance in 2023.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的107%，持续下降中。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 107% of GDP, continuously declining.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政整顿取得显著成效，债务比率持续下降，欧盟复苏基金支持投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal consolidation has achieved significant results, debt ratio continuously declining, EU Recovery Funds supporting investment.

description.zh: 参与北约任务与联合国维和。
description.en: Participates in NATO missions and UN peacekeeping.

description.zh: 巡逻广阔大西洋专属经济区。
description.en: Patrols the vast Atlantic exclusive economic zone.

technology.zh: F-16战斗机、参与北约联合防御，海军巡逻大西洋专属经济区。
technology.en: F-16 fighters, participation in NATO joint defense, navy patrols Atlantic EEZ.

threats.zh: 大西洋安全、网络威胁，整体威胁水平较低。
threats.en: Atlantic security, cyber threats; overall threat level is low.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，参与北约集体行动。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; participates in NATO collective operations.

populationDescription.zh: 人口老龄化严重，年轻人外流至北欧和英国，但外国移民（巴西/数字游牧者）增加。
populationDescription.en: Severe population aging, young people emigrating to Northern Europe and UK, but foreign immigration (Brazil/digital nomads) increasing.

ethnicGroups.zh: 葡萄牙人为主，巴西、安哥拉、佛得角等葡语国家移民增长
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Portuguese, with growing immigration from Portuguese-speaking countries (Brazil, Angola, Cape Verde)

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级在债务危机中受创但正在恢复，里斯本科技创业圈形成新精英阶层。
socialClasses.en: Middle class impacted by the debt crisis but recovering; Lisbon's tech startup scene forming a new elite class.

allies.zh: 欧盟与北约成员国，与巴西及葡语非洲国家保持特殊关系，英葡联盟为世界最古老军事同盟。
allies.en: EU and NATO member, maintaining special relations with Brazil and Portuguese-speaking African nations; the Anglo-Portuguese Alliance is the world's oldest military alliance.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、葡语国家共同体（CPLP）。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Community of Portuguese Language Countries (CPLP).

foreignPolicy.zh: 亲欧大西洋主义，维护与葡语世界纽带，推动里斯本科技枢纽地位。
foreignPolicy.en: Pro-European Atlanticism, maintaining ties with the Portuguese-speaking world, promoting Lisbon's tech hub status.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年Web Summit在里斯本举办，科斯塔因腐败调查辞职（11月）引发政治动荡。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Web Summit held in Lisbon in 2023; Costa resigned over corruption investigation (November), triggering political turmoil.

era.zh: 科技初创与数字游牧枢纽
era.en: Tech startup and digital nomad hub

keyInnovations.zh: 里斯本科技生态（Web Summit永久主办城市）、Unbabel AI翻译、数字游牧签证创新。
keyInnovations.en: Lisbon tech ecosystem (permanent Web Summit host city), Unbabel AI translation, digital nomad visa innovation.

infrastructure.zh: 里斯本科技初创集群、可再生能源装机增长、数字基础设施现代化中。
infrastructure.en: Lisbon tech startup cluster, growing renewable energy capacity, digital infrastructure modernization underway.

policy.zh: 葡萄牙AI战略聚焦于利用科技初创生态和葡语NLP优势，通过欧盟资金推进AI研发。
policy.en: Portuguese AI strategy focuses on leveraging the tech startup ecosystem and Portuguese NLP advantages, advancing AI R&D through EU funding.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，以开放创新环境吸引国际AI创业者。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework, attracting international AI entrepreneurs with an open innovation environment.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模较小，但科技初创生态吸引国际风投，Unbabel等企业获得可观融资。
investmentScale.en: Small AI investment scale, but the tech startup ecosystem attracts international VC; companies like Unbabel have secured notable funding.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的翻译平台，结合机器翻译与人工编辑
keyProducts.en: AI-powered translation platform combining machine translation with human editing

researchFocus.zh: 葡萄牙语NLP、AI翻译、智慧旅游、数字公共服务。
researchFocus.en: Portuguese NLP, AI translation, smart tourism, digital public services.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 通过欧盟EuroHPC项目获取算力支持，国内算力基础设施有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Accesses compute through the EU EuroHPC program; domestic compute infrastructure is limited.

talentPool.zh: 里斯本大学和波尔图大学培养AI人才，Web Summit生态吸引国际创业者。
talentPool.en: University of Lisbon and University of Porto produce AI talent; Web Summit ecosystem attracts international entrepreneurs.

globalRanking.zh: AI领域影响力有限，全球约第30-35位

outlook.zh: 葡萄牙在科技初创生态和葡语AI应用方面具有小而美的发展潜力。
outlook.en: Portugal has 'small but beautiful' development potential in its tech startup ecosystem and Portuguese-language AI applications.

strengths.zh: 里斯本科技初创生态、Web Summit影响力、财政整顿成效、生活成本吸引力、葡语市场。
strengths.en: Lisbon tech startup ecosystem, Web Summit influence, fiscal consolidation success, cost of living attractiveness, Portuguese-language market.

weaknesses.zh: 经济体量小、人才外流、公共债务高、人口老龄化、AI投资不足。
weaknesses.en: Small economy, brain drain, high public debt, population aging, insufficient AI investment.

outlook.zh: 葡萄牙作为欧洲科技初创新兴热点具有吸引力，但需在政治稳定性和AI投资上取得突破。
outlook.en: Portugal is attractive as an emerging European tech startup hotspot, but needs breakthroughs in political stability and AI investment.

description.zh: 葡萄牙在AI时代以里斯本科技初创生态和Web Summit（全球最大科技峰会之一）为名片吸引国际关注。Unbabel代表葡萄牙在AI翻译领域的创新能力。科斯塔总理因腐败调查在2023年11月辞职引发政治震荡。经济在债务危机后持续复苏，财政状况显著改善。数字游牧签证创新吸引全球远程工作者。
description.en: Portugal attracts international attention in the AI era through Lisbon's tech startup ecosystem and Web Summit (one of the world's largest tech summits). Unbabel represents Portuguese innovation in AI translation. PM Costa's resignation over a corruption investigation in November 2023 triggered political upheaval. The economy continues recovering from the debt crisis with significantly improved fiscal conditions. Digital nomad visa innovation attracts global remote workers.

ruler.zh: 基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理由议会多数产生，总统为虚位国家元首。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic where the PM is formed by parliamentary majority and the president serves as ceremonial head of state.

socialStructure.zh: 经历严重债务危机后的恢复期社会，中产阶级受创，年轻人外流严重，旅游业为生存支柱。
socialStructure.en: Society in recovery after severe debt crisis; middle class impacted, significant youth emigration, tourism as a vital lifeline.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、议会多数、商界精英、航运家族。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary majority, business elites, shipping families.

succession.zh: 总理由议会多数党领袖担任。总统由议会选举，任期五年。
succession.en: PM serves as leader of parliamentary majority. President elected by parliament for a five-year term.

structure.zh: 一院制议会（300席），总理领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Hellenic Parliament (300 seats), PM leads the cabinet.

function.zh: 推进电子政务与数字化转型。
function.en: Advances e-government and digital transformation.

localAdmin.zh: 13个大区和325个市镇构成地方治理网络。
localAdmin.en: 13 regions and 325 municipalities form the local governance network.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以宪法为最高法律。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with the constitution as supreme law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（24%）、个人所得税（最高44%）、公司税（22%）为主。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on VAT (24%), income tax (up to 44%), corporate tax (22%).

religion.zh: 东正教为国教（约90%），宗教在社会生活中仍具重要地位
religion.en: Greek Orthodox as state religion (~90%), religion still holds important social role

philosophy.zh: 西方哲学发源地（苏格拉底/柏拉图/亚里士多德），古典文明遗产是国家身份核心。
philosophy.en: Birthplace of Western philosophy (Socrates/Plato/Aristotle); classical civilization heritage is core to national identity.

culturalAchievements.zh: 西方文明摇篮、奥林匹克运动发源地、帕特农神庙、地中海美食、航运传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Cradle of Western civilization, birthplace of the Olympics, Parthenon, Mediterranean cuisine, maritime tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系希腊语族（希腊语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Hellenic branch (Greek as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 经历十年债务危机后经济逐步恢复，旅游业和航运业为支柱。2023年重获投资级信用评级，标志债务危机正式终结。
gdpDescription.en: Economy gradually recovering after a decade-long debt crisis; tourism and shipping as pillars. Regained investment-grade credit rating in 2023, marking the formal end of the debt crisis.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、航运、食品饮料（橄榄油/酸奶）、能源（LNG中转）
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, shipping, food and beverages (olive oil/yogurt), energy (LNG transit)

tradeGoods.zh: 石油炼制品、食品、旅游服务、航运服务、铝制品
tradeGoods.en: Refined petroleum, food, tourism services, shipping services, aluminum products

householdWealth.zh: 债务危机严重削弱家庭财富，但房地产市场近年回暖，旅游岛屿房产受国际投资者追捧。
householdWealth.en: Debt crisis severely eroded household wealth, but real estate market recovering recently; tourism island properties sought by international investors.

tradeRoutes.zh: 地中海东部贸易枢纽，比雷埃夫斯港（中远海运运营）为中欧贸易节点。
tradeRoutes.en: Eastern Mediterranean trade hub; Piraeus port (operated by COSCO) as a China-Europe trade node.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，米佐塔基斯政府推行亲商改革与私有化政策。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; the Mitsotakis government pursues pro-business reform and privatization policies.

treasuryDescription.zh: 2023年重获投资级评级，公共债务比率虽高但可持续性改善。
treasuryDescription.en: Regained investment-grade rating in 2023; public debt ratio high but sustainability improving.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的165%，欧元区最高，但还款结构优化。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 165% of GDP, highest in Eurozone, but repayment structure optimized.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政紧缩与结构改革相结合，初级财政盈余持续，力求降低债务比率。
fiscalPolicy.en: Combining fiscal austerity with structural reform, maintaining primary fiscal surplus, seeking to reduce debt ratio.

description.zh: 规模在北约中相对较大，主要针对土耳其方向防御。
description.en: Relatively large for NATO, primarily oriented toward defense against Turkey.

description.zh: 守护爱琴海与东地中海利益。
description.en: Guards Aegean Sea and Eastern Mediterranean interests.

technology.zh: F-16战斗机（升级中）、正采购法国阵风战斗机、佩里级护卫舰。
technology.en: F-16 fighters (upgrading), procuring French Rafale fighters, Perry-class frigates.

threats.zh: 与土耳其因爱琴海与塞浦路斯问题长期紧张，东地中海能源资源争议。
threats.en: Long-standing tensions with Turkey over the Aegean Sea and Cyprus issues, Eastern Mediterranean energy resource disputes.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，与土耳其在爱琴海持续紧张对峙。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; continued tense standoff with Turkey in the Aegean Sea.

populationDescription.zh: 人口持续下降，年轻人外流严重（"脑力流失"），老龄化加速。
populationDescription.en: Population continuously declining, severe youth emigration ('brain drain'), accelerating aging.

ethnicGroups.zh: 希腊人为主（约93%），阿尔巴尼亚裔等少数群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Greek (~93%), Albanian-origin and other minority groups

socialClasses.zh: 债务危机导致中产阶级大规模萎缩，旅游业和航运业创造的财富集中于少数。
socialClasses.en: Debt crisis caused massive middle-class shrinkage; wealth from tourism and shipping concentrated among a few.

allies.zh: 欧盟与北约成员国，与法国深化防务合作，与美国安全关系密切。
allies.en: EU and NATO member, deepening defense cooperation with France, close security relationship with the US.

enemies.zh: 与土耳其因爱琴海主权与塞浦路斯问题长期紧张。
enemies.en: Long-standing tensions with Turkey over Aegean sovereignty and Cyprus issues.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约、法希防务协议（2021年）。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty, Franco-Greek defense agreement (2021).

foreignPolicy.zh: 维护爱琴海主权、深化法希防务合作、管理对土关系、推动塞浦路斯问题解决。
foreignPolicy.en: Defending Aegean sovereignty, deepening Franco-Greek defense cooperation, managing Turkey relations, promoting Cyprus resolution.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年米佐塔基斯连任后推进与土耳其缓和对话，同时加强军事采购。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: After Mitsotakis' re-election in 2023, pursued détente dialogue with Turkey while strengthening military procurement.

keyInnovations.zh: 电子政务数字化转型（Gov.gr平台）、航运科技、旅游科技。
keyInnovations.en: E-government digital transformation (Gov.gr platform), maritime technology, tourism technology.

infrastructure.zh: 数字基础设施现代化中，比雷埃夫斯港为地中海重要枢纽，5G部署起步。
infrastructure.en: Digital infrastructure modernization underway, Piraeus as a key Mediterranean hub, 5G deployment starting.

policy.zh: 希腊国家AI战略聚焦于公共部门数字化和航运AI应用，投资规模有限。
policy.en: Greek National AI Strategy focuses on public sector digitalization and maritime AI applications; investment scale is limited.

regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模很小，主要依赖欧盟资金和国际合作。
investmentScale.en: Very small AI investment scale, primarily relying on EU funds and international cooperation.

researchFocus.zh: 航运AI、旅游AI应用、古希腊文本AI分析、电子政务。
researchFocus.en: Maritime AI, tourism AI applications, ancient Greek text AI analysis, e-government.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 有限的国内算力，通过欧盟项目获取HPC资源。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited domestic compute; accesses HPC resources through EU projects.

talentPool.zh: 雅典国立科技大学等培养有限AI人才，人才外流至西欧和美国问题严重。
talentPool.en: National Technical University of Athens produces limited AI talent; severe brain drain to Western Europe and the US.

globalRanking.zh: AI领域影响力极小，全球约第40位以后

outlook.zh: 希腊AI发展主要聚焦于航运和旅游等垂直领域的数字化应用。
outlook.en: Greek AI development mainly focuses on digital applications in vertical sectors like shipping and tourism.

strengths.zh: 旅游吸引力、航运业全球领先、2023年投资级评级恢复、地中海战略位置、文化遗产。
strengths.en: Tourism attractiveness, global shipping leadership, 2023 investment-grade rating recovery, Mediterranean strategic location, cultural heritage.

weaknesses.zh: 超高公共债务、人才外流严重、AI投资极有限、与土耳其紧张关系、人口下降。
weaknesses.en: Ultra-high public debt, severe brain drain, extremely limited AI investment, tensions with Turkey, population decline.

outlook.zh: 希腊经济正从危机中复苏，但在AI时代的竞争力有限，航运数字化是最有前景的方向。
outlook.en: Greece's economy is recovering from the crisis, but competitiveness in the AI era is limited; maritime digitalization is the most promising direction.

description.zh: 希腊在经历长达十年的债务危机后于2023年重获投资级信用评级，标志着经济复苏的里程碑。米佐塔基斯总理连任后推行亲商改革。在AI领域希腊影响力有限，主要聚焦航运和旅游业的数字化应用。军费开支占GDP比例在北约中居前（约3.9%），反映与土耳其的持续紧张。文化遗产和旅游资源是国家核心资产。
description.en: Greece regained investment-grade credit rating in 2023 after a decade-long debt crisis, marking an economic recovery milestone. PM Mitsotakis pursues pro-business reform after re-election. Greece has limited AI influence, mainly focusing on digital applications in shipping and tourism. Military spending as a share of GDP is among the highest in NATO (~3.9%), reflecting ongoing tensions with Turkey. Cultural heritage and tourism resources are core national assets.

dynasty.zh: 公民纲领党联合政府（从法律与公正党接任）
dynasty.en: Civic Platform coalition (succeeding Law and Justice)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理领导内阁，总统由直选产生拥有有限行政权。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic where the PM leads the cabinet; the president is directly elected with limited executive powers.

socialStructure.zh: 后共产主义转型社会，中产阶级快速壮大，IT外包产业创造大量高薪岗位。
socialStructure.en: Post-communist transitional society with a rapidly growing middle class; IT outsourcing creates numerous high-paying jobs.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、议会联盟、总统、企业精英。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, president, corporate elites.

succession.zh: 总理由议会多数产生。总统由直选产生，任期五年。
succession.en: PM from parliamentary majority. President directly elected for a five-year term.

structure.zh: 两院制：众议院（460席）和参议院（100席）。总理领导内阁行使行政权。
structure.en: Bicameral: Sejm (460 seats) and Senate (100 seats). PM leads cabinet in executive power.

function.zh: 推进国家数字化转型与科技创新。
function.en: Advances national digital transformation and tech innovation.

localAdmin.zh: 16个省、380个县和约2500个市镇构成三级地方治理体系。
localAdmin.en: 16 voivodeships, 380 counties, and approximately 2,500 municipalities form a three-tier local governance system.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1997年宪法为基础。图斯克政府正恢复司法独立性。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1997 Constitution. The Tusk government is restoring judicial independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（12%/32%两级）、增值税（23%）、公司税（19%）为主。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (12%/32% two tiers), VAT (23%), corporate tax (19%).

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约87%），宗教在社会生活中影响力仍大
religion.en: Catholic predominant (~87%), religion still significantly influential in social life

philosophy.zh: 天主教社会教义与民族复兴叙事交织，当代亲欧自由主义与保守民族主义之间存在张力。
philosophy.en: Catholic social teaching intertwined with national revival narratives; contemporary tension between pro-European liberalism and conservative nationalism.

culturalAchievements.zh: 肖邦音乐遗产、波兰电影学派、《巫师》游戏（CD Projekt RED）全球文化现象、科学传统（居里夫人/哥白尼）。
culturalAchievements.en: Chopin musical heritage, Polish Film School, The Witcher games (CD Projekt RED) as a global cultural phenomenon, scientific tradition (Curie/Copernicus).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系斯拉夫语族（波兰语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Slavic branch (Polish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 中东欧最大经济体，30余年持续增长（唯一未经历2009年衰退的欧盟国家），IT外包和制造业蓬勃。
gdpDescription.en: Largest Central and Eastern European economy, over 30 years of continuous growth (the only EU country that avoided 2009 recession), with thriving IT outsourcing and manufacturing.

mainIndustries.zh: IT外包与软件开发、汽车制造（工厂密集）、食品加工、游戏产业（CD Projekt RED）、家电
mainIndustries.en: IT outsourcing and software, automotive manufacturing (dense factory network), food processing, gaming (CD Projekt RED), appliances

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车零部件、机械、食品、IT服务、家电、电子游戏
tradeGoods.en: Auto parts, machinery, food, IT services, appliances, video games

householdWealth.zh: 快速增长中，住房自有率高（约84%），但与西欧仍有差距。
householdWealth.en: Growing rapidly, high homeownership (~84%), but still a gap with Western Europe.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国贸易最密切，欧盟单一市场为核心，作为东西欧贸易与物流桥梁。
tradeRoutes.en: Closest trade with Germany, EU single market as core, serving as trade and logistics bridge between Eastern and Western Europe.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济，后共产主义转型成功案例，政府通过欧盟资金和产业政策推动发展。
economicSystem.en: Market economy, a successful post-communist transition case, government driving development through EU funds and industrial policy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况总体健康，国防支出因俄乌战争大幅增加，欧盟资金为重要投资来源。
treasuryDescription.en: Overall healthy fiscal position; defense spending increased significantly due to the Russia-Ukraine war; EU funds as an important investment source.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 49% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性财政，大幅增加国防开支，社会福利支出（500+计划）维持高位。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary fiscal policy, significantly increased defense spending, social welfare spending (500+ program) maintained at high levels.

description.zh: 北约东翼核心力量，大规模采购韩国K2坦克与美国M1A2坦克。
description.en: Core force on NATO's eastern flank, mass-procuring Korean K2 and American M1A2 tanks.

description.zh: 配备F-16和正在接收的F-35A战斗机。
description.en: Equipped with F-16s and receiving F-35A fighters.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统杜达（名义），总理（实际）

technology.zh: F-16战斗机、F-35A采购中、爱国者防空系统、韩国K2坦克大规模引进、HIMARS火箭炮。
technology.en: F-16 fighters, F-35A procurement, Patriot air defense, mass Korean K2 tank imports, HIMARS rocket launchers.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯入侵乌克兰使波兰面临冷战以来最大安全威胁，白俄罗斯边境移民危机。
threats.en: Russia's invasion of Ukraine presents Poland with its greatest security threat since the Cold War; Belarus border migration crisis.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，作为乌克兰最重要的后勤中转国和军事援助支持国之一。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; serves as one of Ukraine's most important logistics transit and military aid support nations.

populationDescription.zh: 人口缓慢下降，乌克兰战争难民大量涌入（约100万），IT人才需求推动技术移民。
populationDescription.en: Slowly declining population; massive influx of Ukrainian war refugees (~1 million); IT talent demand driving technical immigration.

ethnicGroups.zh: 波兰人为主（约97%），乌克兰难民成为最大外国人群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Polish (~97%), Ukrainian refugees as the largest foreign group

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级快速壮大，IT行业从业者收入增长快，但城乡差距和代际差距仍存。
socialClasses.en: Middle class rapidly growing, IT workers' income increasing fast, but urban-rural and generational gaps persist.

allies.zh: 美国（最亲密的欧洲盟友之一）、北约与欧盟成员国、乌克兰。
allies.en: US (one of the closest European allies), NATO and EU member, Ukraine.

enemies.zh: 俄罗斯被视为首要安全威胁，与白俄罗斯因边境移民危机关系紧张。
enemies.en: Russia viewed as the primary security threat; tensions with Belarus over border migration crisis.

treaties.zh: 北约公约、欧盟条约、美波增强军事合作协议。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU treaties, enhanced US-Poland military cooperation agreement.

foreignPolicy.zh: 强硬反俄、力挺乌克兰、深化与美国安全关系、推动北约东翼加强。图斯克政府恢复与欧盟关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Hardline anti-Russia, strong Ukraine support, deepening US security ties, promoting NATO eastern flank reinforcement. Tusk government restoring EU relations.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年10月大选图斯克击败执政8年的法律与公正党，承诺恢复法治与欧盟关系。持续大规模军备采购。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Tusk defeated the ruling Law and Justice party in October 2023 elections after 8 years, pledging to restore rule of law and EU relations. Continued large-scale arms procurement.

keyInnovations.zh: 软件开发外包（全球IT外包重镇）、游戏产业（《巫师》/《赛博朋克2077》）、军事技术现代化。
keyInnovations.en: Software development outsourcing (global IT outsourcing hub), gaming industry (The Witcher/Cyberpunk 2077), military technology modernization.

infrastructure.zh: IT基础设施快速发展、华沙科技生态成长中、军事基础设施大规模升级。
infrastructure.en: Rapidly developing IT infrastructure, growing Warsaw tech ecosystem, large-scale military infrastructure upgrade.

policy.zh: 波兰AI发展政策聚焦于IT外包产业向AI升级和军事AI应用，图斯克政府计划加大数字经济投资。
policy.en: Polish AI policy focuses on upgrading IT outsourcing to AI and military AI applications; the Tusk government plans to increase digital economy investment.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，图斯克政府承诺恢复与欧盟的数字政策协调。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework; the Tusk government pledges to restore digital policy coordination with the EU.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模中等，IT外包产业为AI人才库，但风险资本市场尚不成熟。
investmentScale.en: Moderate AI investment; IT outsourcing industry serves as an AI talent pool, but the VC market is not yet mature.

keyProducts.zh: 《巫师》系列、《赛博朋克2077》中的AI技术应用
keyProducts.en: The Witcher series, AI technology in Cyberpunk 2077

researchFocus.zh: 游戏AI、IT服务自动化、军事AI应用、波兰语NLP。
researchFocus.en: Game AI, IT service automation, military AI applications, Polish NLP.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 通过欧盟EuroHPC项目和国内学术机构提供算力，正规划建设更多数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: Compute provided through EU EuroHPC and domestic academic institutions; planning more data center construction.

talentPool.zh: 华沙大学、AGH科技大学培养大量IT人才，IT外包产业提供丰富的软件工程师储备。
talentPool.en: University of Warsaw, AGH University produce large IT talent pool; IT outsourcing industry provides abundant software engineer reserves.

globalRanking.zh: 欧洲AI第三梯队，全球约第20-25位
globalRanking.en: European AI third tier, approximately 20th-25th globally

outlook.zh: 波兰IT人才储备丰富，AI产业有潜力从IT外包向更高价值的AI开发转型。
outlook.en: Poland has rich IT talent reserves; the AI industry has potential to transition from IT outsourcing to higher-value AI development.

strengths.zh: 中东欧最大经济体、IT人才丰富、持续经济增长、北约东翼安全支柱、大规模军事现代化。
strengths.en: Largest CEE economy, rich IT talent, sustained economic growth, NATO eastern flank security pillar, large-scale military modernization.

weaknesses.zh: 人口下降、AI产业化不足、法治问题（正在恢复）、与前执政党的政治极化。
weaknesses.en: Population decline, insufficient AI industrialization, rule of law issues (being restored), political polarization with former ruling party.

outlook.zh: 图斯克政府恢复与欧盟关系有望释放更多合作红利，IT人才优势为AI转型奠定基础。
outlook.en: The Tusk government's restoration of EU relations may unlock more cooperation benefits; IT talent advantages lay the foundation for AI transition.

description.zh: 波兰在2023年10月大选中完成重大政治转变，图斯克击败执政8年的法律与公正党，承诺恢复法治与欧盟关系。作为北约东翼核心国家，波兰军费占GDP 4%（北约最高之一），大规模采购韩国和美国军事装备。IT外包产业蓬勃，为AI人才转型奠定基础。CD Projekt RED（《巫师》系列）代表波兰在游戏AI领域的创新能力。
description.en: Poland completed a major political transition in October 2023, with Tusk defeating the ruling Law and Justice party after 8 years, pledging to restore rule of law and EU relations. As a core NATO eastern flank nation, Poland's military spending at 4% of GDP (among NATO's highest) supports mass procurement of Korean and American military equipment. The thriving IT outsourcing industry lays a foundation for AI talent transition. CD Projekt RED (The Witcher series) represents Polish innovation in gaming AI.

dynasty.zh: 国家自由党-社会民主党大联合政府

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，总统拥有外交与安全事务主导权，总理领导内阁负责内政。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic where the president leads foreign and security affairs, while the PM leads the cabinet on domestic policy.

socialStructure.zh: 后共产主义转型社会，IT产业创造新中产，城乡差距仍然明显。
socialStructure.en: Post-communist transition society; IT industry creating a new middle class; urban-rural gap remains pronounced.

rulingClass.zh: 总统、总理与内阁、议会联盟、企业精英。
rulingClass.en: President, PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, corporate elites.

succession.zh: 总统由直选产生，任期五年，可连任一次。总理由议会多数产生。
succession.en: President directly elected for five-year term, renewable once. PM from parliamentary majority.

structure.zh: 两院制议会：参议院（136席）和众议院（330席）。
structure.en: Bicameral parliament: Senate (136 seats) and Chamber of Deputies (330 seats).

name.en: Ministry of Research, Innovation, and Digitalization

function.zh: 推进科研创新与国家数字化转型。
function.en: Advances research, innovation, and national digital transformation.

localAdmin.zh: 41个县和布加勒斯特直辖市构成地方治理。
localAdmin.en: 41 counties and the Bucharest municipality form local governance.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以宪法为最高法律。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with the constitution as supreme law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（10%统一税率）、增值税（19%）、公司税（16%）为主，对IT行业有税收优惠。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (10% flat rate), VAT (19%), corporate tax (16%), with tax incentives for the IT industry.

religion.zh: 东正教为主（约85%），宗教影响力较大
religion.en: Romanian Orthodox predominant (~85%), significant religious influence

philosophy.zh: 拉丁文化与东正教传统交融，后共产主义身份重建中。
philosophy.en: Blend of Latin culture and Orthodox tradition, post-communist identity reconstruction underway.

culturalAchievements.zh: 德古拉传说（布拉姆·斯托克灵感来源）、罗马尼亚新浪潮电影、UiPath创业成功故事、丰富的民间音乐传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Dracula legend (Bram Stoker inspiration), Romanian New Wave cinema, UiPath entrepreneurial success story, rich folk music tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（罗马尼亚语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch (Romanian as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 中东欧增长较快的经济体之一，IT产业（特别是UiPath）为亮点，汽车制造（达契亚/雷诺工厂）和农业为支柱。
gdpDescription.en: One of the faster-growing CEE economies; IT industry (especially UiPath) as a highlight, automotive (Dacia/Renault factory) and agriculture as pillars.

mainIndustries.zh: IT与软件（UiPath）、汽车制造（达契亚）、农业、石油、纺织
mainIndustries.en: IT and software (UiPath), automotive (Dacia), agriculture, petroleum, textiles

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车、机械、IT服务（RPA/AI）、食品、石油产品
tradeGoods.en: Vehicles, machinery, IT services (RPA/AI), food, petroleum products

householdWealth.zh: 财富水平在欧盟偏低，但增长迅速，住房自有率极高（约96%）。
householdWealth.en: Wealth levels low by EU standards, but growing rapidly; extremely high homeownership (~96%).

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国和意大利贸易最密切，欧盟单一市场为核心。
tradeRoutes.en: Closest trade with Germany and Italy, EU single market as core.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济，政府通过低税率和欧盟资金吸引外资。
economicSystem.en: Market economy; government attracts foreign investment through low tax rates and EU funds.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政赤字偏高，欧盟要求加强财政纪律。
treasuryDescription.en: Fiscal deficit is high; EU requires strengthened fiscal discipline.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 48% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 扩张性倾向，社会福利与国防支出增加，但欧盟施压控制赤字。
fiscalPolicy.en: Expansionary tendency, social welfare and defense spending increasing, but EU pressure to control deficit.

description.zh: 北约东翼成员，黑海安全关键参与者。
description.en: NATO eastern flank member, key participant in Black Sea security.

technology.zh: F-16战斗机、爱国者防空系统采购中、参与北约黑海安全部署。
technology.en: F-16 fighters, Patriot air defense procurement, participation in NATO Black Sea security deployment.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯因乌克兰战争构成黑海方向安全威胁。
threats.en: Russia poses a Black Sea security threat due to the Ukraine war.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，加强北约黑海防御部署，乌克兰战争使罗马尼亚安全重要性提升。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; strengthening NATO Black Sea defense deployment; Ukraine war has elevated Romania's security importance.

populationDescription.zh: 人口持续外流至西欧（约400万旅居海外），乌克兰战争带来难民涌入。
populationDescription.en: Population continuously emigrating to Western Europe (~4 million abroad), Ukraine war bringing refugee influx.

ethnicGroups.zh: 罗马尼亚人为主（约89%），匈牙利族（约6.5%）、罗姆人等
ethnicGroups.en: Romanian majority (~89%), Hungarian (~6.5%), Roma, and others

socialClasses.zh: IT行业创造新中产阶级，但城乡差距巨大，农村贫困问题突出。
socialClasses.en: IT industry creating a new middle class, but vast urban-rural gap; rural poverty remains prominent.

allies.zh: 美国、北约与欧盟成员国，与乌克兰和摩尔多瓦关系密切。
allies.en: US, NATO and EU member, close relations with Ukraine and Moldova.

enemies.zh: 视俄罗斯为安全威胁（黑海方向）。
enemies.en: Views Russia as security threat (Black Sea direction).

treaties.zh: 北约公约、欧盟条约、美罗战略伙伴关系。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU treaties, US-Romania strategic partnership.

foreignPolicy.zh: 亲美亲北约、支持乌克兰、推动摩尔多瓦欧洲一体化、黑海安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Pro-US, pro-NATO, supporting Ukraine, promoting Moldova's European integration, Black Sea security.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年加强北约黑海防御部署，约翰尼斯曾竞选北约秘书长。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Strengthened NATO Black Sea defense deployment in 2023; Iohannis ran for NATO Secretary General.

keyInnovations.zh: UiPath RPA（机器人流程自动化）平台、IT外包服务、网络安全。
keyInnovations.en: UiPath RPA (robotic process automation) platform, IT outsourcing services, cybersecurity.

infrastructure.zh: 高速互联网覆盖率欧洲前列、IT园区建设中、克卢日科技生态成长。
infrastructure.en: Among Europe's highest broadband coverage, IT park construction, Cluj tech ecosystem growing.

policy.zh: 罗马尼亚AI战略聚焦于RPA/AI自动化产业优势延伸和IT人才培养。
policy.en: Romanian AI strategy focuses on extending RPA/AI automation industry advantages and IT talent development.

regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模较小，但UiPath作为全球RPA领导者为罗马尼亚AI产业提供标杆。
investmentScale.en: Small AI investment scale, but UiPath as a global RPA leader provides a benchmark for Romanian AI industry.

valuation.zh: 市值约130亿美元（纽交所上市）

keyProducts.zh: 企业级RPA与AI自动化平台，全球RPA市场领导者
keyProducts.en: Enterprise RPA and AI automation platform, global RPA market leader

headquarters.zh: 纽约（创立于布加勒斯特）

contribution.zh: 罗马尼亚程序员出身，创办UiPath从布加勒斯特发展为全球RPA/AI自动化领域价值百亿美元的上市公司。
contribution.en: Romanian programmer who founded UiPath, growing it from Bucharest to a publicly traded multi-billion-dollar global leader in RPA/AI automation.

researchFocus.zh: 机器人流程自动化（RPA）、AI驱动的企业自动化、网络安全AI。
researchFocus.en: Robotic process automation (RPA), AI-driven enterprise automation, cybersecurity AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 国内算力有限，通过欧盟项目获取HPC资源。高速互联网基础设施为优势。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited domestic compute; accesses HPC resources through EU projects. High-speed internet infrastructure is an advantage.

talentPool.zh: 布加勒斯特理工大学和克卢日科技大学培养IT人才，UiPath带动RPA/AI人才生态。
talentPool.en: Bucharest Polytechnic and Cluj Technical University produce IT talent; UiPath drives RPA/AI talent ecosystem.

globalRanking.zh: RPA/自动化领域全球有一席之地（UiPath），AI综合实力约第25-30位
globalRanking.en: Has a place globally in RPA/automation (UiPath), overall AI capability approximately 25th-30th

outlook.zh: UiPath的成功证明罗马尼亚有AI创业潜力，但生态系统尚需扩展。
outlook.en: UiPath's success proves Romania's AI entrepreneurial potential, but the ecosystem needs expansion.

strengths.zh: UiPath全球RPA领导者、IT人才丰富且成本低、高速互联网基础设施、北约黑海安全角色。
strengths.en: UiPath global RPA leader, rich and cost-effective IT talent, high-speed internet infrastructure, NATO Black Sea security role.

weaknesses.zh: 大规模人口外流、城乡差距大、腐败问题、财政赤字偏高。
weaknesses.en: Large-scale emigration, vast urban-rural gap, corruption issues, high fiscal deficit.

outlook.zh: 罗马尼亚有望以UiPath为标杆发展AI自动化产业集群，但需解决人才外流和治理挑战。
outlook.en: Romania may develop an AI automation industry cluster with UiPath as a benchmark, but must address brain drain and governance challenges.

description.zh: 罗马尼亚在AI时代以UiPath——这家从布加勒斯特起步的全球RPA/AI自动化领导者——为最大亮点。IT行业蓬勃发展，高速互联网覆盖率欧洲前列。约翰尼斯总统领导下的大联合政府维持政治稳定。作为北约黑海安全的关键成员，罗马尼亚在俄乌战争中的战略重要性提升。人口外流至西欧仍为长期挑战。
description.en: Romania's biggest highlight in the AI era is UiPath—the global RPA/AI automation leader that started in Bucharest. The IT industry is thriving with broadband coverage among Europe's highest. President Iohannis' grand coalition maintains political stability. As a key NATO Black Sea security member, Romania's strategic importance has grown during the Russia-Ukraine war. Emigration to Western Europe remains a long-term challenge.

dynasty.zh: 温和党领导的右翼联盟（卡尔十六世·古斯塔夫为君主）
dynasty.en: Moderate Party-led right-wing coalition (Carl XVI Gustaf as monarch)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，首相由议会产生，国王为虚位元首。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy, PM formed by parliament, king as ceremonial head.

socialStructure.zh: 高度平等的北欧福利国家模式，科技独角兽频出，近年移民融合与帮派暴力成为社会挑战。
socialStructure.en: Highly egalitarian Nordic welfare state model, frequently producing tech unicorns; immigration integration and gang violence have become recent social challenges.

rulingClass.zh: 首相与内阁、议会联盟、王室、企业精英（瓦伦堡家族等）。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, royal house, corporate elites (Wallenberg family, etc.).

succession.zh: 首相由议会产生。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: PM formed by parliament. Monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 一院制议会（349席），首相领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Riksdag (349 seats), PM leads the cabinet.

function.zh: 负责产业政策、创新与数字经济。
function.en: Responsible for industrial policy, innovation, and digital economy.

localAdmin.zh: 21个县和290个市镇构成地方自治体系。
localAdmin.en: 21 counties and 290 municipalities form the local self-governance system.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与北欧法律传统相结合。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system combined with Nordic legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高约57%含地方税）、增值税（25%）、公司税（20.6%）为主，高税高福利模式。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to ~57% including local taxes), VAT (25%), corporate tax (20.6%); high-tax, high-welfare model.

religion.zh: 路德宗传统（瑞典教会），但世俗化程度极高，无宗教者约半数
religion.en: Lutheran tradition (Church of Sweden), but extremely secularized, non-religious approximately half

philosophy.zh: 社会民主主义传统深厚，"中间道路"理念，当代注重可持续发展与数字创新。
philosophy.en: Deep social democratic tradition, 'Middle Way' philosophy, contemporary focus on sustainable development and digital innovation.

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺贝尔奖、ABBA与流行音乐出口（Spotify平台）、宜家设计理念、《我的世界》游戏、沃尔沃安全文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Nobel Prize, ABBA and pop music exports (Spotify platform), IKEA design philosophy, Minecraft game, Volvo safety culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（瑞典语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (Swedish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 创新驱动的北欧经济体，诞生了Spotify、Klarna、Ericsson等全球科技品牌，人均独角兽数量仅次于硅谷。
gdpDescription.en: An innovation-driven Nordic economy that birthed global tech brands like Spotify, Klarna, and Ericsson; per capita unicorns second only to Silicon Valley.

mainIndustries.zh: 科技与创新（Spotify/Klarna/Ericsson）、汽车（沃尔沃）、国防（萨博）、矿业、林业、制药
mainIndustries.en: Technology and innovation (Spotify/Klarna/Ericsson), automotive (Volvo), defense (Saab), mining, forestry, pharmaceuticals

tradeGoods.zh: 电信设备（爱立信）、汽车（沃尔沃）、矿产、木材制品、数字服务（Spotify）、军事装备
tradeGoods.en: Telecom equipment (Ericsson), vehicles (Volvo), minerals, timber products, digital services (Spotify), military equipment

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平高，但住房市场竞争激烈，房价近年有所调整。
householdWealth.en: High household wealth, but competitive housing market; housing prices have seen recent adjustments.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国、挪威、芬兰贸易密切，欧盟单一市场为核心。
tradeRoutes.en: Close trade with Germany, Norway, Finland; EU single market as core.

economicSystem.zh: 北欧社会市场经济模式，高税高福利与开放创新环境并存。
economicSystem.en: Nordic social market economy model with high-tax, high-welfare coexisting with an open innovation environment.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况健康，公共债务低，北约入盟后国防开支增加。
treasuryDescription.en: Healthy fiscal position with low public debt; defense spending increasing after NATO accession.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的33%，欧洲最低之一。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 33% of GDP, among Europe's lowest.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理，增加国防支出以履行北约义务。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management, increasing defense spending to fulfill NATO obligations.

description.zh: 冷战后重建中，恢复全民征兵制。
description.en: Post-Cold War rebuilding, restoring universal conscription.

description.zh: 以护卫舰和潜艇保卫波罗的海。
description.en: Corvettes and submarines defending the Baltic Sea.

technology.zh: 鹰狮战斗机（萨博JAS 39）、哥特兰级AIP潜艇、先进国防科技（萨博/博福斯遗产）。
technology.en: Gripen fighters (Saab JAS 39), Gotland-class AIP submarines, advanced defense tech (Saab/Bofors heritage).

threats.zh: 俄罗斯在波罗的海的军事威胁是加入北约的核心驱动力。
threats.en: Russian military threat in the Baltic Sea is the core driver of NATO accession.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战。2024年3月正式加入北约，结束200年中立传统。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat. Formally joined NATO in March 2024, ending 200 years of neutrality tradition.

populationDescription.zh: 移民比例在北欧最高，近年帮派暴力问题引发移民政策收紧讨论。
populationDescription.en: Highest immigrant proportion in the Nordics; recent gang violence has triggered tighter immigration policy discussions.

ethnicGroups.zh: 瑞典人为主（约80%），中东/非洲/芬兰移民群体约20%
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Swedish (~80%), Middle Eastern/African/Finnish immigrant groups approximately 20%

socialClasses.zh: 北欧高平等模式，但移民社区与主流社会融合挑战加大。
socialClasses.en: Nordic high-equality model, but integration challenges between immigrant communities and mainstream society growing.

allies.zh: 北约新成员（2024年加入）、欧盟成员国、北欧合作体系、与美英关系密切。
allies.en: New NATO member (joined 2024), EU member, Nordic cooperation system, close US and UK relations.

enemies.zh: 俄罗斯为加入北约的核心原因。
enemies.en: Russia as the core reason for NATO accession.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、北约公约（2024年）、北欧防务合作。
treaties.en: EU treaties, NATO Treaty (2024), Nordic defense cooperation.

foreignPolicy.zh: 结束200年中立加入北约、强化波罗的海安全、维持北欧合作与欧盟参与。
foreignPolicy.en: Ending 200 years of neutrality to join NATO, strengthening Baltic Sea security, maintaining Nordic cooperation and EU engagement.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年土耳其最终同意瑞典加入北约（经过长期谈判），标志瑞典安全政策历史性转变。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Turkey finally agreed to Sweden's NATO accession in 2023 (after prolonged negotiations), marking a historic shift in Swedish security policy.

era.zh: 科技独角兽与数字创新

keyInnovations.zh: Spotify（AI音乐推荐）、Klarna（AI金融科技）、爱立信5G/6G、萨博国防科技、H&M供应链AI。
keyInnovations.en: Spotify (AI music recommendations), Klarna (AI fintech), Ericsson 5G/6G, Saab defense tech, H&M supply chain AI.

infrastructure.zh: 全球领先的数字化程度、100%宽带覆盖目标、清洁能源电网、斯德哥尔摩科技生态。
infrastructure.en: World-leading digitalization, 100% broadband coverage target, clean energy grid, Stockholm tech ecosystem.

policy.zh: 瑞典AI创新战略聚焦于利用科技独角兽生态推动AI应用，政府投资AI研究与公共部门AI应用。
policy.en: Swedish AI innovation strategy focuses on leveraging the tech unicorn ecosystem for AI applications, government investing in AI research and public sector AI.

regulatoryStance.zh: 支持欧盟AI法案的创新友好型实施，强调AI促进社会福利。
regulatoryStance.en: Supports innovation-friendly implementation of the EU AI Act, emphasizing AI for social welfare.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资与科技独角兽生态紧密关联，Spotify和Klarna的AI研发投入可观。
investmentScale.en: AI investment closely tied to the tech unicorn ecosystem; Spotify and Klarna's AI R&D spending is substantial.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的音乐推荐引擎、DJ AI功能、播客AI转录
keyProducts.en: AI-powered music recommendation engine, DJ AI feature, podcast AI transcription

valuation.zh: 估值约67亿美元（2023年下调后）

keyProducts.zh: AI客服聊天机器人（替代700名客服）、AI购物助手
keyProducts.en: AI customer service chatbot (replacing 700 agents), AI shopping assistant

keyProducts.zh: 5G/6G网络AI优化、网络自动化平台
keyProducts.en: 5G/6G network AI optimization, network automation platform

contribution.zh: 创建全球最大音乐流媒体平台，AI推荐引擎重新定义音乐消费方式。
contribution.en: Created the world's largest music streaming platform; AI recommendation engine redefined music consumption.

researchFocus.zh: AI推荐系统、金融科技AI、5G/6G网络AI、自动驾驶、AI辅助药物发现。
researchFocus.en: AI recommendation systems, fintech AI, 5G/6G network AI, autonomous driving, AI-assisted drug discovery.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 北欧数据中心集群（冷气候优势）、欧洲领先的数字基础设施。
computeInfrastructure.en: Nordic data center clusters (cold climate advantage), Europe-leading digital infrastructure.

talentPool.zh: KTH皇家理工学院、查尔姆斯理工大学培养AI人才，斯德哥尔摩科技独角兽生态吸引全球人才。
talentPool.en: KTH Royal Institute, Chalmers University produce AI talent; Stockholm's tech unicorn ecosystem attracts global talent.

globalRanking.zh: AI应用创新全球前列（人均），综合约第10-12位
globalRanking.en: AI application innovation among global leaders (per capita), comprehensive approximately 10th-12th

outlook.zh: 瑞典以科技独角兽生态为独特优势，在AI应用创新方面具有超越国家体量的影响力。
outlook.en: Sweden's tech unicorn ecosystem gives it a unique advantage, with AI application innovation influence beyond its national size.

strengths.zh: 科技独角兽生态（Spotify/Klarna/爱立信）、高数字化水平、创新文化、清洁能源、高教育水平。
strengths.en: Tech unicorn ecosystem (Spotify/Klarna/Ericsson), high digitalization, innovation culture, clean energy, high education levels.

weaknesses.zh: 移民融合挑战、帮派暴力问题、住房市场压力、市场规模小。
weaknesses.en: Immigration integration challenges, gang violence issues, housing market pressure, small market size.

outlook.zh: 瑞典将继续以科技创新和AI应用见长，北约成员身份增强安全保障，但社会融合挑战需要应对。
outlook.en: Sweden will continue excelling in tech innovation and AI applications; NATO membership enhances security, but social integration challenges need addressing.

description.zh: 瑞典在AI时代以Spotify、Klarna、爱立信等科技独角兽群为核心竞争力，人均独角兽数量仅次于硅谷。Spotify的AI推荐引擎和Klarna的AI客服机器人代表瑞典在AI应用领域的创新实力。2023年结束200年中立传统加入北约是历史性转变。克里斯特松首相领导的右翼联盟政府收紧移民政策应对帮派暴力挑战。
description.en: Sweden's core competitiveness in the AI era lies in its tech unicorn cluster including Spotify, Klarna, and Ericsson; per capita unicorns second only to Silicon Valley. Spotify's AI recommendation engine and Klarna's AI chatbot represent Swedish innovation in AI applications. Ending 200 years of neutrality to join NATO in 2023 is a historic shift. PM Kristersson's right-wing coalition tightens immigration policy to address gang violence challenges.

dynasty.zh: 工党-中心党少数联合政府（哈拉尔五世为君主）
dynasty.en: Labour-Centre Party minority coalition (Harald V as monarch)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，首相由议会产生。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy, PM formed by parliament.

socialStructure.zh: 全球最平等的社会之一，石油财富通过主权基金惠及全民，北欧福利模式典范。
socialStructure.en: Among the world's most egalitarian societies; oil wealth benefits all citizens through the sovereign wealth fund; Nordic welfare model exemplar.

rulingClass.zh: 首相与内阁、议会联盟、王室、主权基金管理者。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, royal house, sovereign fund managers.

succession.zh: 首相由议会产生。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: PM formed by parliament. Monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 一院制议会（169席），首相领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Storting (169 seats), PM leads the cabinet.

name.en: Ministry of Digitalization and Public Governance

function.zh: 推进数字化转型与AI公共服务应用。
function.en: Advances digital transformation and AI public service applications.

localAdmin.zh: 11个郡和356个市镇构成地方治理。
localAdmin.en: 11 counties and 356 municipalities form local governance.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与北欧法律传统结合。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system combined with Nordic legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 以个人所得税（最高47%含地方税）、增值税（25%）、石油特别税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Centered on income tax (up to 47% including local taxes), VAT (25%), and petroleum special tax.

religion.zh: 路德宗为国教传统，但世俗化程度极高
religion.en: Lutheran as traditional state religion, but extremely secularized

philosophy.zh: 社会民主主义与平等主义传统，强调自然保护与可持续发展。
philosophy.en: Social democratic and egalitarian tradition, emphasizing nature conservation and sustainable development.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（挪威语-书面挪威语/新挪威语）

culturalAchievements.zh: 峡湾自然奇观、北欧黑金属音乐、《猎鹿人》等影视作品、诺贝尔和平奖颁奖国、维京遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Fjord natural wonders, Nordic black metal music, film and TV productions, Nobel Peace Prize host, Viking heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（挪威语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (Norwegian as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 石油天然气富国，拥有全球最大主权财富基金（约1.4万亿美元）。经济多元化挑战与绿色转型并行。
gdpDescription.en: Oil and gas-rich nation with the world's largest sovereign wealth fund (~$1.4 trillion). Economic diversification challenges parallel the green transition.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、海洋产业（三文鱼养殖/航运）、可再生能源（水电为主）、金融（主权基金）、科技
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, maritime (salmon farming/shipping), renewable energy (primarily hydropower), finance (sovereign fund), technology

tradeGoods.zh: 石油天然气、三文鱼、航运服务、水电能源
tradeGoods.en: Oil and gas, salmon, shipping services, hydroelectric energy

householdWealth.zh: 全球家庭财富最高国家之一，主权基金人均约26万美元。
householdWealth.en: Among the world's highest household wealth; sovereign fund approximately $260,000 per capita.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与英德贸易密切，作为欧洲天然气主要供应国地位因俄乌战争大幅提升。
tradeRoutes.en: Close trade with UK and Germany; role as Europe's major gas supplier greatly elevated by the Russia-Ukraine war.

economicSystem.zh: 国家资本主义与市场经济结合，石油收入通过主权基金管理，强调代际公平。
economicSystem.en: State capitalism combined with market economy; oil revenues managed through sovereign fund, emphasizing intergenerational equity.

unit.zh: 美元（政府养老基金-全球/主权财富基金）
unit.en: US dollars (Government Pension Fund Global / Sovereign Wealth Fund)

treasuryDescription.zh: 全球最大主权财富基金约1.4万亿美元（约占全球上市公司股份的1.5%），财政实力极为雄厚。
treasuryDescription.en: World's largest sovereign wealth fund at approximately $1.4 trillion (~1.5% of global listed company shares); extremely strong fiscal position.

debtLevel.zh: 净资产国（主权基金远超政府债务）。
debtLevel.en: Net asset state (sovereign fund far exceeds government debt).

fiscalPolicy.zh: 严格的"手提规则"限制主权基金年度提取不超3%，确保代际公平与财政可持续。
fiscalPolicy.en: Strict 'spending rule' limits annual sovereign fund withdrawal to no more than 3%, ensuring intergenerational equity and fiscal sustainability.

description.zh: 聚焦北极防御和与北约盟国联合行动。
description.en: Focused on Arctic defense and joint operations with NATO allies.

description.zh: 保卫漫长海岸线和北大西洋/北极利益。
description.en: Defending the long coastline and North Atlantic/Arctic interests.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王哈拉尔五世（名义），政府（实际）

technology.zh: F-35A战斗机、海军打击导弹（NSM）、北极作战能力、参与北约北翼防御。
technology.en: F-35A fighters, Naval Strike Missile (NSM), Arctic warfare capability, participation in NATO northern flank defense.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯北方舰队和北极军事化为核心安全关切。
threats.en: Russia's Northern Fleet and Arctic militarization as core security concerns.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，加强北约北翼防御与北极安全部署。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; strengthening NATO northern flank defense and Arctic security deployment.

populationDescription.zh: 人口稀少但高度富裕，移民（特别是波兰和叙利亚裔）占人口约18%。
populationDescription.en: Small but highly affluent population; immigrants (especially Polish and Syrian-origin) approximately 18%.

ethnicGroups.zh: 挪威人为主（约82%），波兰裔、叙利亚裔、索马里裔等移民群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Norwegian (~82%), Polish, Syrian, Somali, and other immigrant groups

socialClasses.zh: 全球最平等社会之一，基尼系数极低，石油财富通过主权基金惠及全民。
socialClasses.en: Among the world's most equal societies, extremely low Gini coefficient; oil wealth benefits all citizens through the sovereign fund.

allies.zh: 北约创始成员国、北欧合作体系、与美国和英国关系紧密。
allies.en: NATO founding member, Nordic cooperation system, close US and UK relations.

enemies.zh: 与俄罗斯在北极和巴伦支海存在战略竞争。
enemies.en: Strategic competition with Russia in the Arctic and Barents Sea.

treaties.zh: 北约公约、北欧合作协议、与欧盟EEA协议（非成员国）。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, Nordic cooperation agreements, EEA agreement with EU (non-member).

foreignPolicy.zh: 北约框架下北极安全维护、主权基金的全球ESG投资影响力、国际调解传统。
foreignPolicy.en: Arctic security within NATO framework, sovereign fund's global ESG investment influence, international mediation tradition.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年作为欧洲天然气主要替代供应国影响力提升，主权基金ESG投资决定引发全球关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: In 2023, influence grew as Europe's major alternative gas supplier; sovereign fund ESG investment decisions attracted global attention.

keyInnovations.zh: 海洋能源技术（Equinor）、电动车普及率全球最高、三文鱼养殖自动化、自主航运技术。
keyInnovations.en: Maritime energy technology (Equinor), world's highest EV adoption rate, salmon farming automation, autonomous shipping technology.

infrastructure.zh: 水电提供几乎100%电力、电动车充电网络全球领先、5G网络、北极基础设施。
infrastructure.en: Hydropower provides nearly 100% electricity, world-leading EV charging network, 5G network, Arctic infrastructure.

policy.zh: 挪威国家AI战略聚焦于能源AI、海洋AI和公共部门AI应用，主权基金投资全球AI企业。
policy.en: Norwegian National AI Strategy focuses on energy AI, maritime AI, and public sector AI applications; sovereign fund invests in global AI companies.

regulatoryStance.zh: 通过EEA协议对接欧盟AI法案框架，强调AI伦理与透明度。
regulatoryStance.en: Aligns with the EU AI Act framework through the EEA agreement, emphasizing AI ethics and transparency.

investmentScale.zh: 主权基金通过全球股票投资间接大量投资AI企业（NVIDIA/Microsoft等），国内AI专项投入适中。
investmentScale.en: Sovereign fund massively invests in AI companies indirectly through global equity (NVIDIA/Microsoft etc.); domestic AI-specific investment is moderate.

keyProducts.zh: AI优化油气生产、海上风电AI管理
keyProducts.en: AI-optimized oil and gas production, offshore wind AI management

researchFocus.zh: 能源AI优化、海洋/渔业AI、自主航运、北极环境AI监测。
researchFocus.en: Energy AI optimization, maritime/fishery AI, autonomous shipping, Arctic environment AI monitoring.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 冷气候有利于数据中心冷却，绿色算力（水电）为优势。
computeInfrastructure.en: Cold climate favorable for data center cooling; green compute (hydropower) as an advantage.

talentPool.zh: 挪威科技大学（NTNU）和奥斯陆大学培养AI人才，但人才规模有限。
talentPool.en: NTNU and University of Oslo produce AI talent, but talent scale is limited.

globalRanking.zh: AI领域影响力有限，但通过主权基金投资全球AI产业影响力巨大
globalRanking.en: Limited direct AI influence, but massive global AI industry influence through sovereign fund investment

outlook.zh: 挪威通过主权基金在全球AI投资中拥有独特话语权，国内AI发展聚焦能源和海洋垂直领域。
outlook.en: Norway has a unique voice in global AI investment through its sovereign fund; domestic AI development focuses on energy and maritime verticals.

strengths.zh: 1.4万亿美元主权基金、能源安全保障、全球最平等社会、清洁能源、北极战略位置。
strengths.en: $1.4 trillion sovereign wealth fund, energy security, world's most equal society, clean energy, Arctic strategic position.

weaknesses.zh: 经济对石油依赖、国内市场小、AI产业化有限、绿色转型挑战。
weaknesses.en: Oil economic dependence, small domestic market, limited AI industrialization, green transition challenges.

outlook.zh: 挪威主权基金使其在全球AI投资格局中拥有独特杠杆作用，但国内AI产业需加速发展。
outlook.en: Norway's sovereign fund gives it unique leverage in the global AI investment landscape, but domestic AI industry needs accelerated development.

description.zh: 挪威凭借约1.4万亿美元的主权财富基金在AI时代拥有独特的全球影响力——该基金持有全球上市公司约1.5%的股份（包括大量AI企业）。作为欧洲天然气主要供应国，俄乌战争后挪威能源地缘政治重要性大幅提升。国内AI发展聚焦能源和海洋垂直领域。斯特勒首相领导的少数政府维持稳定治理。全球最高电动车普及率展示绿色转型决心。
description.en: Norway wields unique global influence in the AI era through its approximately $1.4 trillion sovereign wealth fund—holding ~1.5% of global listed companies (including major AI firms). As Europe's major gas supplier, Norway's energy geopolitical importance surged after the Russia-Ukraine war. Domestic AI development focuses on energy and maritime verticals. PM Støre's minority government maintains stable governance. The world's highest EV adoption rate demonstrates green transition commitment.

dynasty.zh: 民族联合党领导的联合政府

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理由议会多数产生，总统由直选产生主管外交。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic, PM from parliamentary majority, president directly elected handling foreign affairs.

socialStructure.zh: 全球教育水平最高的社会之一，PISA评估常年领先，科技与森林产业并重。
socialStructure.en: Among the world's highest-educated societies, consistently leading PISA rankings; technology and forest industries coexist.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、议会联盟、总统（外交）、企业领袖。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, president (foreign affairs), corporate leaders.

succession.zh: 总理由议会多数产生。总统由直选产生，任期六年。
succession.en: PM from parliamentary majority. President directly elected for a six-year term.

structure.zh: 一院制议会（200席），总理领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Parliament (200 seats), PM leads the cabinet.

name.en: Ministry of Economic Affairs and Employment

function.zh: 负责经济政策、就业、创新与数字化。
function.en: Responsible for economic policy, employment, innovation, and digitalization.

localAdmin.zh: 309个市镇为地方自治基本单位。
localAdmin.en: 309 municipalities as the basic unit of local self-governance.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与北欧法律传统结合。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system combined with Nordic legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 高税率模式：个人所得税最高约56%（含地方税），增值税24%，公司税20%。
taxationSystem.en: High-tax model: income tax up to ~56% (including local taxes), VAT 24%, corporate tax 20%.

religion.zh: 路德宗为传统教会（约67%名义成员），世俗化程度高
religion.en: Lutheran as traditional church (~67% nominal members), highly secularized

philosophy.zh: "sisu"（坚韧不拔精神）为芬兰核心价值观，注重平等、教育和自然和谐。
philosophy.en: 'Sisu' (spirit of resilience) as a core Finnish value, emphasizing equality, education, and harmony with nature.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（芬兰语/瑞典语双官方语言）

culturalAchievements.zh: PISA教育奇迹、桑拿文化（UNESCO非遗）、西贝柳斯音乐、诺基亚创新遗产、圣诞老人故乡。
culturalAchievements.en: PISA education miracle, sauna culture (UNESCO heritage), Sibelius music, Nokia innovation heritage, Santa Claus' homeland.

languageFamily.zh: 乌拉尔语系芬兰-乌戈尔语族（芬兰语为主要官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Uralic, Finno-Ugric branch (Finnish as primary official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 创新驱动的北欧经济体，诺基亚转型为5G网络设备商，Silo AI等AI企业崛起。LUMI超算为欧洲AI算力重镇。
gdpDescription.en: An innovation-driven Nordic economy; Nokia transformed into a 5G network equipment maker; Silo AI and other AI companies rising. LUMI supercomputer as a major European AI compute site.

mainIndustries.zh: 电信设备（诺基亚）、林业与纸浆、游戏（Supercell/Rovio）、清洁科技、AI与数据中心
mainIndustries.en: Telecom equipment (Nokia), forestry and pulp, gaming (Supercell/Rovio), cleantech, AI and data centers

tradeGoods.zh: 电信网络设备（诺基亚5G）、纸浆与纸制品、机械、化学品、游戏
tradeGoods.en: Telecom network equipment (Nokia 5G), pulp and paper products, machinery, chemicals, games

householdWealth.zh: 中上水平，福利体系完善，但近年经济增长放缓。
householdWealth.en: Upper-middle level; comprehensive welfare system, but economic growth has slowed recently.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国、瑞典贸易密切，对俄贸易因乌克兰战争几乎中断。
tradeRoutes.en: Close trade with Germany and Sweden; trade with Russia nearly halted due to the Ukraine war.

economicSystem.zh: 北欧社会市场经济，高税高福利与创新驱动并存。
economicSystem.en: Nordic social market economy with high-tax, high-welfare coexisting with innovation-driven growth.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况稳健，北约入盟后国防支出增加。
treasuryDescription.en: Robust fiscal position; defense spending increasing after NATO accession.

debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 73% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 温和紧缩，增加国防支出以履行北约义务，同时维持福利体系。
fiscalPolicy.en: Moderate austerity, increasing defense spending for NATO obligations while maintaining the welfare system.

description.zh: 基于大规模预备役的国土防御体系，战时可动员28万人。
description.en: Homeland defense system based on large-scale reserves; can mobilize 280,000 in wartime.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统（名义），国防军司令（实际）

technology.zh: F/A-18战斗机（即将换装F-35A）、强大的炮兵力量、冬季/森林战能力、大规模预备役体系。
technology.en: F/A-18 fighters (transitioning to F-35A), strong artillery force, winter/forest warfare capability, large-scale reserve system.

threats.zh: 与俄罗斯共享1340公里边境是加入北约的核心动因。
threats.en: Sharing a 1,340km border with Russia is the core driver of NATO accession.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战。2023年4月正式加入北约，结束军事不结盟传统。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat. Formally joined NATO in April 2023, ending military non-alignment tradition.

populationDescription.zh: 人口老龄化趋势，出生率下降，依赖移民补充劳动力。
populationDescription.en: Population aging trend, declining birth rate, relying on immigration to supplement the labor force.

ethnicGroups.zh: 芬兰人为主（约93%），瑞典语少数族群（约5%），移民增长
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Finnish (~93%), Swedish-speaking minority (~5%), growing immigration

socialClasses.zh: 高度平等的北欧模式，教育机会均等（免费高等教育），但经济增长放缓带来就业压力。
socialClasses.en: Highly egalitarian Nordic model with equal education opportunities (free higher education), but slowing growth creates employment pressure.

allies.zh: 北约新成员（2023年加入）、欧盟成员国、北欧合作体系、与爱沙尼亚跨波罗的海合作。
allies.en: New NATO member (joined 2023), EU member, Nordic cooperation, cross-Baltic cooperation with Estonia.

enemies.zh: 俄罗斯为加入北约的核心原因（1340公里共同边界）。
enemies.en: Russia as core reason for NATO accession (1,340km shared border).

treaties.zh: 北约公约（2023年）、欧盟条约、北欧合作协议。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty (2023), EU treaties, Nordic cooperation agreements.

foreignPolicy.zh: 结束军事不结盟加入北约、维护欧盟团结、管理对俄关系、北极合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Ending military non-alignment to join NATO, maintaining EU unity, managing Russia relations, Arctic cooperation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年4月正式加入北约，创芬兰外交政策最重大转变。关闭东部对俄边境口岸应对移民施压。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Formally joined NATO in April 2023, the most significant shift in Finnish foreign policy. Closed eastern border crossings with Russia to address migration pressure.

keyInnovations.zh: LUMI超级计算机（欧洲最快之一/全球第三）、诺基亚5G/6G技术、AI教育创新、游戏AI（Supercell）。
keyInnovations.en: LUMI supercomputer (among Europe's fastest/3rd globally), Nokia 5G/6G technology, AI education innovation, game AI (Supercell).

infrastructure.zh: LUMI超算中心（卡亚尼）、诺基亚5G测试网络、高速宽带覆盖、冷气候数据中心优势。
infrastructure.en: LUMI supercomputing center (Kajaani), Nokia 5G test networks, high-speed broadband coverage, cold climate data center advantage.

policy.zh: 芬兰AI战略"AI 4.0"聚焦于利用LUMI超算能力和AI教育（Elements of AI全民课程）推动全民AI素养与AI产业发展。
policy.en: Finland's AI strategy 'AI 4.0' focuses on leveraging LUMI supercomputing and AI education (Elements of AI public course) to advance national AI literacy and industry.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，以教育和赋能为导向的AI治理理念。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework with an education-and-empowerment-oriented AI governance philosophy.

investmentScale.zh: 芬兰AI投资规模相对小国而言突出，LUMI超算耗资约2亿欧元，Silo AI融资可观。
investmentScale.en: Finnish AI investment is notable for a small country; LUMI cost approximately €200 million; Silo AI has secured notable funding.

capabilities.zh: 北欧语言优化的大语言模型，在芬兰语和北欧语言理解方面表现出色。
capabilities.en: Nordic language-optimized LLMs, excelling in Finnish and Nordic language understanding.

keyProducts.zh: Viking/Poro北欧大语言模型、企业AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: Viking/Poro Nordic LLMs, enterprise AI solutions

keyProducts.zh: 5G/6G网络AI优化、网络自动化
keyProducts.en: 5G/6G network AI optimization, network automation

contribution.zh: 创办北欧最大私营AI实验室Silo AI，利用LUMI超算训练北欧语言大模型。
contribution.en: Founded Silo AI, the largest private Nordic AI lab, training Nordic language LLMs on the LUMI supercomputer.

researchFocus.zh: 高性能计算与AI训练、北欧语言NLP、5G/6G网络AI、AI教育与全民素养、游戏AI。
researchFocus.en: HPC and AI training, Nordic NLP, 5G/6G network AI, AI education and national literacy, game AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: LUMI超级计算机（全球第三，欧洲最快之一）位于卡亚尼，是欧洲AI训练的核心算力资源。冷气候和清洁水电为数据中心提供天然优势。
computeInfrastructure.en: LUMI supercomputer (3rd globally, among Europe's fastest) located in Kajaani, a core European AI training compute resource. Cold climate and clean hydropower provide natural data center advantages.

talentPool.zh: 阿尔托大学、赫尔辛基大学培养AI人才，"Elements of AI"课程使超1%芬兰人口完成AI基础教育。
talentPool.en: Aalto University, University of Helsinki produce AI talent; 'Elements of AI' course enabled over 1% of Finland's population to complete AI basic education.

globalRanking.zh: 人均AI实力全球前列，LUMI超算为欧洲AI训练关键基础设施，综合约第12-15位
globalRanking.en: Per capita AI strength among global leaders; LUMI as key European AI training infrastructure; comprehensive approximately 12th-15th

outlook.zh: 芬兰以LUMI超算和AI全民教育为双引擎，在小国AI发展中树立典范。
outlook.en: Finland uses LUMI supercomputing and national AI education as dual engines, setting an example for small-country AI development.

strengths.zh: LUMI超算（欧洲AI算力重镇）、AI全民教育领先、诺基亚5G/6G、Silo AI北欧大模型、高教育水平。
strengths.en: LUMI supercomputer (European AI compute hub), leading national AI education, Nokia 5G/6G, Silo AI Nordic LLMs, high education levels.

weaknesses.zh: 经济增长放缓、市场规模小、对俄关系紧张、人口老龄化。
weaknesses.en: Slowing economic growth, small market size, tense Russia relations, population aging.

outlook.zh: 芬兰LUMI超算为欧洲AI研究提供关键算力，Silo AI和全民AI教育展示小国AI发展的创新路径。
outlook.en: Finland's LUMI provides crucial compute for European AI research; Silo AI and national AI education demonstrate innovative small-country AI development paths.

description.zh: 芬兰在AI时代以LUMI超级计算机（全球第三、欧洲最快之一）和全民AI教育为核心名片。Silo AI作为北欧最大私营AI实验室利用LUMI训练北欧语言大模型。2023年4月芬兰正式加入北约（1340公里俄芬边境是核心动因），结束军事不结盟传统。奥尔波总理领导的联合政府推进财政紧缩。诺基亚从手机巨头转型为5G/6G网络设备商。"Elements of AI"课程使超1%芬兰人口完成AI基础教育，为全球AI教育典范。
description.en: Finland's core calling cards in the AI era are the LUMI supercomputer (3rd globally, among Europe's fastest) and national AI education. Silo AI, the largest private Nordic AI lab, trains Nordic language LLMs on LUMI. Finland formally joined NATO in April 2023 (the 1,340km Finland-Russia border as core driver), ending military non-alignment. PM Orpo's coalition pursues fiscal austerity. Nokia transformed from mobile giant to 5G/6G network equipment maker. 'Elements of AI' enabled over 1% of Finland's population to complete AI basic education, setting a global AI education model.

dynasty.zh: 社会民主党领导的大联合政府（弗雷德里克十世为君主）
dynasty.en: Social Democrats-led grand coalition (Frederik X as monarch)

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪国，首相由议会产生。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy, PM formed by parliament.

socialStructure.zh: 全球幸福指数领先的北欧福利国家，"hygge"文化，社会信任度极高。
socialStructure.en: Nordic welfare state leading global happiness indexes, 'hygge' culture, extremely high social trust.

rulingClass.zh: 首相与内阁、议会联盟、王室、企业精英（马士基/乐高/诺和诺德）。
rulingClass.en: PM and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, royal house, corporate elites (Maersk/LEGO/Novo Nordisk).

succession.zh: 首相由议会产生。君主世袭继承。
succession.en: PM formed by parliament. Monarchy is hereditary.

structure.zh: 一院制议会（179席，含格陵兰2席和法罗群岛2席），首相领导内阁。
structure.en: Unicameral Folketing (179 seats, including 2 from Greenland and 2 from Faroe Islands), PM leads the cabinet.

name.en: Ministry of Digitalization and Gender Equality

function.zh: 推进数字化政府与AI公共服务。
function.en: Advances digital government and AI public services.

localAdmin.zh: 5个大区和98个市镇构成地方治理，格陵兰和法罗群岛享有高度自治。
localAdmin.en: 5 regions and 98 municipalities form local governance; Greenland and Faroe Islands enjoy high autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与北欧法律传统结合。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system combined with Nordic legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 全球最高税率之一：个人所得税最高约55%，增值税25%，公司税22%。
taxationSystem.en: Among the world's highest tax rates: income tax up to ~55%, VAT 25%, corporate tax 22%.

religion.zh: 路德宗为国教（约74%名义成员），世俗化程度极高
religion.en: Lutheran as state religion (~74% nominal members), extremely secularized

philosophy.zh: "hygge"（舒适惬意）文化、克尔凯郭尔存在主义遗产、社会信任与平等理念。
philosophy.en: 'Hygge' (coziness) culture, Kierkegaard's existentialist legacy, social trust and equality ideals.

culturalAchievements.zh: 乐高玩具文化、安徒生童话遗产、"新北欧美食"运动（Noma餐厅）、丹麦设计简约美学。
culturalAchievements.en: LEGO toy culture, Hans Christian Andersen fairy tale heritage, 'New Nordic Cuisine' movement (Noma restaurant), Danish design minimalist aesthetics.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（丹麦语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (Danish as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 高度发达的小型开放经济体，诺和诺德（GLP-1减肥药全球狂潮）使丹麦股市和经济超常增长。清洁能源领先。
gdpDescription.en: A highly developed small open economy; Novo Nordisk (global GLP-1 weight loss drug craze) drives extraordinary Danish stock market and economic growth. Clean energy leader.

mainIndustries.zh: 制药（诺和诺德/灵北）、航运（马士基）、风能（维斯塔斯/沃旭）、玩具（乐高）、食品（嘉士伯/丹麦皇冠）
mainIndustries.en: Pharmaceuticals (Novo Nordisk/Lundbeck), shipping (Maersk), wind energy (Vestas/Ørsted), toys (LEGO), food (Carlsberg/Danish Crown)

tradeGoods.zh: 药品（Wegovy/Ozempic）、风力发电设备、航运服务、乐高、食品
tradeGoods.en: Pharmaceuticals (Wegovy/Ozempic), wind energy equipment, shipping services, LEGO, food

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平高，但个人债务率也高（全球最高之一）。
householdWealth.en: High household wealth, but personal debt ratio also high (among the world's highest).

tradeRoutes.zh: 与德国、瑞典贸易密切，诺和诺德药品出口至全球，马士基航运网络覆盖全球。
tradeRoutes.en: Close trade with Germany and Sweden; Novo Nordisk pharmaceutical exports worldwide; Maersk shipping network covers the globe.

economicSystem.zh: 北欧灵活安全模式（flexicurity）：灵活劳动力市场与慷慨社会保障结合。
economicSystem.en: Nordic flexicurity model: flexible labor market combined with generous social security.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政状况极为健康，诺和诺德税收贡献使丹麦政府盈余。
treasuryDescription.en: Extremely healthy fiscal position; Novo Nordisk tax contributions generate government surplus for Denmark.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的29%，欧洲最低之一。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 29% of GDP, among Europe's lowest.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理，诺和诺德带来的意外税收推升财政盈余，增加国防支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management; windfall tax revenue from Novo Nordisk boosts fiscal surplus; increasing defense spending.

description.zh: 参与北约任务，负责格陵兰与法罗群岛防御。
description.en: Participates in NATO missions; responsible for Greenland and Faroe Islands defense.

description.zh: 巡逻北大西洋与北极水域（格陵兰）。
description.en: Patrols North Atlantic and Arctic waters (Greenland).

commanderInChief.zh: 国王弗雷德里克十世（名义），政府（实际）

technology.zh: F-35A战斗机采购中、参与北约联合防御、北极巡逻能力。
