technology.en: F-35A procurement underway, participation in NATO joint defense, Arctic patrol capability.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯北极活动与波罗的海安全、格陵兰战略重要性提升。
threats.en: Russian Arctic activity and Baltic Sea security; Greenland's rising strategic importance.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接作战，加强北极与波罗的海防御部署。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat; strengthening Arctic and Baltic defense deployments.

populationDescription.zh: 高度城市化的小国，移民融合政策近年收紧，全球幸福指数常年名列前茅。
populationDescription.en: A highly urbanized small country; immigration integration policies tightened recently; consistently ranks among the top in global happiness indexes.

ethnicGroups.zh: 丹麦人为主（约86%），移民及后裔约14%
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Danish (~86%), immigrants and descendants approximately 14%

socialClasses.zh: 极高社会平等度，灵活安全模式保障就业流动性与社会保障兼顾。
socialClasses.en: Extremely high social equality; flexicurity model balances employment mobility with social security.

allies.zh: 北约成员国、欧盟成员国（有四项豁免）、北欧合作体系。
allies.en: NATO member, EU member (with four opt-outs), Nordic cooperation system.

enemies.zh: 无显著敌对关系，但关注俄罗斯北极活动。
enemies.en: No significant hostile relations, but attentive to Russian Arctic activity.

treaties.zh: 北约公约、欧盟条约（保留四项豁免包括欧元）、北欧合作协议。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU treaties (retaining four opt-outs including the euro), Nordic cooperation agreements.

foreignPolicy.zh: 北大西洋与北极安全、格陵兰地缘战略管理、绿色外交、北欧合作。
foreignPolicy.en: North Atlantic and Arctic security, Greenland geostrategic management, green diplomacy, Nordic cooperation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年格陵兰稀土与关键矿产吸引美中地缘政治竞争关注，丹麦加强北极军事部署。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Greenland's rare earths and critical minerals attracted US-China geopolitical competition attention in 2023; Denmark strengthened Arctic military deployment.

keyInnovations.zh: 诺和诺德AI药物发现（GLP-1药物全球现象）、风能技术（维斯塔斯/沃旭）、量子计算研究。
keyInnovations.en: Novo Nordisk AI drug discovery (GLP-1 drugs global phenomenon), wind energy technology (Vestas/Ørsted), quantum computing research.

infrastructure.zh: 风力发电占比全球领先（超50%电力）、高度数字化政府服务、哥本哈根智慧城市。
infrastructure.en: World-leading wind power share (over 50% of electricity), highly digitalized government services, Copenhagen smart city.

policy.zh: 丹麦国家AI战略聚焦于制药AI（诺和诺德）、清洁能源AI优化与公共部门AI应用。
policy.en: Danish National AI Strategy focuses on pharmaceutical AI (Novo Nordisk), clean energy AI optimization, and public sector AI applications.

regulatoryStance.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架（保留欧盟四项豁免但AI政策对标欧盟），强调负责任AI。
regulatoryStance.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework (retains four EU opt-outs but aligns AI policy with EU), emphasizing responsible AI.

investmentScale.zh: 诺和诺德在AI药物研发投入巨大，政府AI投资约10亿丹麦克朗。
investmentScale.en: Novo Nordisk invests heavily in AI drug R&D; government AI investment approximately DKK 1 billion.

valuation.zh: 市值超4000亿美元（欧洲市值最高公司）
valuation.en: Market cap over $400 billion (Europe's most valuable company)

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的GLP-1药物研发（Wegovy/Ozempic全球爆款）
keyProducts.en: AI-driven GLP-1 drug discovery (Wegovy/Ozempic global blockbusters)

keyProducts.zh: AI优化航运物流、数字化供应链平台
keyProducts.en: AI-optimized shipping logistics, digitalized supply chain platform

researchFocus.zh: AI药物发现（特别是GLP-1类药物）、清洁能源AI、智能航运、量子计算与AI交叉。
researchFocus.en: AI drug discovery (especially GLP-1 drugs), clean energy AI, smart shipping, quantum computing-AI intersection.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 通过北欧数据中心和欧盟HPC项目获取算力，正规划建设AI专用基础设施。
computeInfrastructure.en: Accesses compute through Nordic data centers and EU HPC projects; planning AI-dedicated infrastructure.

talentPool.zh: 哥本哈根大学、丹麦技术大学（DTU）培养AI人才。
talentPool.en: University of Copenhagen, Technical University of Denmark (DTU) produce AI talent.

globalRanking.zh: 制药AI领域全球领先（诺和诺德），AI综合约第15-18位
globalRanking.en: Global leader in pharmaceutical AI (Novo Nordisk), comprehensive AI approximately 15th-18th

outlook.zh: 丹麦以诺和诺德制药AI和清洁能源AI为独特优势，在垂直领域AI应用中走在全球前列。
outlook.en: Denmark uses Novo Nordisk pharmaceutical AI and clean energy AI as unique advantages, leading globally in vertical AI applications.

strengths.zh: 诺和诺德全球制药AI领导者、清洁能源领先、高社会信任度与幸福指数、灵活安全模式。
strengths.en: Novo Nordisk global pharmaceutical AI leader, clean energy leadership, high social trust and happiness index, flexicurity model.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖诺和诺德、市场规模小、格陵兰地缘政治复杂性。
weaknesses.en: Economy over-dependent on Novo Nordisk, small market size, Greenland geopolitical complexity.

outlook.zh: 丹麦因诺和诺德的AI药物研发成功在制药AI领域拥有全球影响力，但需防范单一企业依赖风险。
outlook.en: Denmark has global influence in pharmaceutical AI due to Novo Nordisk's AI drug R&D success, but must guard against single-company dependence risk.

description.zh: 丹麦在AI时代因诺和诺德而璀璨——这家制药巨头以AI驱动的GLP-1减肥/糖尿病药物（Wegovy/Ozempic）引发全球热潮，市值超4000亿美元成为欧洲最有价值公司。马士基在航运AI优化和数字化物流方面领先。弗雷泽里克森首相领导的大联合政府维持社会稳定。风力发电占比超50%展示清洁能源承诺。格陵兰稀土资源使丹麦处于大国地缘博弈焦点。
description.en: Denmark shines in the AI era thanks to Novo Nordisk—this pharma giant's AI-driven GLP-1 weight loss/diabetes drugs (Wegovy/Ozempic) sparked a global craze, with market cap exceeding $400 billion to become Europe's most valuable company. Maersk leads in shipping AI optimization and digital logistics. PM Frederiksen's grand coalition maintains social stability. Wind power exceeding 50% share demonstrates clean energy commitment. Greenland's rare earth resources place Denmark at the center of great power geopolitical competition.

dynasty.zh: 统一党-共和党-绿党联合政府

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理（Taoiseach）由议会选出，总统为虚位元首。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic, Taoiseach elected by parliament, president as ceremonial head.

socialStructure.zh: 从传统农业国快速转型为科技枢纽，跨国公司欧洲总部带动经济繁荣，住房危机为社会焦点。
socialStructure.en: Rapidly transformed from traditional agricultural country to tech hub; multinational European HQs drive prosperity; housing crisis as social focal point.

rulingClass.zh: 总理与内阁、议会联盟、总统、跨国科技企业高管。
rulingClass.en: Taoiseach and cabinet, parliamentary coalition, president, multinational tech executives.

succession.zh: 总理由议会多数产生。总统由直选产生，任期七年。
succession.en: Taoiseach from parliamentary majority. President directly elected for a seven-year term.

structure.zh: 两院制：众议院（Dáil，160席）与参议院（Seanad，60席），总理领导内阁。
structure.en: Bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 seats) and Seanad Éireann (60 seats), Taoiseach leads the cabinet.

name.en: Department of Enterprise, Trade and Employment

function.zh: 管理企业政策、外资吸引、贸易与就业。
function.en: Manages enterprise policy, foreign investment attraction, trade, and employment.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法系，以宪法为最高法律。
legalSystem.en: Common law system with the constitution as supreme law.

taxationSystem.zh: 公司税12.5%（2023年对大企业提至15%，配合OECD全球最低税率）、个人所得税最高40%、增值税23%。
taxationSystem.en: Corporate tax 12.5% (raised to 15% for large companies in 2023, per OECD global minimum tax), income tax up to 40%, VAT 23%.

religion.zh: 天主教传统深厚（约78%文化认同），但近年世俗化快速推进（同性婚姻与堕胎公投）
religion.en: Deep Catholic tradition (~78% cultural identification), but rapid secularization in recent years (same-sex marriage and abortion referendums)

philosophy.zh: 凯尔特文化传统与天主教遗产交融，当代以创新创业精神与社会进步主义为特色。
philosophy.en: Celtic cultural tradition blended with Catholic heritage; contemporary characteristics include entrepreneurial spirit and social progressivism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语/爱尔兰语双官方语言）

culturalAchievements.zh: 文学传统（叶芝/乔伊斯/王尔德/贝克特四位诺贝尔文学奖）、爱尔兰音乐、吉尼斯啤酒、圣帕特里克节全球影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Literary tradition (Yeats/Joyce/Wilde/Beckett, four Nobel Literature laureates), Irish music, Guinness beer, St. Patrick's Day global influence.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（英语日耳曼语族/爱尔兰语凯尔特语族）

gdpDescription.zh: GDP因跨国公司利润记账而虚高（修正后国民收入更能反映实际），Apple/Google/Meta欧洲总部带来巨额税收。经济活力强劲。
gdpDescription.en: GDP inflated by multinational profit booking (modified GNI better reflects reality); Apple/Google/Meta European HQs bring enormous tax revenue. Strong economic vitality.

mainIndustries.zh: 跨国科技企业欧洲总部（Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft）、制药（辉瑞/强生爱尔兰工厂）、金融服务、农业
mainIndustries.en: Multinational tech European HQs (Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft), pharmaceuticals (Pfizer/J&J Irish facilities), financial services, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 药品、医疗器械、软件与数据服务、乳制品、威士忌
tradeGoods.en: Pharmaceuticals, medical devices, software and data services, dairy products, whiskey

householdWealth.zh: 快速增长但住房危机严重，都柏林房价/租金为社会最大民怨之一。
householdWealth.en: Growing rapidly but housing crisis is severe; Dublin housing prices/rents are among the public's biggest grievances.

tradeRoutes.zh: 与美国和英国贸易紧密，作为跨国公司欧盟门户，欧盟单一市场为核心。
tradeRoutes.en: Close trade with the US and UK, serving as multinational gateway to the EU, EU single market as core.

economicSystem.zh: 开放型市场经济，低公司税率为核心竞争力吸引跨国总部，但面临全球最低税率改革压力。
economicSystem.en: Open market economy with low corporate tax as core competitiveness attracting multinational HQs, but facing global minimum tax reform pressure.

treasuryDescription.zh: 苹果130亿欧元税收裁决赔偿金创造意外财政盈余，科技巨头税收使爱尔兰财政状况极好。
treasuryDescription.en: Apple's €13 billion tax ruling payment created a windfall fiscal surplus; tech giant taxes make Ireland's fiscal position excellent.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的44%，快速下降中。
debtLevel.en: Government debt at approximately 44% of GDP, declining rapidly.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政盈余持续，苹果税收裁决赔偿金和跨国公司税收带来意外之财，政府设立未来基金。
fiscalPolicy.en: Continued fiscal surplus; Apple tax ruling payment and multinational tax revenues create windfall; government established a future fund.

description.zh: 小规模国防力量，保持军事中立传统，参与联合国维和。
description.en: Small defense force maintaining military neutrality tradition, participating in UN peacekeeping.

technology.zh: 轻型装备为主，无战斗机，专注维和与海上巡逻。保持军事中立。
technology.en: Primarily light equipment, no fighter jets, focused on peacekeeping and maritime patrol. Maintains military neutrality.

threats.zh: 军事威胁极低，主要关注海上安全与网络安全。
threats.en: Military threats extremely low; main concerns are maritime and cyber security.

recentBattles.zh: 无作战行动，保持军事中立，参与联合国维和任务。
recentBattles.en: No combat operations; maintains military neutrality; participates in UN peacekeeping.

populationDescription.zh: 人口在欧洲中增长较快，科技行业吸引大量国际移民，住房供应严重不足。
populationDescription.en: Population growing faster than European average; tech industry attracts substantial international immigration; severe housing supply shortage.

ethnicGroups.zh: 爱尔兰人为主（约82%），其他欧盟国民（约12%）、亚非移民增长
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Irish (~82%), other EU nationals (~12%), growing Asian and African immigrant communities

socialClasses.zh: 科技行业高薪群体与传统行业工人的收入差距扩大，住房危机加剧社会分化。
socialClasses.en: Growing income gap between high-paid tech workers and traditional industry workers; housing crisis intensifies social division.

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国，与美国关系特殊（大量爱裔美国人），保持军事中立（不加入北约）。
allies.en: EU member, special relationship with the US (large Irish-American diaspora), maintains military neutrality (not joining NATO).

enemies.zh: 无直接敌对关系。北爱尔兰问题虽经《贝尔法斯特协议》缓和但仍需管理。
enemies.en: No direct hostile relations. Northern Ireland issue eased by the Belfast Agreement but still requires management.

treaties.zh: 欧盟条约、《贝尔法斯特协议》、温莎框架（脱欧后北爱安排）。
treaties.en: EU treaties, Belfast Agreement, Windsor Framework (post-Brexit Northern Ireland arrangement).

foreignPolicy.zh: 亲欧立场、维持军事中立、管理脱欧后英爱关系、跨国公司友好型政策。
foreignPolicy.en: Pro-European stance, maintaining military neutrality, managing post-Brexit UK-Ireland relations, multinational-friendly policies.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年温莎框架签署缓解北爱贸易争端，苹果130亿欧元税收裁决落实。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Windsor Framework signed in 2023 easing Northern Ireland trade disputes; Apple €13 billion tax ruling implemented.

keyInnovations.zh: Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft欧洲总部运营、数据中心集群、制药生产技术、金融科技。
keyInnovations.en: Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft European HQ operations, data center clusters, pharmaceutical production technology, fintech.

infrastructure.zh: 都柏林科技走廊、欧洲最大数据中心集群之一、制药生产基地、跨大西洋海底光缆登陆点。
infrastructure.en: Dublin tech corridor, one of Europe's largest data center clusters, pharmaceutical production base, transatlantic submarine cable landing point.

policy.zh: 爱尔兰AI战略依托跨国科技总部生态，Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft在爱尔兰的AI研发和数据中心运营构成事实上的AI产业集群。
policy.en: Irish AI strategy leverages the multinational tech HQ ecosystem; Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft AI R&D and data center operations in Ireland constitute a de facto AI industry cluster.

regulatoryStance.zh: 作为多家科技巨头欧洲总部所在地，爱尔兰数据保护委员会（DPC）在执行GDPR方面具有关键角色，AI监管态度平衡。
regulatoryStance.en: As host of multiple tech giants' European HQs, Ireland's Data Protection Commission (DPC) plays a critical role in GDPR enforcement, with a balanced AI regulatory approach.

investmentScale.zh: 跨国公司在爱尔兰的AI研发投入巨大（Apple/Google/Meta各有数十亿美元级研发中心），但本土AI企业较少。
investmentScale.en: Multinational AI R&D investment in Ireland is massive (Apple/Google/Meta each with multi-billion-dollar R&D centers), but local AI companies are fewer.

valuation.zh: Apple市值超3万亿美元（欧洲总部在科克）
valuation.en: Apple market cap over $3 trillion (European HQ in Cork)

keyProducts.zh: Apple Intelligence、Siri AI、机器学习框架
keyProducts.en: Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, machine learning frameworks

valuation.zh: Alphabet子公司（欧洲总部在都柏林）

keyProducts.zh: Google搜索AI、Gemini欧洲运营、Google Cloud AI
keyProducts.en: Google Search AI, Gemini European operations, Google Cloud AI

valuation.zh: Meta子公司（欧洲总部在都柏林）

keyProducts.zh: Llama模型欧洲运营、Instagram/WhatsApp AI功能
keyProducts.en: Llama model European operations, Instagram/WhatsApp AI features

researchFocus.zh: 跨国公司AI欧洲研发（搜索/社交/云AI）、数据保护与AI合规、制药AI。
researchFocus.en: Multinational AI European R&D (search/social/cloud AI), data protection and AI compliance, pharmaceutical AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 欧洲最大数据中心集群之一（都柏林），Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft/AWS均在爱尔兰运营大规模数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: One of Europe's largest data center clusters (Dublin); Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft/AWS all operate large-scale data centers in Ireland.

talentPool.zh: 都柏林三一学院和都柏林大学培养AI人才，跨国公司吸引大量国际AI工程师。
talentPool.en: Trinity College Dublin and University College Dublin produce AI talent; multinationals attract large numbers of international AI engineers.

globalRanking.zh: 作为科技巨头欧洲枢纽拥有超越国家体量的AI产业存在感，综合约第12-15位
globalRanking.en: As a tech giant European hub, has AI industry presence beyond national size; comprehensive approximately 12th-15th

outlook.zh: 爱尔兰作为科技巨头欧洲总部所在地在AI基础设施和人才方面拥有独特优势，但本土AI企业发展需加强。
outlook.en: Ireland has unique advantages in AI infrastructure and talent as host of tech giant European HQs, but local AI company development needs strengthening.

strengths.zh: Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft欧洲总部、欧洲最大数据中心集群、英语优势、低公司税、年轻人口。
strengths.en: Apple/Google/Meta/Microsoft European HQs, among Europe's largest data center clusters, English-language advantage, low corporate tax, young population.

weaknesses.zh: 住房危机严重、过度依赖跨国公司、全球最低税率改革威胁、本土AI企业少。
weaknesses.en: Severe housing crisis, over-dependence on multinationals, global minimum tax reform threat, few local AI companies.

outlook.zh: 爱尔兰作为科技巨头欧洲门户的地位在AI时代进一步巩固，但需发展本土创新生态减少依赖。
outlook.en: Ireland's position as tech giants' European gateway is further consolidated in the AI era, but must develop local innovation ecosystem to reduce dependence.

description.zh: 爱尔兰在AI时代作为Apple、Google、Meta、Microsoft等科技巨头的欧洲总部所在地拥有独特战略地位。都柏林拥有欧洲最大的数据中心集群之一，是这些企业AI产品和服务面向欧洲市场的运营中枢。12.5%的低公司税率（大企业已调至15%配合OECD改革）持续吸引跨国投资。瓦拉德卡总理领导的三党联盟政府面临严重住房危机。苹果130亿欧元税收裁决赔偿金为政府带来意外之财。
description.en: Ireland holds a unique strategic position in the AI era as European headquarters for Apple, Google, Meta, Microsoft, and other tech giants. Dublin hosts one of Europe's largest data center clusters, serving as the operational hub for these companies' AI products and services for the European market. The 12.5% low corporate tax (raised to 15% for large companies per OECD reform) continues attracting multinational investment. PM Varadkar's three-party coalition faces a severe housing crisis. Apple's €13 billion tax ruling payment created a government windfall.

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，战时总统权力扩大，戒严令下部分宪法权利暂停。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic with expanded presidential powers during wartime; some constitutional rights suspended under martial law.

socialStructure.zh: 战争重塑社会结构，约600万人流离海外，IT行业成为经济韧性支柱，全民抵抗意识空前团结。
socialStructure.en: War has reshaped social structure; approximately 6 million displaced abroad; IT industry as an economic resilience pillar; unprecedented national resistance unity.

rulingClass.zh: 总统泽连斯基与战时内阁、军事指挥部、IT精英、民间志愿者网络。
rulingClass.en: President Zelenskyy and wartime cabinet, military command, IT elites, civilian volunteer networks.

succession.zh: 总统由直选产生，任期五年。战时选举推迟，泽连斯基任期因戒严令延续。
succession.en: President directly elected for a five-year term. Wartime elections postponed; Zelenskyy's term extended under martial law.

structure.zh: 一院制最高拉达（450席），战时总统权力显著扩大，军事行政并行运作。
structure.en: Unicameral Verkhovna Rada (450 seats); presidential powers significantly expanded in wartime; military and civilian administration operate in parallel.

function.zh: 推进数字政府（Diia平台）、IT产业支持与AI军事应用协调。
function.en: Advances digital government (Diia platform), IT industry support, and AI military application coordination.

function.zh: 领导乌克兰武装力量抗俄作战。
function.en: Leads Ukrainian Armed Forces in combat against Russia.

localAdmin.zh: 24个州和克里米亚自治共和国（被占领），战时军事行政机构与地方政府并行。
localAdmin.en: 24 oblasts and Crimean Autonomous Republic (occupied); wartime military administrations operate alongside local governments.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以宪法为基础，战时戒严令赋予政府特别权力。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the constitution; wartime martial law grants the government special powers.

taxationSystem.zh: 战时税收制度简化，IT行业享受特别税收优惠（5%简化税制），国际援助为主要财政来源。
taxationSystem.en: Wartime tax system simplified; IT industry enjoys special tax benefits (5% simplified taxation); international aid as primary fiscal source.

religion.zh: 东正教为主（乌克兰正教会在战争中脱离莫斯科教区独立），希腊天主教次之
religion.en: Orthodox predominant (Ukrainian Orthodox Church separated from Moscow Patriarchate during war), Greek Catholic secondary

philosophy.zh: 战争激发空前的民族认同与抵抗意志，"乌克兰韧性"成为全球叙事，数字化创新与军事创意结合。
philosophy.en: War has sparked unprecedented national identity and resistance will; 'Ukrainian resilience' has become a global narrative; digital innovation merges with military creativity.

culturalAchievements.zh: 战时文化韧性（泽连斯基全球演讲）、Diia数字政府平台、IT外包产业、Grammarly（乌克兰裔创办）、AI无人机创新。
culturalAchievements.en: Wartime cultural resilience (Zelenskyy's global addresses), Diia digital government platform, IT outsourcing industry, Grammarly (Ukrainian-founded), AI drone innovation.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系斯拉夫语族（乌克兰语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Slavic branch (Ukrainian as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 战争导致GDP大幅萎缩（2022年下降29%），2023年在国际援助下恢复增长约5%。IT行业成为战时经济韧性支柱，约占GDP的5%。
gdpDescription.en: War caused massive GDP contraction (29% decline in 2022); 2023 recovery of approximately 5% with international aid. IT industry as wartime economic resilience pillar, approximately 5% of GDP.

mainIndustries.zh: IT与软件外包（战时经济支柱）、农业（黑土粮仓）、军工（AI无人机）、矿业、钢铁
mainIndustries.en: IT and software outsourcing (wartime economic pillar), agriculture (black soil breadbasket), defense industry (AI drones), mining, steel

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物与农产品、IT服务、钢铁、矿石、AI无人机技术
tradeGoods.en: Grain and agricultural products, IT services, steel, ores, AI drone technology

householdWealth.zh: 战争造成大规模财富损失，数百万家庭流离失所，基础设施遭到大规模破坏。
householdWealth.en: War caused massive wealth destruction; millions of families displaced; infrastructure suffered large-scale destruction.

tradeRoutes.zh: 黑海粮食出口通道经战争中断后部分恢复，欧盟贸易优惠加速西向经济转型。
tradeRoutes.en: Black Sea grain export corridor partially restored after wartime disruption; EU trade preferences accelerate westward economic transformation.

economicSystem.zh: 战时经济体制，政府管控加强，国际援助约占财政收入50%以上。
economicSystem.en: Wartime economic system with strengthened government control; international aid accounts for over 50% of fiscal revenue.

unit.zh: 美元等值储备（含冻结俄罗斯资产利息支持）
unit.en: US dollar equivalent reserves (including frozen Russian assets interest support)

treasuryDescription.zh: 高度依赖国际援助维持财政运转，西方盟友承诺长期支持，冻结俄罗斯资产利息被用于支援乌克兰。
treasuryDescription.en: Highly dependent on international aid for fiscal operations; Western allies pledge long-term support; interest from frozen Russian assets used to support Ukraine.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务因战争大幅攀升，约占GDP的85%，但部分债务已获延期和优惠条款。
debtLevel.en: Government debt surged due to war, approximately 85% of GDP, but some debt has obtained deferral and favorable terms.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 战时财政最大化军事支出，国际援助为生命线，同时努力维持基本公共服务。
fiscalPolicy.en: Wartime fiscal policy maximizes military spending; international aid as lifeline; striving to maintain basic public services.

description.zh: 经历两年战争洗礼的实战力量，AI无人机战术创新引领现代战争新模式。
description.en: Battle-hardened force through two years of war; AI drone tactical innovation leading new modes of modern warfare.

description.zh: 全球首支大规模系统化部署AI辅助无人机的作战力量，FPV无人机改变战场态势。
description.en: World's first force to systematically deploy AI-assisted drones at scale; FPV drones changing battlefield dynamics.

description.zh: 在防空导弹保护下维持有限空中行动能力，等待F-16交付。
description.en: Maintains limited air operations under air defense missile protection; awaiting F-16 deliveries.

technology.zh: AI辅助FPV自杀式无人机（全球首创大规模战场应用）、HIMARS精确打击、爱国者/IRIS-T防空、水面无人艇、海马斯远程火力。
technology.en: AI-assisted FPV kamikaze drones (world-first large-scale battlefield application), HIMARS precision strikes, Patriot/IRIS-T air defense, surface unmanned vessels, HIMARS long-range fires.

unit.zh: 美元/年（含国际军事援助）
unit.en: US dollars per year (including international military aid)

threats.zh: 俄罗斯全面入侵为当前唯一核心威胁，1000+公里前线持续高强度战斗。
threats.en: Russian full-scale invasion as the sole core threat; 1,000+ km frontline with continuous high-intensity combat.

recentBattles.zh: 2022-2023年全面抗俄战争：基辅保卫战、赫尔松反攻、巴赫穆特消耗战、2023年夏季反攻、持续的无人机与导弹攻防战。
recentBattles.en: 2022-2023 full-scale war against Russia: Battle of Kyiv, Kherson counteroffensive, Bakhmut attrition, 2023 summer counteroffensive, ongoing drone and missile attack-defense warfare.

populationDescription.zh: 战前约4400万人口，约600万人流亡海外（主要在欧盟），国内数百万人内部流离。战争导致严重人口危机。
populationDescription.en: Pre-war population of approximately 44 million; about 6 million refugees abroad (mainly in the EU); millions internally displaced. War has caused a severe demographic crisis.

ethnicGroups.zh: 乌克兰人为主（约78%），俄罗斯裔（约17%，战后认同变化剧烈），其他少数民族
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Ukrainian (~78%), Russian-origin (~17%, dramatic identity shifts post-war), other minorities

socialClasses.zh: 战争打破传统社会结构，军人和志愿者获得崇高社会地位，IT行业维持中产生活水平。
socialClasses.en: War has broken traditional social structure; military and volunteers gain elevated social status; IT industry maintains middle-class living standards.

allies.zh: 美国（最大军事援助国）、欧盟（乌克兰获得候选国地位）、英国、波兰、波罗的海三国。
allies.en: US (largest military aid provider), EU (Ukraine obtained candidate status), UK, Poland, Baltic states.

enemies.zh: 俄罗斯（全面入侵方）、白俄罗斯（允许俄军通过）。
enemies.en: Russia (full-scale invader), Belarus (allowed Russian forces transit).

treaties.zh: 欧盟候选国协议（2022年）、G7安全承诺、双边安全协议（英法德等）。
treaties.en: EU candidate agreement (2022), G7 security commitments, bilateral security agreements (UK/France/Germany, etc.).

foreignPolicy.zh: 全力争取加入欧盟与北约、维持国际军事与经济援助、推动俄罗斯问责与战后重建规划。
foreignPolicy.en: All-out pursuit of EU and NATO membership, maintaining international military and economic aid, promoting Russian accountability and post-war reconstruction planning.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年欧盟启动入盟谈判、泽连斯基全球外交攻势持续、和平方案提出、国际刑事法院对普京发出逮捕令。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: EU launched accession negotiations in 2023; Zelenskyy's global diplomatic offensive continues; peace formula proposed; ICC arrest warrant issued for Putin.

era.zh: 战时科技创新与AI军事应用前沿
era.en: Wartime tech innovation and AI military application frontier

keyInnovations.zh: AI辅助FPV无人机（全球首创大规模战场AI无人机应用）、Diia数字政府平台、水面无人艇、Grammarly（乌克兰裔创办）。
keyInnovations.en: AI-assisted FPV drones (world-first large-scale battlefield AI drone application), Diia digital government platform, surface unmanned vessels, Grammarly (Ukrainian-founded).

infrastructure.zh: 大规模基础设施遭战争破坏（能源/交通/通信），但IT基础设施通过Starlink等手段维持韧性。
infrastructure.en: Massive infrastructure war damage (energy/transport/communications), but IT infrastructure maintains resilience through Starlink and other means.

policy.zh: 战时AI政策聚焦于军事AI应用（无人机自主导航/目标识别）和数字政府（Diia平台），费多罗夫数字部长推动"科技战争"理念。
policy.en: Wartime AI policy focuses on military AI applications (drone autonomous navigation/target recognition) and digital government (Diia platform); Digital Minister Fedorov promotes the 'tech war' concept.

regulatoryStance.zh: 战时对AI监管极为宽松，优先军事应用与生存需求，对欧盟AI法案表示对标意愿。
regulatoryStance.en: Wartime AI regulation extremely permissive, prioritizing military applications and survival needs; expressed intention to align with the EU AI Act.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资主要来自军事需求驱动和国际科技援助，民间AI投资因战争大幅萎缩。
investmentScale.en: AI investment primarily driven by military needs and international tech aid; civilian AI investment has significantly contracted due to war.

name.zh: 乌克兰军用AI无人机系统

developer.zh: 多家乌克兰初创企业与军方合作
developer.en: Multiple Ukrainian startups in cooperation with the military

capabilities.zh: AI辅助目标识别、自主导航与抗电子战干扰能力，用于FPV自杀式无人机的精确打击。
capabilities.en: AI-assisted target recognition, autonomous navigation, and anti-electronic warfare jamming for precision strikes with FPV kamikaze drones.

valuation.zh: 估值约2亿美元（乌克兰裔美国人创办）
valuation.en: Valued at approximately $200 million (founded by Ukrainian-American)

keyProducts.zh: 面部识别AI，战时用于识别阵亡俄军士兵和间谍
keyProducts.en: Facial recognition AI, used in wartime to identify fallen Russian soldiers and spies

headquarters.zh: 纽约（创始人为乌克兰裔美国人）

keyProducts.zh: AI写作助手，全球3000万用户
keyProducts.en: AI writing assistant, 30 million global users

title.zh: 数字转型部长兼副总理
title.en: Minister of Digital Transformation and Vice Prime Minister

contribution.zh: 全球最年轻的数字部长之一（32岁就任），推动Diia数字政府平台、协调IT军队志愿者、推进AI无人机军事应用。
contribution.en: One of the world's youngest digital ministers (took office at 32), driving the Diia digital government platform, coordinating IT army volunteers, advancing AI drone military applications.

researchFocus.zh: AI军事无人机（自主导航/目标识别）、面部识别战场应用、数字政府AI、电子战AI对抗。
researchFocus.en: Military AI drones (autonomous navigation/target recognition), facial recognition battlefield applications, digital government AI, electronic warfare AI countermeasures.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 战争严重破坏物理基础设施，Starlink提供关键通信保障，云计算依赖国际服务商。
computeInfrastructure.en: War has severely damaged physical infrastructure; Starlink provides critical communications; cloud computing relies on international providers.

talentPool.zh: 战前乌克兰有超30万IT专业人才，战争导致部分流失但远程工作模式维持产出，IT军队志愿者展示科技动员能力。
talentPool.en: Pre-war Ukraine had over 300,000 IT professionals; war caused some loss but remote work model maintains output; IT army volunteers demonstrate tech mobilization capability.

globalRanking.zh: AI军事应用（无人机）领域全球创新引领者，民用AI约第35-40位
globalRanking.en: Global innovation leader in military AI applications (drones), civilian AI approximately 35th-40th

outlook.zh: 乌克兰在AI军事无人机领域的战场创新正重塑全球军事理论，战后有望将军事AI经验转化为民用产业。
outlook.en: Ukraine's battlefield innovations in military AI drones are reshaping global military theory; post-war, it may convert military AI experience into civilian industry.

strengths.zh: AI无人机战场创新（全球领先）、IT人才丰富、Diia数字政府、泽连斯基全球领导力、全民抵抗意志。
strengths.en: AI drone battlefield innovation (global leader), rich IT talent, Diia digital government, Zelenskyy's global leadership, national resistance will.

weaknesses.zh: 战争造成大规模破坏、经济严重依赖国际援助、人口流失、基础设施损毁、腐败问题。
weaknesses.en: Massive war destruction, economy heavily dependent on international aid, population loss, infrastructure damage, corruption issues.

outlook.zh: 乌克兰在AI无人机领域的创新为战后经济重建提供独特资产，但前提是战争能以有利条件结束。
outlook.en: Ukraine's AI drone innovation provides unique assets for post-war economic reconstruction, but contingent on the war ending on favorable terms.

description.zh: 乌克兰在全面战争中展现出非凡的AI军事创新能力——AI辅助FPV无人机的大规模战场应用正在重塑21世纪战争形态。费多罗夫数字部长推动的"科技战争"理念将IT人才、AI技术与军事需求深度融合。Diia平台展示了数字政府即使在战时也能运转的韧性。泽连斯基总统的全球外交攻势确保国际援助持续。Grammarly（乌克兰人创办，估值130亿美元）代表乌克兰IT人才的全球影响力。GDP因战争大幅萎缩，约600万人流亡海外。2023年欧盟启动乌克兰入盟谈判是重大外交胜利。
description.en: Ukraine demonstrates extraordinary AI military innovation capability amid full-scale war—large-scale battlefield application of AI-assisted FPV drones is reshaping 21st-century warfare. Digital Minister Fedorov's 'tech war' concept deeply integrates IT talent, AI technology, and military needs. The Diia platform demonstrates digital government resilience even in wartime. President Zelenskyy's global diplomatic offensive ensures continued international aid. Grammarly (Ukrainian-founded, valued at $13 billion) represents the global influence of Ukrainian IT talent. GDP has drastically contracted due to war; approximately 6 million refugees abroad. The EU's launch of Ukraine accession negotiations in 2023 was a major diplomatic victory.
